_**[Dave McCormick, a fellow Army veteran,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7mni12cqr6nu2og5p3mid8f2dhh8n1tbgmjm0o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9im1oj5chh2bs)**_ is running in Pennsylvania against Bob Casey.

_**[Sam Brown, another fellow Army veteran,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj34tash4fqnt029vglfhvgfd9917osv5d3duhlg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9im1oj5chh2bs)**_ is running in Nevada against Jacky Rosen.

_**[Bernie Moreno, a proven business leader,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrc79sldhh4n2jlafvhlssp7gl9214c0js266708_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9im1oj5chh2bs)**_ is running in Ohio against Sherrod Brown.

_**[And Kari Lake, a tough conservative who will put America first,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9umemmj8876nsahqt03nij1pq2cn64qc8a6k6t8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9im1oj5chh2bs)**_ is running in Arizona.

********************************************************[SPLIT A DONATION HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrfmgk11e3gnlelf0hhtrkjahclsdhctkch3p8f0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9im1oj5chh2bs)************************************************** ******

If these tough conservatives win, it guarantees Republicans win the U.S. Senate.

And I need each of them there with me to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks, and to make America strong again.

**[A donation of any amount will go directly to their campaigns, and *any amount* will make a difference ahead of this critical marker.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9enkci73qhib0b5dp0q7i0u85f3r1853bu89e1g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9im1oj5chh2bs)**

As I've also said before, if we don't win in November, we're done. So, if you can give at this time, don't wait. **[Help each of these tough conservatives before this deadline, and let's win in November.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2p6jnu70qs3lk5v24q6d8bcdolk96v9t6it7m9o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9im1oj5chh2bs)**

Friend,

Lawfare just lost bigly at the Supreme Court.

Presidential immunity is an indispensable component of our three branches of government. **_[Without presidential immunity, the presidency couldn't function properly -- point blank.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z82lbsmo9spp90f5godbt8aog78j45qn7pq7d7rg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hm0o37c3h2bs)_**

Left-wing activists' efforts to pressure Justice Alito and Justice Thomas to erroneously recuse themselves from the Donald Trump immunity case failed spectacularly. **[But in the coming months before the election, their legally baseless and inappropriate attacks on the court will only become more brazen,_and more dangerous._](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd05dfd7ojc0ufk88808kp6q41u6ta2on7a5js38_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hm0o37c3h2bs)**

Our very Constitution is at stake on November 5th. The Democratic Party is out to get President Trump _by any means necessary,_ and they'll happily trample the rule of law in pursuit of that goal.

Now is a time for choosing, Friend. Will you stand with President Trump and Senate Republicans in defense of the rule of law, or will you legitimize the Left's attacks on our Constitution?

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Your America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9af704sc2gisoqpcm7d1v8keniqotgieka8aa38_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmcor2c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zac48pd162hf5nbcf9rb5bh74ioho7e7fci72hqg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmcor2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3evnj8h6dsdl77ndtojp0f7mqc121ed4ulni6lo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmcor2c1h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

body:

---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg4LTRhN2M0MGU4OGMyYTQ4YjhiMmE2Y2U1NTUyYWNkMWI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtU1BPNTEyMTgmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/lIJv_YCr7X7J244O2oOT5Q)

| | Dear Friend,
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors--material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom--a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg4LTRhN2M0MGU4OGMyYTQ4YjhiMmE2Y2U1NTUyYWNkMWI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtU1BPNTEyMTgmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/q6lUBr41UR4ftgUNHvXJFA)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTg4LTRhN2M0MGU4OGMyYTQ4YjhiMmE2Y2U1NTUyYWNkMWI5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtU1BPNTEyMTgmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/pvPujiPbQRFT4XKFX2iDmQ)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

# **[Outmigration cost California $24B in departed incomes as poorer people move in](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
(The Center Square) - Outmigration to other states cost California $24 billion in outgoing personal incomes across 2021 and 2022, according to new IRS data. Departing Californians were significantly wealthier and more likely to have children or spouses than incoming Americans, suggesting wealthy families are leaving the state as poorer individuals come to seek their California dream.

body:
Send Amanda Back to the Senate
| | |
---
| DONATE TODAY
---
|
# SEND AMANDA CHASE BACK
# TO THE VIRGINIA SENATE
---
|
Dear Friends & Supporters,
Please make a donation today to send me back to the Virginia Senate, so that I may continue to serve you.
Any amount is greatly appreciated as I gear up to run for State Senate in Senate District 10, representing Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Hanover, Goochland, Louisa and Powhatan. The 10th Senatorial District is a very strong conservative Republican district. When I served the Virginia Senate from 2016 to 2023, my voting record was scored by many third party watchdog groups as one of the most conservative voting records in the Virginia Senate.
Many of you, live in the district, some of you do not. You can still give. You may or may not be able to vote for me, but I can still vote for you.
You know me. You know where I stand on the issues.
You saw me stand up against the 2021 gun grab, lead the charge against tyrannical covid mandates and confront politically correct politicians who refused to acknowledge that the 2020 presidential election was stolen.
Even when they put me in a plexiglass box because I refused to mask up and get the covid shot, I stood strong.
Despite the illegal censure by the Democrat controlled Senate of Virginia, I refused to compromise on boldly proclaiming the truth.
Please make a donation today to support my efforts to return to the Senate to be your voice.
A huge thanks to each of you who have already donated.
Please consider donating $25, $50 or $100 today. Thank you!

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Help five Republicans at once
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend, my team has emailed you about the fundraising deadline I'm facing on June 30th.

**[I'm not alone. Every single Republican Senator and Senate candidate is facing this deadline.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3g2jjamgu7rdei1od6i9nfsp139e017l03hbaj8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**

**[And for our nominees in battleground states, it could be a make or break moment.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5pap8ee35q0aihh2gn2v4u55gp2hf19ueoul280_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**

**[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between these candidates and my campaign ASAP.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2om5ojeuqb9a7o91erh92b6dobgc8tahhcatt2g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**

_**[Tim Sheehy, who served as a Navy Seal,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8l55nalh9stb7d5t6lvsv8hvrqbgvhpb06cc45g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**_ is running in Montana against Jon Tester.

_**[Dave McCormick, a fellow Army veteran,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbqgpnhb34mm8c434957hln58j9fsq13apmf39m8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**_ is running in Pennsylvania against Bob Casey.

_**[Sam Brown, another fellow Army veteran,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4hd4tn3mi02t97vsbdlk2qog1lodms4vjb5dng8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**_ is running in Nevada against Jacky Rosen.

_**[Bernie Moreno, a proven business leader,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaiudlk0tmvi67asovcaaf28eui3lv22ul67veu8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**_ is running in Ohio against Sherrod Brown.

_**[And Kari Lake, a tough conservative who will put America first,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z62io0ipj2vbqmk5mhanrs5b761f55snuf58bae0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**_ is running in Arizona.

********************************************************[SPLIT A DONATION HERE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0nt7ecipud1dr2m2uvs2lnc7gnrdvrr3paeeago_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)************************************************** ******

If these tough conservatives win, it guarantees Republicans win the U.S. Senate.

And I need each of them there with me to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks, and to make America strong again.

**[A donation of any amount will go directly to their campaigns, and *any amount* will make a difference ahead of this critical marker.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zikl0hps3vf21hcqlud8q36cuf4ngt8q40dd051o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**

As I've also said before, if we don't win in November, we're done. So, if you can give at this time, don't wait. **[Help each of these tough conservatives before this deadline, and let's win in November.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgkiknsq7e47chras2qaj771ep8vitb209p2kqso_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)**

In service,
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs3sknqpu5uluqrjjn6c497jogfcer5n0q09l5o0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)
Tom Cotton
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0pukcl40erl97gbv7saer5g78jf0ck6hsl188co_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)

********************************************************[DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z67koe2cuguia5afb8iodu6v042n111fgitof218_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c9hmaob4c5h2bs)************************************************** ******

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.

_The vengeful Democrats simply want to destroy me for serving as President Trump’s lawyer and for refusing to drop to my knees and surrender to the Deep State tyrants who are killing America._

This tragic news comes as we celebrate America’s 248th birthday and pay homage to our Founding Fathers who were willing to lay down their lives to choose liberty over tyranny. _They would’ve rather died on their feet than lived on their knees._

_248 years later, our nation is now once again teetering on the brink of tyranny._

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WsF_f6Arp3aFks_G_qKg9A~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WsF_f6Arp3aFks_G_qKg9A~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WsF_f6Arp3aFks_G_qKg9A~~/AARclAA~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Conservative Broadcast

| | | Peter, it’s Angela Alsobrook's team reaching out with a very urgent update about her Maryland Senate campaign! FIRST: Mitch McConnell recruited Larry Hogan for this Senate race, and committed to doing whatever and spending whatever it takes to turn Maryland’s open seat red. They’ve even started attacking her campaign with negative ads. THEN: Donald Trump endorsed Larry Hogan — and where Trump goes, we know the MAGA money machine is sure to follow. Hogan has been hosting high-dollar fundraisers and racking up prominent endorsements since getting Trump’s seal of approval. NOW: Angela Alsobrooks will fight for Marylanders and their families every single day to continue protecting abortion rights, voting rights, and defending our majority _despite the constant attacks on her campaign._ Maryland will make-or-break our chances of keeping the Senate in Democratic control, so this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. Can we count on you to split a donation between our campaign and Blue Amp Action before midnight to help overcome the GOP’s dark money, defeat Larry Hogan, and keep the Senate blue in November?

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: David Horowitz
subject: The leftist attack on our nation’s founding
body:
America's history and values are under attack like never before.

| |
---
| | Dear friend, America's history and values are under attack like never before. The lies and distortions spread by the radical Left are threatening to undermine everything our nation stands for. Leftists in academia and the media are aggressively pushing false narratives like the “1619 Project” that claim America was founded as “white supremacist” country and was built on the back of slavery, as a means of justifying their ultimate agenda of destroying America. That’s why in my new book, **_America Betrayed: How a Christian Monk Created America & Why the Left Is Determined to Destroy Her_**, I reveal the true history of America's world historic contribution to human freedom. **[**And I want you to be one of the first to have a copy.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4hkzef2CgAEZsGUe2vpAaQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa6KYP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci80YmM5NzU2OC1iZmUxLTQwYmUtODA2NC1hY2Y1NTVmOTU0MWM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19ESEZDX0FCMV9SRU5fUEEtT0dUVwNzcGNCCmZ92RKJZgDjPpFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** This attack on our heritage hasn’t come from nowhere. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their revisionist agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. This book is a vital defense against the malicious slanders that seek to turn our country's proud heritage into a "white supremacist" nightmare. I have dedicated my life to defending free societies and the principles of individual freedom. "America Betrayed" is the culmination of my work, and I believe it is the most important book I have ever written. **[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4hkzef2CgAEZsGUe2vpAaQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa6KYP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci80YmM5NzU2OC1iZmUxLTQwYmUtODA2NC1hY2Y1NTVmOTU0MWM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19ESEZDX0FCMV9SRU5fUEEtT0dUVwNzcGNCCmZ92RKJZgDjPpFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4hkzef2CgAEZsGUe2vpAaQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa6KYP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci80YmM5NzU2OC1iZmUxLTQwYmUtODA2NC1hY2Y1NTVmOTU0MWM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19ESEZDX0FCMV9SRU5fUEEtT0dUVwNzcGNCCmZ92RKJZgDjPpFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)[Please consider making a generous, tax-deductible donation to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today and as a thank you for your support I’ll send you a complimentary copy of “America Betrayed”.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4hkzef2CgAEZsGUe2vpAaQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa6KYP0SraHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci80YmM5NzU2OC1iZmUxLTQwYmUtODA2NC1hY2Y1NTVmOTU0MWM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19ESEZDX0FCMV9SRU5fUEEtT0dUVwNzcGNCCmZ92RKJZgDjPpFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Your donation will help us continue our fight against the forces that seek to rewrite our history to justify our destruction. With your help, we can ensure that future generations understand the true history of our great nation and the principles that have made it the beacon of freedom around the world. Together, we can fight back against the lies and distortions and preserve the true history of America's greatness.

| | Sincerely,

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Will you stand for life with me?
body:
You and I both know that every life is a precious gift.
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=52a8b6978c384e2588194d4f3fc97c91&_t=vq02SgdVk4iq90hAUmOcQ_htUKT18qgIsPaHW91TZAnd_qUBO0Ojb03rqE3MFbSZAgYCvL7RsyT5eqtnDBqHDbGsDA2pp3nghjObLuQLBi6uq3S4PIkDXrIBJ0-cYxBs)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=52a8b6978c384e2588194d4f3fc97c91&_e=P0idpQG3u6pPzKnNmHAICs8Lmtl23U9KifP7FkA_HZvKS5kQsNrVY7oyiQBf2C_F-W-eXAqDxBFNeZcbh55QpZ9ipG0iqGKUtH2h0bjqVqfDl_GAsv5cf8NQD6ZeveG-jHw1kDtdVBNb14428TPFqferqHL80cTCS6LtRaE4-MSyvrwSgzU0A_F2QRKgfhZAU6uEPlaZp_HjRmbVNkh89xQud2oNxCopdF1-s3iKakS2v3IL8CIhVl1LmAsudCMyxjLF4B31HhOS7USN27tCMFeWrZVScOTIZNEZh14ZzDTSQUYKZYUl1hxo0McuL8fxykuJKhH4V5wiqY08Mt9HDz_IOdik6RgtPD6qnFwzvJEIs0E8Y58l7WZekxPB4trl)

---
| |
Dear Fellow American,

It's Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Governor of Arkansas.

You and I both know that every life is a precious gift. Yet, the Biden Administration continues to threaten the innocent and the voiceless under the guise of reproductive rights.

Every day, they press ahead with policies that expand access to dangerous abortion drugs and allow abortion-on-demand, resulting in countless, unthinkable losses of innocent life. The danger to future generations, the heartbreaking impact on families, and the erosion of our most fundamental values as Americans are at stake.

But we don't have to accept this reality. There is a solution, and you are a key part of it.

I am proud to join forces with SBA Pro-Life America, the most principled and effective organization fighting to end abortion in our country. By advocating for legislation that serves women and saves babies, SBA Pro-Life America stands at the forefront of this battle for life.

**But our effectiveness relies on dedicated individuals like YOU. YOUR voice matters. YOUR actions matter.**

That's why I'm personally inviting you to join us by signing the Stand For Life Pledge. This is a powerful way for us to demonstrate that, together, we form a strong, nationwide coalition poised to protect life, challenge policies that devalue it, and promote a culture that cherishes the value of every human life.

As a pro-life American, would you step forward today and sign our Pledge for Life? You can do so at the link below:

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/sarah-huckabee-sanders](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=52a8b6978c384e2588194d4f3fc97c91&_e=P0idpQG3u6pPzKnNmHAICs8Lmtl23U9KifP7FkA_HZvKS5kQsNrVY7oyiQBf2C_F-W-eXAqDxBFNeZcbh55QpZ9ipG0iqGKUtH2h0bjqVqfDl_GAsv5cf8NQD6ZeveG-jHw1kDtdVBNb14428TPFqferqHL80cTCS6LtRaE4-MSyvrwSgzU0A_F2QRKgfhZAU6uEPlaZp_HjRmbVNkh89xQud2oNxCopdF1-s3iKakRR_51hd7GFmdqqU-9mrm7uOEwyYLoXcZ0Sc-12mk6oHAjhwrq9R9_qmZ9rvS-X56ksUb6Inukl-EB7S-ncLyqw_rkthbchoF7NtkrG__p0srwj1QIDUSSE-1ZQrhPbIJqzp2sSvm32KTQjuB8Hn3sC)

Together, we can protect the future and build a pro-life America. Thank you for standing with us and for acting on your beliefs - because it's in these actions that change truly begins.

God bless you,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders
Governor of Arkansas
---

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0d18ca1820d4e6480fea85d86b81152&_e=aYfJMRsGvYRufwfC2al5hqC2cVVYVGSFfBYAbp0KPbJrSOeThXwvm8Mjf3OW5gitW7brX_USbzMloNp3wRr5UjgebMvJRGvYgc_vQG8864wVp0e-Xh0gpV2U4S16uJftJjIyYoev8h_hdUN2JrEXLA_nwFyeNuxLNiF2hXDj_mTg0eK7xjlboUurmag9M0haMIv2gUYFs2iw144FaIsR5D7CdlHGudP-iwpeQiEoVahIz3JRJxOs6fhBM8xC6aq-YkZtqof5EkhEbK4qVUO25xo86hB6urIpwUBXzwWd_eB3k5L5jjdWYklM2F86s0dYC2EwsjTQ-c0W7-JChh0lKFZeM8tR25fdG20HA1XA3XkMbEpo9oryH-22POWrv3AiE0TgIa586KUsZ_y5sSWt3g%3D%3D)

| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0d18ca1820d4e6480fea85d86b81152&_e=aYfJMRsGvYRufwfC2al5hqC2cVVYVGSFfBYAbp0KPbJrSOeThXwvm8Mjf3OW5gitW7brX_USbzMloNp3wRr5UjgebMvJRGvYgc_vQG8864wVp0e-Xh0gpV2U4S16uJftJjIyYoev8h_hdUN2JrEXLA_nwFyeNuxLNiF2hXDj_mTg0eK7xjlboUurmag9M0haMIv2gUYFs2iw144FaIsR5D7CdlHGudP-iwpeQiEoVahIz3JRJxOs6fhBM8xC6aq-Nu0ifyoGDu6Vw0FQZVHcKwPOKXWs6GVEODTDZt5c3yi3cHIvCTMHHDcMS2BtGiwtwbyNKktoTwBiWwPP1jBbMFWN0jfQI3xtZgNrVLTBOp1r5NQKGu11tLr7i43rWqlrmIb7bmGHXP2jO1EOgocIZQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

clean_body: What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we... Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations. Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.** Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. | noun | 1\. The lowest point in the fortunes of a person or organization. 2\. (Astronomy) The point on the celestial sphere directly below an observer. The opposite of "zenith."
---|---
| |
---
| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg7567&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | | "At the nadir of his sales career, he decided to try a new path and go back to school."
---|---|---
| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg7567&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | | "I couldn't find the Ursa Major constellation, because it was positioned at my nadir."
---|---|---
| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg7567&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | | "You can see by these charts that our revenue reached its nadir in 2011 and recovered over the next five years."
---|---|---
| |
---
Arabic, late 14th century
| |
---
"Nadir" comes from the Arabic word "naẓīr," which means "opposite to the zenith, the highest point in the celestial sky" (or the point directly above the observer). The original usage of this word applied to astronomy. For example, if you were to go outside and look directly up at the sky, then draw an imaginary line from that point in the sky down through your body, straight through the Earth and into the sky on the other side of the world, that celestial point would be your nadir. ...

name: Eugene Vindman
subject: If there was ever a time to show you are ready to take on the MAGA GOP, it’s now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The real work begins now
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc5a91a1-2891-4f33-a4a9-fa028621b035/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, It’s Eugene Vindman. My race was called, and I’m honored to accept the Democratic nomination to represent Virginia’s 7th district in Congress! Now, the real work begins — and it’s only going to get harder. This is likely going to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country. As we head into the general election, I am counting on this team to show our MAGA opponent that we are determined and prepared to take them on. But I can't do that and win this battleground district without you by my side, Peter. [Please, can you split a $10 contribution between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help me start the general election off on the right foot? Every single dollar will help power our pro-democracy movement through Election Day and help us take back the House majority from the extremist GOP.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7fe49ec9-f8d1-4cc7-b929-fcbbf181dac3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [CHIP IN!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc00f2c16-2dd1-41df-b551-19be1ef90c63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| The people of Virginia’s 7th district spoke up loud and clear to say that they want a representative with integrity — one who preserves our fundamental values and principles and not extremists who want to ban abortions and books. But truthfully, this race is much bigger than Virginia’s 7th district, or you and me, Peter. It’s a fight to end the hateful MAGA regime that wants to control our lives, play politics with our classrooms, ban reproductive freedom, and serve their party over the people who elected them. It’s a fight to return true leadership, integrity, and commitment to our country back to the People’s House. It’s a fight to defend the very future of our democracy, and the stakes have never been higher. So as we begin this next stage of our pro-democracy movement, I am hoping you will stand firmly by my side — because I cannot fend off attacks from Trump, wealthy MAGA mega-donors, and GOP super PACs without your support. [Can you please split a $10 contribution between Blue Amp Action and my campaign for Congress today? Every day from now until November 5th, I’ll be fighting to keep this seat out of extremist hands.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03b26922-3449-4f2c-9c78-840142b792bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN $10 NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9505690f-c417-424a-a788-35f821a1a4f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peter, we are at a critical juncture in American history, where our choices will determine whether we uphold democracy or fall to autocratic control. As your Democratic nominee for VA-07, I will work tirelessly to hold this seat and ensure we can take back the house and continue to preserve this fragile experiment that is our democracy. Let’s do this, Eugene Vindman
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac4b2bf9-0e13-40e3-9f64-f78284856393/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: The Flyover
subject: Shark Attacks in Texas, Volcanic Eruptions, and Misfired Fireworks
body:
Authorities believe a single shark attacked four swimmers on Thursday at South Padre Island, Texas, leaving one victim with a serious injury to her lower leg. You can see photos of the incident here, but be advised that they're graphic in nature.

# SATURDAY, JULY 6, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this day in 1785, the [Continental Congress](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfgzesyxkHZ2D4Fm_51o4WhiNcRUwExJb_fdWqY-dneKX3477cLSfeHv_tk0wLebGu8U6LlleJalGdN4EIaejIXDQC6gFv2EXjYFKTtgMMAcGOVo0KCcdVu_XmaNAdGwRUoOF6AUCA_rKiv3k3-smPMIVVKCDPLZf-M_PWIoV05p1K7_KzSya29qpi-CdwFjgfx9FHri2X89sFzi1yld6ekjf5KwJnn1OyRVJtdk1cI3mZQ2DHNsm3rNK9S6HNnV0x_nVwSlyvWih4PC2nn3L7c8Nu8CsAAP__SJxhig) established the dollar as the official currency of the newly established United States, paving the way for a national monetary system. ## Trump Disavows Project 2025
Former President Donald Trump [distanced himself ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFvgzAQRn-N2UDH2cbJ4KELW7p2RMY-h4sMRo4T2n9f0bnLt3zSe3pft-nmOPF2_3Qr2Rrz5HzlN02mHVpUk2qCjURIsiHbGwQ0Eq_YLDYa2Q8QpOyvswIpnY96NnrQyhjne9-wRUAFBoYeAAG6fsZwDV6HS9BwibNQQIFrLt0j81YXiuknv6l0Pq9Nskut-1PID4GjwPE4js59c36er8DxZAscwZyjBY61vNa93Ut-kK8tAup2ocLV3amN-bUFVzlvTbFhPzglfg5GKLivjtOfsP5b_7b4GwAA__9gu1qK)from the Heritage Foundation's Project 2025 on Friday, stating that he was not involved with the project and disagreed with some of its content. Project 2025 is a 900-page "[governing agenda](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQAL_G7hwti7FJ4eI1dHntlcjBC97IYEQ2RPf3p1x99Wg00nzdxlvkwtvyP64UZK5jnIRPGr1xBu1odQozEVKrKTQeAX2LV9Q5XPu-7RrwfeytS669d97HlmICO0dKoDkgoAUPrgFAgEtzx3RNU5f61EE_35UFSiz1uDwqb5JpLt_1pOMy1VWXkEX2p2r_KRwUDpIpcykfpnDIdaWN3k-FwxTXPfKyKRys75wDNHK81t3sR33QJAYBO5PpYIkLmbm-thSF60fQR0j7m0vhp_PKwrJG_k1o-fPFGfAnAAD__0xYYKk)" outlining conservative priorities and insight from scholars and policy experts. The document has since become a talking point for Democrats and the Biden campaign. Last November, Trump unveiled [his own agenda ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0Dtu6zAQheHVSB2N4YjPgsVt3Pm2KQWaM7QZUKIgMTay-0CpUx6c5sP_cZtvsdSyPv7HhUPPbY6plxfPVhiBalYjhcyMPI0cpEVAO6HH8Rmim3KkOKGXZLyXmeTkpUzOonFk9VgCAiqwYCQAAlzkHclT0uRIg8v3QQFT6W2_fLay9ifn-t1evF9SW8Yanr1vxzD9G_A64DVuK7-P8zrH3kuqPOC171_LJrZWSyp8iPjglaLgyqmXtopTIA5ObSXReV8EGW3IZXAGfXQUpYpGJwVWa6UZ8rgH2t6l1nIYOyh4LLHUX1D_s84r4E8AAAD__zEKZUY)for a potential second term that included overhauls to immigration, trade, foreign policy, energy, and education. As for the Heritage Foundation's agenda, Trump said, "Anything they do, I wish them luck, but [I have nothing to do with them](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3oiOA4MZGLpkS9eOFuaOhAgbi9BE_fsqnTs-veFJ7-uyXEIueb9-ho19T3UJsecnL1YYgXrRI_nEjKxG9tIioFXocLx56YINpJRylMw6ByeTcxaB0pzkbNOYPQJqsGAkAAKc5IrkKE400wRzWgcNTLnXdrrXvPcbp_JTn9xOsW5j8bfej8egPgY8D3gOx86vx1u9ofUcCw947u17O8TR6p1jFwg4iTUT78KRsqiNA6UIFUtWgdMUE2gLAdmMzdPxyqXkh7GDhusWcvkr9383PD3-BgAA__8rOF0J)."
## U.S. Labor Market May Be Cooling
The U.S. economy added 206,000 jobs in June, while the [unemployment rate rose ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71yhCAURp8GOpzr9QcpKNLYbdqUDsplZQPiKKvx7TOmTvM138w5c74ew8P44Jfnp4mks0uDmbI_aJCiFVgPNbfaESFVnHQpEVBWqJDP2oKUlewa01pDTnadbdXYKKecVZNyinuNgDVIaEsABCjKEa2yU2M720DnRlYDWZ_TVrySX_JMLlzpoK2YUuRBzzmvO6s-GPYM-_M8C_Pj036_DPubzbAHeU_DsH-lcRfRbN-UxXuhuIZ0RVqyeO-CprSkePFN2_X0Ifi9layGZzQ-_Nnyv-mHxt8AAAD__zZKWyE)to 4.1 percent, according to data released by the Labor Department on Friday. Friday's job numbers slightly exceed the projected 190,000 jobs, and the 4.1% unemployment rate is the highest since November 2021, indicating [a potential cooling off](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz72O6yAQQOGngc7ReADjFBS3cZfbbmlhGMcT8RMFkihvv9qttz7Skb6vy3rxnLhc__tMru919aHzi1Y7TAPqVcvodiIkJcmNFgGtwjPKw-04Bx0hGu8DBaO9jVr5edRKbcZPINkhoAYL0wiAAKdxw3iOwcQ5Gpj3TWigyL0-TrfKpR-0p0990eMUapbJHb3fm1D_BC4Cl37QwSn9NIHL9mxcqDWBi7Zm0iMMLdU3l-tAoZaaP8PtWWh4Fsr3VD-ZShe4yIeL9zenxG2yQsM1e_5dyv6n_eXwOwAA__8NT1x9) in the labor market. The Labor Department [revised job numbers ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7tuwyAUgOGngc3R8QFMMjB08ZauHS0uh5iISxRIKr991c6df-mXvq_rdrUpp3r7tIXMiG2zfqQ3bXpaJpSb5MFEIiTBycwaAbXAC_LdCB8F0iJo9sLOXlqptJVyscrNjlTkySCgBA3LDIAAp9lhuASvwjkoOEfHJFBIoz1P95bq2Cnmo73pefKt8Gz2MR6diQ-GK8N17LSnnH8bw9W9eqrUO8NVaiXFBaZXn8i32sox3Zvr06tSeeR2FKqD4cqfJjy-U86pL5pJuBWb_m58_Mt-G_wJAAD__x0SWmM)from May and April, showing the economy added 111,000 fewer jobs than initially reported.
## Shark Attacks Four Off Texas Coast
Authorities believe a single shark attacked four swimmers on Thursday at South Padre Island, Texas, leaving one victim with a serious injury to her lower leg. You can see photos of the [incident here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn8N3ojOZxycgaELW7p2tAgcMQ02FkeS5t9X6dzlWz7p6el9neezSzlt10-3kmmxzM639KBZy6NENasumEiENHRkeo2AesATdovxkaYxDiNh7KcBgsdRx76POgZP6oJdMgioQMOxB0CAQ3_BcAp-DFMYYYoXoYBCaqUevkva2kIxv8qD6sGXtctmaW1nMXwItALt9toLt_cl0L7BAi3o94wC7Z3lRk8WaNmtJHlx9SZda87fWCrJz7SuVFmWTTb6cSy53NsidxcqycTZbUGg7aoJ-zPlnPiohYLr6lL-s2n_pnkY_A0AAP__Yp9mAw), but be advised that they're graphic in nature. Texas Parks and Wildlife officials said it appeared the shark was involved in [four separate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v8yAURn8N3rAuF2LigeGVXnlLl6rqaF2-YhpiIqCJ8u-rdO78PNI5Op-n9UQpp_38RtdgeiwruZ7uYdV84qhWNXgTQ8Agh2CERkAtccZhM1ESOKetmGgmH2cXYzwojYpIW23tkAwCKtAwCQAEGIVFP3t38Ed_gGO0TEHwqZc6fpW09y3E_Cz3UEdXrkM2W--3xuQ_hgvDhazbw6ON5_KaGS4f7wyXVr77xm_ka-CpZdo9bxvVC6feyV1ej17qk8kleSb_CyEmrV_-1fjbI-Wc2qSZgvOVUv7l9j8j3A3-BAAA__-4t16m) incidents which resulted in two bites, one severe and another injured, fending off the shark. The Independence Day attacks followed reports of [several large sharks ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGngc3oOAPGg4cu2dK1IzrwObg4cWROcfv2VTt3_6Vf38d1uVJM8XF7pzs7CXmhTeKLF6MmhcMytN4FZmTdsusNAhqNFtvdjYb1hGA9BNRsWPvV9nYgnGkN2s9tdAg4gIGpB0CArl_RW7-NfvYjzGFtBmAfJZfuM8eH7BzSd35x6bZ8b5PbRZ5no98avDR4qbV2D65nZT5-gwYv507lUCRC26GEv-hUIeUSPSkptB1c1K0wiap7FFa9xX60Y1ucf9aYUjwn0wxwu1NMf0v51_9y-BMAAP__mfZeCQ)along the eastern and southeastern coast earlier this week, including a massive 13-foot great white detected off the coast of Florida on Wednesday.

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c8b17102a1ca4beca62dbc6fa5be3a4e&_e=nhQIDrI_qJMDmCW87ykgML5YdWpqJ2e2cS21kqGsLH6OtewH5mONPaRpZwS_EYL8oVTyL5Q8Z015O7I6eDRkOrgYH1o8Ne4pnOmyi2bS3SJoF2-u2okd3fehhOrlEVGZYbXqVX0UXIlZ7xMvFfMzWalJwmgRqm9yqzIkjS7cq1UrehwNQdrmgnKn7W_TmepgoJ5H1qhR3Od2uHjpAfwkQVpgrOcX0Xz7HBgRw1aUFxQVjDyDiBV9bhsvLXYJCq-RUqTjxtN2Pd2np6KeYSd1idwC2zpLTqjat_99X9KgQYC565LLleLGX0k3yStk6WKU_wLGf4A54qmaJ8-VvlWoPGRKT9smpEBxSYaLHAtiPG7jyeGMBG0uoJ5k3nmKUl62E3S2BO6YjKOQzW1csD0sSg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c8b17102a1ca4beca62dbc6fa5be3a4e&_e=nhQIDrI_qJMDmCW87ykgML5YdWpqJ2e2cS21kqGsLH6OtewH5mONPaRpZwS_EYL8oVTyL5Q8Z015O7I6eDRkOrgYH1o8Ne4pnOmyi2bS3SJoF2-u2okd3fehhOrlEVGZYbXqVX0UXIlZ7xMvFfMzWalJwmgRqm9yqzIkjS7cq1UrehwNQdrmgnKn7W_TmepgoJ5H1qhR3Od2uHjpAfwkQVpgrOcX0Xz7HBgRw1aUFxQVjDyDiBV9bhsvLXYJCq-REzHZFOJD3NTjeNdyeXKj56Pe0TpzbQxaCMI9krPVTURkP2X2e2ctfLIvHdIvLvaLSMWdkLVUORhYARmqO-7xotQOePxSDnz92tYcDoVqWaWm8rtxs5PHoCLmgSfdn9KDBcy9Saibi0Xj-tmj8Buppw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c8b17102a1ca4beca62dbc6fa5be3a4e&_e=nhQIDrI_qJMDmCW87ykgML5YdWpqJ2e2cS21kqGsLH6OtewH5mONPaRpZwS_EYL8oVTyL5Q8Z015O7I6eDRkOrgYH1o8Ne4pnOmyi2bS3SJoF2-u2okd3fehhOrlEVGZYbXqVX0UXIlZ7xMvFfMzWalJwmgRqm9yqzIkjS7cq1UrehwNQdrmgnKn7W_TmepgoJ5H1qhR3Od2uHjpAfwkQVpgrOcX0Xz7HBgRw1aUFxQVjDyDiBV9bhsvLXYJCq-Rm1umriXqk3R3iVkRaLhmmpfhWOOlHRfWVvzBsv0koeK0tSxJeMu-Qyc2LYVLYN5JUWTiU_FBfgye1DxKdsAOa1FkWCjpljZNMJs4TudSzXf0YMVgSEaZc46Ecvpykcc39JZFbJRihUQmgXK2D3gkCg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount, even just $5, to help support Turning Point USA. ](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkL2q4zAQRp9G7mRGI1myCxULi7tssQS2NGNrkgjkH_STff1L7hPc_uPjnPPvttwopng8_9DOvua65LIQL_VqhWTm95lajeexIKCR4CTYRXXBG4dB2469cgho7WBM9_KPSQ3E_DA4IeigtFonZw24YUSjwthF__kBB1YpADP2g9PWjRCcthNY3oQBSpxr6euLM19tTXGjozLt_XbuXfKvWq8i9C-Bs8C58NYy93RwOOtnIXCuLR_xeMrrjEeVrZDA2RltQa9W0hZQGqZJTsPKkjCsHwHUQELP5Wx542U7Awv9-_73Pig1jV324fofU4rFOmHguVNM3zj1x8neHr8CAAD__8OLcT0)**

name: Center for American Liberty
subject: They want you to forget this
body:
You have an opportunity to help correct one of the worst injustices of the Covid era.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d04b8e8e59ce4d5aaf6d3bdddf5e3d9b&_e=4gfvXVrxsDVylB1yxSD0-gCnZ3zxVExRYglXKWhacC-3Ootz27H_qSy87VkYeTBXiMEgwRl51wf7xSIzs9I9myxguLsn-iUN_JQRfmIDZvi9ASnb85Zex8OKJi0BWJenEq6In9d6MEtfcOniES974mKJsOhA164RcrN75lYrdUrhSQRvvKq3qYW2_P4wMO3at4kcKQrcFOP25isbavAkxJXsFlHdI31nRh7kaxz3ROczm4b_yiUKGHeWVHpfU3M_mLg46oGblkjibPCuStlpJ2pi5EkuN7b_qRnrQ0JmZ80dja6K_WORJd6HHTiIQ0tj1msMwALEQVcfaJ71KoU_sLEaFYWWqqjDsYL03SiQiWYCXpM9EtHpB0P-LTkn9NqX)
---
Fellow American, You have an opportunity to help correct one of the worst injustices of the Covid era. **Thou****sands of hardworking, competent people were fired -- all because they refused to get the Covid shot.** Doctors, nurses, teachers, members of the military, and many more. It's the natural tendency of the authoritarian left to punish people for refusing to go along with its schemes. And now that we know more of the truth about Covid, the vaccine, and the shady collusion between government organizations, Big Tech and Big Pharma... ...they'd love nothing more than to sweep this all under the rug and pretend it never happened. **That 's why I've instructed our attorneys at the Center for American Liberty to initiate legal action to hold them accountable.** For starters, we filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID vaccine. _Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade._ **[**And if we can win this critical legal battle, we can put employers across the country on notice that they should reinstate victims of their COVID vaccine firings.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d04b8e8e59ce4d5aaf6d3bdddf5e3d9b&_e=4gfvXVrxsDVylB1yxSD0-gCnZ3zxVExRYglXKWhacC-3Ootz27H_qSy87VkYeTBXiMEgwRl51wf7xSIzs9I9myxguLsn-iUN_JQRfmIDZvi9ASnb85Zex8OKJi0BWJenEq6In9d6MEtfcOniES974mKJsOhA164RcrN75lYrdUrhSQRvvKq3qYW2_P4wMO3at4kcKQrcFOP25isbavAkxAP4VcSVvBwUpSNJru4x0QiwAa4zxREGiAxUJBGzHP31P5iVriTUMG31uMsXpm4z9dlIzPNjj7MoQ6wc2ACcmObb3AVLYytq3zYEGEBl7NWDmG4YEgp3Eb1ke9LkzgTktyf_1fEUod1LQjdrEttUh8o3oA1bIfcsdzFal2iMkLrT)** When the Symphony introduced their vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris, and Rachel each held sincere religious beliefs, filed for exemptions, and expressed a willingness to take other measures--like regular COVID testing--to ensure safety. But the Symphony rejected ALL of them and put them on a year of UNPAID LEAVE. These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish. **To you and me, the freedom to practice your religion is a sacred right.** **So is your right to bodily autonomy.** But in the eyes of the cultural Marxists who control so many institutions in America today, your body doesn't belong to you - it belongs to them. They'll decide where you go... They'll decide what you need... They'll decide what you can have... They'll decide what vaccines you must take... In other words: _Your individual liberties_ will cease to exist. The good news is that while cultural Marxism is popular on college campuses, legacy media press rooms, the boardrooms of woke companies and inside government bureaucracies... ...the vast majority of Americans are against it. This is a fight we can win - and we must win. **[**You can join me today by making a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty to fund this lawsuit for medical and religious freedom, and set a precedent nationwide that puts these radicals on notice.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d04b8e8e59ce4d5aaf6d3bdddf5e3d9b&_e=4gfvXVrxsDVylB1yxSD0-gCnZ3zxVExRYglXKWhacC-3Ootz27H_qSy87VkYeTBXiMEgwRl51wf7xSIzs9I9myxguLsn-iUN_JQRfmIDZvi9ASnb85Zex8OKJi0BWJenEq6In9d6MEtfcOniES974mKJsOhA164RcrN75lYrdUrhSQRvvKq3qYW2_P4wMO3at4kcKQrcFOP25isbavAkxHqOlBnWgAXqiv7ulrkVN-sSjuMWMnswtj22mik2G6g5osgZ_WgsNvCxRKulpfZUpd4aq14AQCImxKsrF9zu7LHd2lHi4-Fou5dN-ohQmKd_dDWKm_gOzT74ki8pbWkFPDSPIib_KaynBcPih_plcZuh2ZEPbgvBN8F29RAlB5Yo)** Even after the North Carolina Symphony lifted its vaccine mandate, it refused to give these musicians their jobs back. Because it was never about "science" or "health" - it was always about control. And it's time to tell the cultural Marxists who want to control every aspect of your life that we aren't backing down. I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO

name: History Facts
subject: The first woman to wear pants on the Senate floor
body:
Carol Moseley Braun holds the distinction of being the first African American woman elected to the U.S. Senate, and in 1993, she also helped bring about another victory for equality: a rare rule change in the Senate that updated the dress code from its outdated, gendered restrictions to better align with the times. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68zd8mlm2838qe4q13zaaeyv6vnbpbmqh83hro9xdbjkfykdjapaz973j02lu2xrq5iefcd6vi2u70lt1z0a0a9tra9n20dx7exnhn0b8j0bq0wfxa2nz6e22wthcg7uxc6xsjloj26lh6gxh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Women couldn’t wear pants on the Senate floor until 1993.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| C arol Moseley Braun holds the distinction of being the first African American woman elected to the U.S. Senate, and in 1993, she also helped bring about another victory for equality: a rare rule change in the Senate that updated the dress code from its outdated, gendered restrictions to better align with the times.
---
Before becoming a senator, Moseley Braun was used to wearing pantsuits during her tenure in the Illinois legislature, where rules were more relaxed. One morning in early 1993, not long after she was sworn in as a Democratic senator, she chose an Armani pantsuit to wear to work. “I walked onto the floor of the Senate, and the gasps were audible,” she [later said](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). The dress code — which required women to wear dresses or skirts with a jacket — was enforced primarily by peer pressure, as well as the whims of the Senate doorkeepers who allowed people into the chamber.
Female aides initially tried to challenge the dress code in 1972, but their request was reportedly ignored. By 1993, thanks to an increasing number of women senators, the tide began to shift. After Moseley Braun’s unintentionally bold move, Senator Barbara Mikulski did the same. (Although no official Senate record confirms which senator first wore pants on the floor, most available information suggests it was Moseley Braun.) Female staffers, journalists, and other senators soon began advocating for an official allowance to wear pants. Shortly after, Senate Sergeant at Arms Martha Pope issued an amendment to the dress code, allowing “coordinated pantsuits” as part of the acceptable attire for women — a major win in what’s been called the “pantsuit revolution.”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The U.S. started allowing babies on the Senate floor in 2018.
In April 2018, the U.S. Senate unanimously passed a resolution allowing senators to bring their children under the age of 1 onto the Senate floor during votes. Senator Tammy Duckworth, a Democrat from Illinois, played a significant role in this historic decision. Just days before, Duckworth herself made history as the first U.S. senator to give birth while in office, and she had already been advocating for a rule change — a rarity in the Senate — so she could continue her governmental duties while caring for her newborn. “Whether you are a woman or a man... you should be able to bring that child on to the floor and continue to do your job,” she [said](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg77xg&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) at the time. Ten days after giving birth, Duckworth became the first senator to cast a vote on the Senate floor with her baby cradled in her arms.

name: RINO WATCH
subject: Remember this RINO?

body:
This is what he’s up to now

Friend, remember RINO, Trump Impeacher, Adam Kinzinger?

Here's a photo to help jog your memory:

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7LAFSuA-pWK1ojeBWAaOwg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa72MP0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhLWUta2luemluZ2VyLXJpbm93YXRjaC1tci8_~~)

In an effort to stay relevant, Adam Kinzinger and his RINO pals on Twitter are doing nothing but hurling attacks against conservative Senate candidate Mike Rogers.

_Why, you might ask?_ Because in their RINO minds, Mike has done the unthinkable supporting President Donald J. Trump.

**[Mike Rogers is running for Senate in the State of Michigan. And everybody knows Michigan is the single most important state for Republicans if we are to stand a chance at flipping the Senate AND taking back the White House.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7LAFSuA-pWK1ojeBWAaOwg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa72MP0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhLWUta2luemluZ2VyLXJpbm93YXRjaC1tci8_~~)**

_Coincidence that Mike Rogers is the candidate whom Adam Kinzinger chooses to go scorched earth on?_ Don't think so.

Trump back in the White House.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7LAFSuA-pWK1ojeBWAaOwg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa72MP0T6aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhLWUta2luemluZ2VyLXJpbm93YXRjaC1tci8_~~)**

And that's where you come in, Friend.

Help us send RINOs like Adam Kinzinger into a frenzy, and put America First Mike Rogers in the United States Senate!

Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump.

I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the NATION we’re going to keep fighting for this country until we take our last breaths.

clean_body: The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME. | The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME. First: The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent. Then: They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom. Now: I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION. You may have heard President Trump say, “They’re not coming for me; they’re coming for you, and I’m in their way.” Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump. I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the NATION we’re going to keep fighting for this country until we take our last breaths. I don’t care if I’m homeless or if I lose everything. NOTHING matters if we don’t win the November election. **If there’s ANYTHING you can spare — your donation will be MATCHED 10X if you donate towards my midnight deadline. Please DONATE BELOW! | Thank you, Kari Lake Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, **.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f6e6c6161834c34bab72bd430923c38&_e=xfezYXf7PGV_pvQegwR6IIjn06V5iciBtbw93eysxq0nJZVcukDMZ6z4r4SQ-PcGjcx6mqBJypPmox7CNRWAGRLl4rO1xu8MYRSbnedV9zZ-_oJudYUPTYUZrujy6qVavZo5SOhmQRfOD56ylkC9nA_Zv29_FkTfVtxOKwRLYlpmdJsVmva1Kgka39a8Y4LjAScTBwjsFdGiyx5Cr4HycKxpiQvKWez_aYAxCIjymT9MCqLQsrd0iVuV9hcJYfabhr1MdRTC8Te6ojk_RfH46GsjaavssLPICEjerMeVDV8BUEeAQ41puWJrPUNNsCmkzWavyx3oEB7gy_M7okgehvz_LinSKVcYjz6H8xikE0X36VuituUPBnTThw0d82Yej20ZMJn4HqAW8f0r8wi_qA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f6e6c6161834c34bab72bd430923c38&_e=xfezYXf7PGV_pvQegwR6IIjn06V5iciBtbw93eysxq0nJZVcukDMZ6z4r4SQ-PcGjcx6mqBJypPmox7CNRWAGRLl4rO1xu8MYRSbnedV9zZ-_oJudYUPTYUZrujy6qVavZo5SOhmQRfOD56ylkC9nA_Zv29_FkTfVtxOKwRLYlpmdJsVmva1Kgka39a8Y4LjAScTBwjsFdGiyx5Cr4HycKxpiQvKWez_aYAxCIjymT9MCqLQsrd0iVuV9hcJYfabEm4hyj1HW1RoDcRpZiVgyWaJKjPuw-2X_RO5Mitqwu7Hm3COrMWJoqIJs4A2HGLzW5a8V9DDxVzp46IEWTGLfAOw-6SJx3mYrW8DjFppsieCSli1xfvGfF3gLNoJCrije2s3_14zojCvum0EVEB1Ug%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f6e6c6161834c34bab72bd430923c38&_e=xfezYXf7PGV_pvQegwR6IIjn06V5iciBtbw93eysxq0nJZVcukDMZ6z4r4SQ-PcGjcx6mqBJypPmox7CNRWAGRLl4rO1xu8MYRSbnedV9zZ-_oJudYUPTYUZrujy6qVavZo5SOhmQRfOD56ylkC9nA_Zv29_FkTfVtxOKwRLYlpmdJsVmva1Kgka39a8Y4LjAScTBwjsFdGiyx5Cr4HycKxpiQvKWez_aYAxCIjymT9MCqLQsrd0iVuV9hcJYfabgulQ5OtzNhJzAHSz30DrY0hvk-BucFqUog4OSjIWS_PT-YcCO9bNCO5Lp-5HexvRm5PGf6fYNkLS5Z68ByLgbXGJZjYcZWT0ETjxge-MwB9Z21415qA-ygXtLaAHV6gEbcWNteuTZvUdFy4tGPsdzQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| |

clean_body: What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we... Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations. Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.** Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 06, 2024

Biden reveals a
shocking secret regarding his presidential campaign

Joe Biden has loads of skeletons in his closet. But now
some of them are finally coming out.

As Biden has revealed a shocking
secret regarding his presidential campaign.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

White House scandal
involving Hunter Biden has sent Washington, D.C. up in flames

The Biden family is
full of corruption. There's nothing they won't do to for more
power.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden insulted
millions of Americans with this disgusting comment

It's clear that the
president doesn't hold U.S. citizens in high regard. He and his
administration have been working to make their lives more
difficult.
➞ Continue Reading

Democrat Congresswoman
under investigation for one heinous act caught on camera

The Left is used to
getting away with their crimes. But thus one isn't getting away
that easily.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: America faces an axis of aggression
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/educationstandards-11572786?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**America faces an axis of aggression.** China, Russia, Iran and North Korea are not only actively undermining US interests. They increasingly seem to be working together.

**How should America respond?**

**According to a new report published by Mississippi Senator, Roger Wicker, America needs a new national defense strategy capable of responding to this “emerging axis of aggressors”.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=582f31d734&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image to read the report_
| “ _21 st Century Peace Through Strength: a generational investment in the US military_” offers a serious analysis of US military capabilities and makes some important recommendations.

**Wicker calls for an immediate $55 billion increase in military spending in 2025, on top of the almost $900 billion existing budget.** The aim, he suggests, should be for the United States to spend around 5 percent of GDP on defense.

To put that in context, America today spends 3.4 GDP percent on defense, and has not spent more than 5 percent since Ronald Reagan was in the White House. Reagan famously won the Cold War, facing down the Soviet threat by beefing up American strength. Wicker envisions a similar approach in “Peace through Strength”.

**What is really interesting about Wicker’s proposal is not the call for more money for the military, but his suggestion that there should be a “dramatic increase in competition in the defense industrial base”.**

Senator Wicker is right. Often, we think of applying free market principles to education or healthcare. There is a very powerful argument for applying free market discipline to defense spending, too.

**With the national debt growing, it is vital that America gets the maximum bang for every defense buck. **Wicker puts forward ideas as to how to make this happen through far reaching “acquisition reform”.

**Allowing more market competition in the defense sector would help ensure that America avoided the sorry fate of my own native Britain.**

The UK spends about $70 billion a year on defense. That might be less than a tenth of what America spends, but it still means that the UK has the sixth largest defense budget in the world, above Japan and roughly on a parr with Russia.

**Unfortunately, Britain has not been effective at converting what she is able to spend on defense into military muscle.** Despite spending all that money, British aircraft carriers seldom seem to carry many aircraft. Indeed, the expensive new carriers don’t always seem to be able to spend much time at sea. The less said about British tanks the better.

UK defense acquisition has been a series of costly disasters because the defense budget is often spent in the interests of various favored suppliers, rather than the military.

**I first became aware of quite how bad British defense acquisition was on a visit to Afghanistan as a Member of the British Parliament.** Troops in Helmand complained about a shortage of helicopters, yet I noticed rows of American Black Hawk helicopters on the runway back in Kandahar.****
---
|
---
_Asking about helicopters in Afghanistan_
| **Why, I wanted to know, didn’t we Brits just buy Black Hawks from the American company that made them?** I soon discovered that British defence acquisition is viewed by some as a giant job creation scheme. Or else it is about filling the order books of well-connected companies, not giving the military what they need.

**America needs acquisition reform to avoid defense dollars being spent by various vested interests, rather than on the best interests of the US military. **

Some will say that America cannot afford to increase defense spending. I worry that America cannot afford not to.

**Years of federal deficits mean than the US national debt is soaring. There will be enormous pressures on federal spending. All the more reason to ensure that the US gets maximum value for every defense dollar.**

Let’s hope Wicker’s reforms are acted upon whoever is in the White House.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=29271f07c2&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=475225d06e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=475225d06e).

body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW1mc9yWN2
My brand-new book - Right Wing Revolution: How to Beat the Woke
and Save the West - has just been released…and I want you
to be one of the FIRST...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW1mc9yWN2

Friend,

My
brand-new book - Right Wing Revolution: How to Beat the Woke and
Save the West - has just been released…

…and I want you to be one of the FIRST to get your hands
on a FREE copy of this must-read guide to WINNING the American
Culture War!

Friend,
will you claim your FREE copy of Right Wing Revolution today? All
I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount, even just $5, to
help support Turning Point USA.

Claim
your FREE book now

I was
HONORED when President Donald Trump posted the following on X,
with my emphasis added:

"Great
Patriot Charlie Kirk, Head of Turning Point USA, has a wonderful
new Book coming out next week, 'RIGHT WING REVOLUTION.' It is a
MUST READ for those who want to take our Country back from the
Radical Left Lunatics who are destroying it. This will be very
helpful reading for those looking to Save our Nation."

Friend,
you can understand why I want as many grassroots patriots as
possible to receive and read Right Wing Revolution right away!

That's
why I'm making you a special offer: Make a gift of ANY amount to
Turning Point USA today, and I'll rush you a FREE copy of Right
Wing Revolution.

Claim
your FREE book now

I wrote
Right Wing Revolution to provide a BOLD PLAN and a PRACTICAL
GUIDE to taking on the "Woke" Left - and WINNING the American
Culture War.

Because
as I've seen from 10+ years of traveling to schools from coast to
coast - speaking with THOUSANDS of young people and reaching
MILLIONS more online - the "Woke" Left has nearly completed the
TOTAL DESTRUCTION of our shared American values, our history, and
our way of life through their vicious lies.

With
Right Wing Revolution as our guide, I truly believe that the
Turning Point USA movement can take back our SCHOOLS, our
CULTURE, and our COUNTRY with a restoration of FREEDOM and
PATRIOTISM.

Please
don't miss your chance to receive a FREE copy of Right Wing
Revolution. All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount, even
$5, to help support the incredible work of Turning Point USA to
make kids LOVE AMERICA again!

Claim
your FREE book now

Working
together, we have already launched a revolution among young
people - along with GENERATIONAL CHANGE in favor of AMERICAN
GREATNESS - and now it's time to go EVEN BIGGER!

Friend,
Right Wing Revolution isn't just another book warning about the
dangers of racist, sexist, hateful, Marxist "Woke" ideology.

Instead,
it's a comprehensive BATTLE PLAN to defeating the "Woke" Left and
WINNING the American Culture War.

Please
claim your FREE copy of Right Wing Revolution right away by
making your gift of ANY amount, even just $5, to help support
Turning Point USA.

Thank YOU
for your support of Turning Point USA and your PATRIOTISM and
MORAL COURAGE.

For
America,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

Claim
your FREE book now

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

The article’s timing and tone are no coincidence.
A week after wrongfully being kept off the presidential debate stage, the DNC political machine is trying to destroy RFK Jr.! They will stop at nothing to smear his character and divert attention from the real issues at hand.

# **Mom is Furious at Rochester Community Schools In Michigan For Indoctrinating Her 8 Year Old Daughter**
SHOCKING: Click on the image to watch the interview
---
| | [ ](https://9l762.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0fV3Ji0XTonBupr9Lp/olbaEGdS4son)
---
Like many of you, I used to think that what we see and hear coming out of California schools doesn’t happen in Michigan. But over the past year and a half, I’ve shown time and again that Michigan public schools are pushing the same unacceptable agendas. Why are we even having these conversations? Do we really have to expose these schools and school boards for keeping things from parents, or stand up against them force-feeding our children a specific cultural ideology? The answer is a resounding yes. Elections at every level have extreme consequences. As parents and community members, we have only a few options:1\. Sit back and take it.
2\. Run for school board or any other local office to inspire change.
3\. Get behind and support those who decide to run for office. We must act now. Our children’s futures depend on it. Keep your head on a swivel!-Garrett
