name: Hung Cao
subject: You’ll want in on this ride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVee9HTwN63lUbATVswQCxTaz5xEUJMZoC0V1DakChHMwWWjd2NHe73BBgdk2QZUodESgs8-oT0IfVMy-Xy2RRu0qp2bYEA-e30Kt-GdSWkz6bVAn6iZGpG_M_3n4dRDTLccqbw2AoXN75dT-eFr1d9kU%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, My name is Hung Cao. I am a retired Navy Captain who served for 25 years in Special Operations. I served on the front lines defusing bombs for our SEAL teams and Special Forces; I also conducted some of the most dangerous deep dives in the military.
---
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVeTdj-M1i1Z1s7_LVp1aafBWwGRZy36yJh_WfBhcvkwqpj6OqnkrYeIc_TbNQAFRfqhHVC9rLbhv34r5hOAoASwoujYaSJzcjQoAgaTVTtHmieiHOEKfK0IJNda4JdktgL2tdnvvu6Rf9tbB9q8GDk0I%3D)
---
I was inspired to serve because America gave me everything. **My family escaped Communist Vietnam to the United States after the fall of Saigon. **
---
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVeUJcZyGTTiQvtObsg-pBUi5NIRtcs-RUSiOIYg5R-mjZodxXqT3bct8VPmT0XpDzMIeYj4Rq7yYGLcwOIJG8REssS1S_4yZ1S-9I-rPuvhQENvbxceUh5z-1zDtBBB6Pum7MkYEEK1ks9wDLms0SjZ0%3D)
---
_If it wasn 't for America, I probably wouldn't be alive today. _

**I answered the call to duty when I was appointed to the Naval Academy as a young man. Now, I 'm answering the call of duty to Americans once again. _But my new mission is a little different._**
---
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVedn5NkAyFXa0GjiTRgSeJtnPUPDo9C3xNpGHckQzQy4ejzVRZapPcqU2YTa7yWftef05e49JrycZrq1CQO6M0SMpyfSuTSX6RjymY2YbFCvLaLgmWnM8svvL7ZbdFcIm4JygyJKbe1IhhNoF06512Ao%3D)
---
**I****' m now the OFFICIAL GOP nominee running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia because our voters believe our country needs true conservative leaders who put service over self.**

[**In the general election, I need an A-team of patriots by my side if we****'****re going to bring my opponent, otherwise known as Hillary Clinton****'****s VP pick, Tim Kaine****'****s decades-long political career to an end. Will you step up and join our team today?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVeYSzYrcY018rIwHgR_qIHYCgqM7is682IeP7V3j5PUvjHT32cTPiCnkF8oxqfMpCDju4lSaVNNonWvF1MC_yy8UM7ZNFb5UO5wSuEU6xkub3xl8r96pxcMZJr4UZG0WvfSuP3pghc1umCEfEjEQ7kb8%3D)
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVeTGXdSq5yuuJMyjH3U2idiFuspEECCPYFcA6Y-E2J_HJXIVTIBgmKldpq26M3eBKZ9DFi4Y1Mjoy0fXeH0CVacDmKGIBR6WnxbxasIwzmZU3E-zR6xq_WxKYKTqhhbGG4BGB9Cja_oqTUN5yGvLKjz0%3D)
---
[**SEND A NAVY VETERAN TO THE U.S. SENATE**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVeXrSt-SeetvkSHdKRFrno1FXfYw6S2dSzk8SQsTd8-ibnBVb8l5qXgYNL9s991uUHy1MbWJJEaooaJAzysQT2NS0O5E-PeL4A0j5K26lROevIybXMMCJcZZRwpiZ7ApvX1FKkWtRHHMKzqK4PjzA5zc%3D)
---
I put my life on the line for our American values and freedom because I know that America is worth defending.

_But today, career politicians like Tim_ _" Hillary" Kaine are eroding the very liberties my fellow troops and I risked the ultimate sacrifice for. _They've lost sight of what matters and are more interested in playing political games than serving the people they're supposed to represent.

_**Now, I 'm stepping up because we need a change.**_

**_I fought for this country once, taking on terrorists face to face - I 'm certainly not afraid to take on establishment politicians. _**

We need strong leaders who will put the hardworking American people before special interests and the Clinton family insiders.

I've made a commitment to our country before, and now, I'm ready to make a new one as a U.S. Senator.

**I 'm not done with my mission for America, and I need your help to finish it. I'm asking humbly: [will you chip in $5, $10, or $25 today to support our mission to take back the U.S. Senate and take out Hillary Clinton's last pawn in Washington?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVeX6oaXDG0s_5Bvj9iRyJlGUBVyYuxR5tDhwWPBX4BocQO--dU1B7doEOqLsu7O0r7QCiDF5SXzwcVrfbOcdJH6QPd-KaabKL8UZCq0lGpwiDh6ddDWHSjJtpaJXJdcK6L8aY_PnWIhDvQVYQhcPjMos%3D)**
---
[**STAND WITH ME TODAY >>>**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=59ccbb496d5542a6ba9c651a34d340ea&_e=2tFHVZfSnYixdBCZzstxHKkLhjvjN9kTSQbFIuluM888r2r_TlfpnKLMcqb0Eqo8V1fDw5XAm3aHJJMCjXHYHmHad1N_bZhy9FdCDLaFKQ4UmyX4ZU3puksIduFDU576Bg0AoxDpugYC-_Gy43uVeRlsDFvwJqrtuevbFM_dz1ihOC4KicZT9MSuH6ODUgzTVAt-LAySmfMdGog_C8qOv6zmP71WS2sr6UkGQUA47-VynjRRL1EmsQfghD97AZiPFR4Zqy1sPCtnWfapfuO7ivSiina5IJR_mBg-gsZ41pg%3D)
---
Answer this call to duty with me and let's get America back on track.

clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, My name is Hung Cao. I am a retired Navy Captain who served for 25 years in Special Operations. I served on the front lines defusing bombs for our SEAL teams and Special Forces; I also conducted some of the most dangerous deep dives in the military. I was inspired to serve because America gave me everything. My family escaped Communist Vietnam to the United States after the fall of Saigon. If it wasn 't for America, I probably wouldn't be alive today. I answered the call to duty when I was appointed to the Naval Academy as a young man. Now, I 'm answering the call of duty to Americans once again. But my new mission is a little different. I' m now the OFFICIAL GOP nominee running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia because our voters believe our country needs true conservative leaders who put service over self. I put my life on the line for our American values and freedom because I know that America is worth defending. But today, career politicians like Tim " Hillary" Kaine are eroding the very liberties my fellow troops and I risked the ultimate sacrifice for. They've lost sight of what matters and are more interested in playing political games than serving the people they're supposed to represent. Now, I 'm stepping up because we need a change. I fought for this country once, taking on terrorists face to face - I 'm certainly not afraid to take on establishment politicians. We need strong leaders who will put the hardworking American people before special interests and the Clinton family insiders. I've made a commitment to our country before, and now, I'm ready to make a new one as a U.S. Senator. I 'm not done with my mission for America, and I need your help to finish it. I'm asking humbly: Answer this call to duty with me and let's get America back on track. Thank you, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he's lived it. Now, he's running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he's not done fighting for our future. If you're on board for our fight for Virginia, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Democrats.org
subject: Trump’s July
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This is going to be one of the most important months of the election.
---
July. This is going to be one of the most important months of the election -- and it is going to be the collective response of Democrats everywhere that will determine its impact. This month Donald Trump will name his VP nominee. He will accept his party's nomination at the Republican National Convention. Then, just a few weeks later, people will start voting. If history is any guide, this will be a month of extraordinary fundraising for Donald Trump and the RNC. But if we can withstand July, then it's our turn -- with our convention and all of the benefits that come with our time in the spotlight. But we have to withstand July. Trump just launched his first general election ads with more to come. So we're counting on Democrats from across the country to chip in at this critical moment. [**Can Joe Biden and Democrats running for office everywhere count on you to contribute $7 to the Democratic National Committee today? clean_body: This is going to be one of the most important months of the election. July. body:
Mitch McConnell is stepping down as the Republican Leader in November

| | |
---
|

Fellow Conservative: Mitch McConnell is stepping down as the Republican Leader in November and it's time to build a conservative majority in the Senate that will truly fight for our values without making excuses. **The best way to send principled leaders to Washington is to donate to their campaigns through the Senate Conservatives Fund.** You can contribute to multiple candidates with a single online transaction and SCF will pay all fundraising expenses and processing fees. This will save these candidates a mountain of money, so they can use your contributions to win votes rather than to pay administrative costs. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Let’s talk.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)

Friend --
Let's take a moment to talk about these FEC fundraising deadlines and the emails that are probably severely clogging your inbox about them.
Because of Michigan's early August primary, we have an FEC fundraising deadline in less than two weeks. That means we're once again legally required to report our numbers when it ends.
Those reports are also made public and I can tell you from experience that a lot of people are looking at them. The press looks, our opponents look, potential outside spending operations look...
They want to see the strength of our campaign financially. They want to see if we have small-dollar grassroots support that is sustainable in a way large donations are not. And critically, some of the big-money super PACs want to see if we're vulnerable to an attack we can't afford to respond to.
So these very real deadlines are important. They are not like the fake deadlines that you see from a lot of other campaigns (never ours.) And it's why every donation made in response to emails like this one matters. That's why we ask so much.
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3 (or more if you can) before our pre-primary FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close? Believe me, I would not be asking if it were not so important.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-july24.5Fk0a0&refcode=em240706-2-400&t=2&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-july24.w0O6uM&amount=3&refcode=em240706-2-400&t=21&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-july24.iUEZqY&refcode=em240706-2-400&t=22&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-july24.nM1t-a&refcode=em240706-2-400&t=23&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-july24.43c0OA&refcode=em240706-2-400&t=24&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-july24.zAhOqa&refcode=em240706-2-400&t=25&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-july24.w0O6uM&refcode=em240706-2-400&t=26&akid=1621%2E135344%2ETKtvbq)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for contributing before this deadline. It means a lot to me personally.
Elissa

P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

Federal Court Lifted Biden’s Natural Gas Exports Pause, But The Feds
May Not Be ‘Lifting A Finger’ Anytime Soon

The Biden administration does not appear to have any intention of
approving new liquified natural gas (LNG) export hubs despite a Monday
ruling from a federal court that lifted the policy, according to

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Criminals over cops?
body:
I know you and I have never met. But I’m praying that you’ll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

Dear friend,

I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

This is a picture of Terence and me at a dinner celebrating his graduation from the Police Academy.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Z06NGjrPjRX72lgtjbJX3A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82YjcxOWQ1Yy1hZDJmLTQxYjItODQwNy05YWFmNjZhMDM2NWI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmZ9pkOJZguNJGFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
I was so proud that night. But I was also terrified.

Terence was going to be patrolling the streets of Washington, DC, where crime is sky-high and politicians side with criminals over cops. But never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **- murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.**

The story is so shocking that if it didn't happen to my son, _I wouldn 't even believe it._ **[And I'm praying you will help me save my son](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Z06NGjrPjRX72lgtjbJX3A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82YjcxOWQ1Yy1hZDJmLTQxYjItODQwNy05YWFmNjZhMDM2NWI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmZ9pkOJZguNJGFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** - **but first, let me explain what happened.**

Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long - including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he had been seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

So when Terence saw him illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull Karon over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

And then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death.

The pressure campaign worked, and prosecutors charged my son with _**Second-Degree Murder.**_

When Terence called to tell me about the charges, I was in disbelief. Any sane person could see that Karon's death, while tragic, was no one's fault but his own.

_He_ chose to run from the cops.

_He_ chose to not wear a helmet.

_He_ chose to speed through that alley without looking where he was going.

So, when I learned that Terence could be sentenced to **_sixty_ _years_** in prison for Karon's death, my head started spinning. And it only got worse when the trial began.

You see, the judge refused to allow Terence's legal team to present all of the facts in his defense.

The jury never got to hear that Karon was a known member of a violent gang...

They never got to hear that he was wearing an ankle monitor because of a violent assault he had committed just weeks before...

They never got to hear that he had drugs and thousands of dollars in cash strapped to his leg...

And they never got to hear about the drugs in Karon's system at the time of the crash.

Sitting in the courtroom, I couldn't believe my ears when the jury filed out and declared Terence _**" guilty."**_

He's currently awaiting sentencing.

Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them.

He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

And at the same time the bleeding-heart DC politicians are letting shoplifters, carjackers, and drug dealers walk away scot-free...

...they're trying to put my son - a decorated officer who has received 60 awards and commendations - away for 60 years for something he _didn 't_ _do._

I had almost lost hope, but then we learned about the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** -or LELDF for short.

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment.

Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone:

**[Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Z06NGjrPjRX72lgtjbJX3A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82YjcxOWQ1Yy1hZDJmLTQxYjItODQwNy05YWFmNjZhMDM2NWI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmZ9pkOJZguNJGFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left.

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now.

I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

**[So if you are at all able, would you consider following this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Z06NGjrPjRX72lgtjbJX3A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82YjcxOWQ1Yy1hZDJmLTQxYjItODQwNy05YWFmNjZhMDM2NWI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmZ9pkOJZguNJGFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

**Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive.

**[And you and your $35 contribution could make the difference in Terence being acquitted or spending the next 60 years behind bars.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Z06NGjrPjRX72lgtjbJX3A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82YjcxOWQ1Yy1hZDJmLTQxYjItODQwNy05YWFmNjZhMDM2NWI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmZ9pkOJZguNJGFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence.

Sincerely,

Patti Reilly

P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. **[So if you choose to make a $35 gift to LELDF, would you also please include a little note-maybe a prayer?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Z06NGjrPjRX72lgtjbJX3A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi82YjcxOWQ1Yy1hZDJmLTQxYjItODQwNy05YWFmNjZhMDM2NWI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNzA2X0JER19MRUxERl9TTUxQX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmZ9pkOJZguNJGFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ax5uXeTV79O9II52GkgTmw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saWNlZGVmZW5zZS5vcmcvVwNzcGNCCmZ9pkOJZguNJGFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

US Conservative Network
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MZrP5rdXZ64utn0_T-bKtg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQudXNjb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVuZXR3b3JrLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZn2mQ4lmC40kYVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/m7c9r040KyjYuOJc0FlTeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoa9msP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZW5ldHdvcmsuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmfaZDiWYLjSRhUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment. Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone: To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now. I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence. Sincerely, Patti Reilly P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~

Kari Lake only lost by less than 20,000 votes in 2022. Trump lost by just 10,000 votes here in 2020. We’ve got to campaign like Arizona is the closest state in the country right now — because it is.
#
]
Peter, we’re writing to ask you for $5.
Yes, just $5.
$5 because Arizona is the frontline in the battle for the future of our democracy.
$5 because if we defeat Kari Lake in Arizona we are that much closer to defending our majority in the U.S. Senate.
$5 because if we lose in Arizona, the Republican Party WILL take back the U.S. Senate.
And $5 because if we’re going to defeat Trump nationwide, we have to stop him in Arizona first.
Kari Lake only lost by less than 20,000 votes in 2022. Trump lost by just 10,000 votes here in 2020. We’ve got to campaign like Arizona is the closest state in the country right now — because it is.
We won’t rest until we’ve taken back Arizona’s Senate seat and defeated Donald Trump. We will not stop until we know our democracy is safe. But Ruben can’t do this alone.

Former President Donald Trump’s prior attorney on Monday told CNN that
the Supreme Court’s ruling on immunity also shields President Joe
Biden from prosecution. The Supreme Court found that presidents have
immunity from criminal prosecution for “official acts” taken in office
after Trump’s appeal to dismiss special counsel Jack Smith’s election
interference case against him.

The Supreme Court found that presidents have immunity from criminal prosecution for “official acts” taken in office after Trump’s appeal to dismiss special counsel Jack Smith’s election interference case against him. | | |
---
Friend, I just stepped out of an important campaign meeting, and, well, I won't sugarcoat it: **Right as the election year heats up, a recent poll shows me _statistically tied_ with my Trump-backed opponent.**
The good news is that we still have time to turn things around – but only with the grassroots support of folks like you, friend. **My team crunched the numbers, and we need to raise $250,000 in the next 48 hours to help us get back on track.** [**That's why I'm personally asking, friend, will you make your first gift now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88367964/483869508/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2149-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRmOGM4Ny05YzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHcboicT-OIgrbM15xhLTcMv0TkAyrBqE1mZu5jLBrs=)
I wouldn't ask if it weren’t urgent. The fate of the Senate hangs in the balance as the MAGA establishment attacks us from all sides. Mitch McConnell _personally_ named me a top target for defeat, my Trump-backed, self-funding opponent dumped $4.5 million of his own money into this race, and GOP super PACs are flooding Ohio with dark money. **They're doing everything they can to defeat me because they know this race could decide Senate control.**
All our progress, including our fight for the Dignity of Work, is in serious jeopardy if we let them get away with buying this seat. _NBC News_ reports this could be one of the most expensive races of the cycle, and it's going to take resources to fight back against the GOP's attacks. **I'm counting on your grassroots support to help me reach this $250,000 goal. Falling short simply is not an option.**
[**So, friend, we've got less than 48 hours to make magic happen. Please, will you rush $5 right now to help us win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88367965/483869516/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2149-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWRmOGM4Ny05YzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHcboicT-OIgrbM15xhLTcMv0TkAyrBqE1mZu5jLBrs=)

body:
| [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14380763.5821.1.7cb707270f3dd54d3de7df05cb253dfc)
---
Friend,
---
Our free Republic is crumbling before our very eyes!
---
President Trump has been _**WRONGLY**_ _**CONVICTED**_ of a crime as an innocent man – and now, Biden and his allies are threatening to send him to **__JAIL!__**
---
_All because he’s the only presidential candidate in recent memory with the courage to stand up to the corrupt liberal establishment and fight for the American people!_
---
To defeat this tyrannical plot to **_STEAL_** the 2024 election, we’re going to need every patriot to fight by our side all the way through November 8th.
---
_That’s what makes headlines like this so distressing..._
---
**_NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS “REPUBLICAN” HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE_**
---
**As House GOP Chair, I’m working to verify as many voter profiles as possible to ensure we have the support we need to defeat Biden and the Radical Left in November.**
---
_So, I have just one question for you today, Friend..._
---
**_Are _YOU_ still with us? _**
---
[** >> If we still have your support, please complete the Official Voter Verification Survey today to ensure your records are up-to-date and to share your top priorities << **](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14380763.5822.1.dfbe40fceda37c793655be81889925e9)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=14380763.5823.1.d49141a180f530681042ea6697432b22)
---
Rep. Elise Stefanik
House Republican Conference Chair

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Senate Democrats are Fighting Climate Change
body:
Defending the Senate is key to a lot of important issues, including climate change.
| | | | | |
---
# Senate Democrats are Fighting Climate Change
---
|
---
Defending the Senate is crucial because Democrats are leading significant efforts to combat climate change, a pressing issue impacting every state, industry, and American. Senators like Tammy Baldwin, who is up for re-election and serves on the climate change committee, have been instrumental in driving progress. Over the last four years, this committee has become one of the most effective in history, pushing for ambitious actions to address the climate crisis. Every state in the union is feeling the effects of climate change, and it is clear that every industry and business is affected. Republicans in the Senate have been slow to accept, let alone propose, real solutions. That’s why the work of this Special Committee in the Senate is essential.
---
|
---
You can make a real difference in defending the Senate this November with No Dem Left Behind. One donation goes to 4 different battleground fights in the Senate, and it can go a long way towards fighting climate change. Their work focuses on understanding how inaction on climate change harms the U.S.'s economic and national security interests and how taking action presents significant opportunities for job creation, public health, and the economy. By keeping the Senate blue, we can continue this vital progress and work towards a sustainable future. Let's ensure we maintain this momentum by supporting leaders like Tammy Baldwin and other Senate Democrats committed to addressing climate change.
---
| | | | | [→ Defend the Senate](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2u09j0-e1pvar-kyd76rh2/)
---
Thank you for joining us in this important fight. — No Dem Left Behind

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Democracy is on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
**Democracy is on the line this November, Peter, and it all hinges on Pennsylvania.**
Bob Casey is fighting in the most difficult race of his time as Senator and needs your support. That’s why I’m writing to you today.
As you read this email, democratic values such as reproductive rights and environmental protections are being threatened by David McCormick and his GOP allies.
They care **so little** about people like you and me and are willing to strip us of our rights and tear down our government to get what they want. They’ll implement whatever policies they can to protect **their own self-interests.**
Peter, the tables are turning rapidly as the Pennsylvania race continues to tighten. Bob’s opponent is self-funding his campaign and has the full backing of Wall Street billionaires.
Meanwhile, Bob Casey is relying on people like you, Peter to donate $5 or $10 when you can. It’s the only way he’ll be able to win in November. [**Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help re-elect Bob and fight for our democratic values?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240706-1?refcode=em20240706-1&recurring=1&refcode2=3481_552475_oKhBdG&akid=3481%2E552475%2EoKhBdG)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240706-1?refcode=em20240706-1&recurring=1&refcode2=3481_552475_oKhBdG&akid=3481%2E552475%2EoKhBdG)**
There is no time to sit idly by and watch this race go down. Instead, we need to give all of our support to Bob Casey in this competitive race immediately. That’s why I’ll be traveling east to Pennsylvania — to fight for Bob and for democracy. I know that, together, we can rally to save our country and keep Pennsylvania blue.
I can’t emphasize this enough, the future of our democracy is on the line. [**Join me in the fight to preserve our democracy by donating to Bob Casey’s campaign today, Peter.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240706-1?refcode=em20240706-1&recurring=1&refcode2=3481_552475_oKhBdG&akid=3481%2E552475%2EoKhBdG)

Gavin Newsom

**[Join us to tell your members of Congress to impeach the extremists on our Supreme Court for betraying our democracy!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39XlKciIGm-e9k7PiXF3aVaqnNiRpk-_oFc62xDbLmIFOmqBUWteeHrT-9-sqe2YJ1W2R54AGM5lctYH2CT8fXZLHC-Ve_XBMwXA2eCMUpmnKgKC5RDzzBFW-kj9BK0gMERNr96-rrN00Y9IAPn_p5Ha0js6pvGddZ5DEpZkAbqLnFZ4dsHlNgBdqTyqMN5lqwVEuWxIboP7GK2XB_fvUGHY9HsBpb6K7_j31RXstt2J1wNVC4TxIA_p0jDmNkUNmazL9yLQ7GIgC4_SjCxCK4OrOodMnK0-lt9hIqSRv0Y9WEjTSVocy-QQHeyLYAgLPKSBDYEBsWofIJyFkqcBG6ls6sisWrulYG8xrm6YLVqwiGrb4c8n4d2I-TaH1Cel7SbqL6Q-uE8TYeNBVYJ6NY2OwrTONJjoVV_JJ142X4tw1FFa-GLesWZvmyirNGUWdJ4Ly8D-gGRK8mXbyFz1gw8uLuepYqgaGacOa68f92JnpwxcHMM690KX6AqVEt0MqE/47t/MaCgszS_SSuQLdY25MG28A/h0/h001.tE1qJPZGOERIUgSs6wlgsHSGUmqYn4ozAZAKgbNGdOk)**

* * *
Our Constitution does NOT shield a former President from answering for criminal and treasonous acts, but the extremists on our Supreme Court just did in an absolute betrayal to American voters and our democracy. The Supreme Court has ruled that “the President is now a king above the law” and ensured Trump will not face another trial prior to the 2024 election, if he faces one at all. **Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York has just said she will be introducing articles of impeachment. We need a groundswell of support.** **[Sign ON and tell your members of Congress to defend our nation from the authoritarian and corrupt behavior of our MAGA Supreme Court and IMPEACH them!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39XlKciIGm-e9k7PiXF3aVaqnNiRpk-_oFc62xDbLmIFOmqBUWteeHrT-9-sqe2YJ1W2R54AGM5lctYH2CT8fXZLHC-Ve_XBMwXA2eCMUpmnKgKC5RDzzBFW-kj9BK0gMERNr96-rrN00Y9IAPn_p5Ha0js6pvGddZ5DEpZkAbqLnFZ4dsHlNgBdqTyqMN5lqwVEuWxIboP7GK2XB_fvUGHY9HsBpb6K7_j31RXstt2J1wNVC4TxIA_p0jDmNkUNmazL9yLQ7GIgC4_SjCxCK4OrOodMnK0-lt9hIqSRv0Y9Vds1CkfAinf_P9PPTiSggYIFpmrg5_NAY2qu_AIq05x-0kRh5fFp3dCm38ZkVsho2xYUCb_tOCYeEZIX3UZoaLmJDURaLjHJgWwMz-9C01VHfOMq2XkcxWrkrGiTz3Ah-zb1oKzkOfVL8aR47uskn4mz9lJPQNbwIVGo1YjCJ9OIU_Z-nMMMHJ1QTd-TWhF5jMLQeTb7PxX9tQ5A38bq3I/47t/MaCgszS_SSuQLdY25MG28A/h1/h001.KKVj4ABJOO5AzXPf590caoOBsUNPWV_eGNVUBEVwLHw)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39XlKciIGm-e9k7PiXF3aVaqnNiRpk-_oFc62xDbLmIFOmqBUWteeHrT-9-sqe2YJ1W2R54AGM5lctYH2CT8fXZLHC-Ve_XBMwXA2eCMUpmnKgKC5RDzzBFW-kj9BK0gMERNr96-rrN00Y9IAPn_p5Ha0js6pvGddZ5DEpZkAbqLnFZ4dsHlNgBdqTyqMN5lqwVEuWxIboP7GK2XB_fvUGHY9HsBpb6K7_j31RXstt2J1wNVC4TxIA_p0jDmNkUNmazL9yLQ7GIgC4_SjCxCK4OrOodMnK0-lt9hIqSRv0Y9bbfxxjCtx-weEjnuH_7mJ4AxuowIn5kaF2MOxvi5epWuwk8rOwjylxC_h3bOunoJoPXt_p2Hh2Fri38SdPIwR2hWZHwEtKriATYVhONwk6Xy7e4acpSfkkKAH47XOY6nOo21Se7nrXdDoQGa85jzgl5GO7xY-HlKk4nVYOh0JyzQUK_dLc0ehxkYl0h0BCb93FnIZxdqQpgD5Gm7gCGoVU/47t/MaCgszS_SSuQLdY25MG28A/h2/h001.BjA-5F7bPrxwqCS5JiS_upBNu7zdL7iLZaz2ITzObEM)

In her dissent, liberal Justice Sonia Sotomayor said Trump’s hand picked MAGA Justices just “invented atextual, ahistorical, and unjustifiable immunity” and delayed if not denied any accountability from Trump for trying to overturn the free and fair 2020 election.
Justices on our highest court have taken millions of dollars in bribes, overturned decades of precedent, and lied to the American people when they said they wouldn’t overturn _Roe v. Wade_. The damage that this Court has done will be felt for decades.
**We don’t want a king!**
**[Tell Congress to impeach the corrupt kingmakers on the Supreme Court who refuse to protect our democracy and hold convicted felon Trump accountable for trying to overthrow it!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39XlKciIGm-e9k7PiXF3aVaqnNiRpk-_oFc62xDbLmIFOmqBUWteeHrT-9-sqe2YJ1W2R54AGM5lctYH2CT8fXZLHC-Ve_XBMwXA2eCMUpmnKgKC5RDzzBFW-kj9BK0gMERNr96-rrN00Y9IAPn_p5Ha0js6pvGddZ5DEpZkAbqLnFZ4dsHlNgBdqTyqMN5lqwVEuWxIboP7GK2XB_fvUGHY9HsBpb6K7_j31RXstt2J1wNVC4TxIA_p0jDmNkUNmazL9yLQ7GIgC4_SjCxCK4OrOodMnK0-lt9hIqSRv0Y9cfryhgghPV3_4GyShIrC3zK6eKGtgBLV0_P3TjwdhUchvRcQcdauyg-GPGHGkM_5tItD14rhFyhWyG18EBS8GlaLOKbTycj8iUAfElTWKWgDO71IFDVvomxzG80lPNbpl_ryib5qA01Ls0AI1T-9Ffpn2KLIDxrZrQNVCW_T-82MZgI6OnS7z3yUXGHdxXEJcbZXo997jaeX8SuEB_u3Y0/47t/MaCgszS_SSuQLdY25MG28A/h3/h001.6BnNJ9_B5miqwpIcogWGAMwMZe0PfVa-WOCme2wX6aA)**

name: NewDems
subject: re: last week's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
we must flip the House

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88369907/483875670/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjdjNTAyZi1hMDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qViPBjqQ0nZrCXHp45qqfyoi6Mg0MtQCXAsdezfL2sI=)
---
**At last week’s debate, Trump reminded us of what’s at stake.**

He’ll decimate abortion rights, gut our healthcare, destroy immigration, and throw the entire world into disarray.

_His judge appointments alone could have ramifications spanning decades._

This is why we NEED a Democratic House majority now more than ever.

Hi team! I’m Erin, NextGen’s Stewardship Officer. Nice to meet you!
It’s been a while since I’ve taken physics, but one lesson has stuck with me for a long time.
Newton’s First Law of Motion states that an object at rest will remain at rest unless acted upon by an outside force.
Or, put another way, **_nothing changes if we don’t take action._**
Voting rights will still be under attack if we don’t take action. Abortion and contraception access will continue to be undermined if we don’t take action. And Donald Trump and his cronies will continue dismantling our democracy if we don’t take action.
NextGen is mobilizing young voters across the country to take action against extremism. We’re doing everything we can to mobilize the largest, most diverse generation in history to fight for our future.
But frankly, we can’t do it without your support.
[Can we count on you to help us take action against extremism? Friend, **Rick Scott's vote to BLOCK the widely popular bill protecting access to contraception was unacceptable.**
So, I've been spreading the word about our grassroots movement to retire him on the national airwaves.**But even with all eyes on this race and our grassroots campaign closing in on Rick Scott's lead in the polls, I won't win at the ballot box without your urgent support to reach my $1 million goal before my weekly deadline tomorrow night.**
_**[Will you please chip in right away to help me stop Rick Scott, flip Florida's seat, and keep the Senate majority blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88370440/483877081/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1482-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0MDg1YmEtYTAzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8xDGaTGPm6hXiYu88-Zeb7_w0Nju35wZbJOJ66VXWhI=)**_
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88370441/483877082/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1482-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0MDg1YmEtYTAzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8xDGaTGPm6hXiYu88-Zeb7_w0Nju35wZbJOJ66VXWhI=)

**If you missed my news appearances, I've been working around the clock to ensure the nation knows how high the stakes are in Florida's race.**
I shared with _Good Morning America_ how gun violence altered the course of my life — like so many other Floridians — and underscored the urgency of _real_ gun safety reform in the face of our GOP state leaders' moral failure.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88370442/483877083/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1482-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0MDg1YmEtYTAzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8xDGaTGPm6hXiYu88-Zeb7_w0Nju35wZbJOJ66VXWhI=)
I joined Kasie Hunt at _CNN_ to call out Rick Scott's bald-faced lies about protecting access to IVF and birth control — _despite his refusal to vote in favor of laws that would._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88370443/483877084/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1482-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0MDg1YmEtYTAzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8xDGaTGPm6hXiYu88-Zeb7_w0Nju35wZbJOJ66VXWhI=)
And on _MSNBC_ , I stressed to Lawrence O'Donnell _how much worse_ a Scott-led Senate would be — for the future of Social Security and Medicare, abortion rights, and any hope for Congress passing effective, bipartisan legislation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88370444/483877085/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1482-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0MDg1YmEtYTAzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8xDGaTGPm6hXiYu88-Zeb7_w0Nju35wZbJOJ66VXWhI=)
In short, I made sure Americans across the country heard loud and clear:** Not only can we not afford a GOP Senate led by Rick Scott, we can't afford another term with his self-serving extremist agenda on Capitol Hill. **_Period**.**_

clean_body: Did you see me? | | | = Friend, Rick Scott's vote to BLOCK the widely popular bill protecting access to contraception was unacceptable. So, I've been spreading the word about our grassroots movement to retire him on the national airwaves.But even with all eyes on this race and our grassroots campaign closing in on Rick Scott's lead in the polls, I won't win at the ballot box without your urgent support to reach my $1 million goal before my weekly deadline tomorrow night. = | | = If you missed my news appearances, I've been working around the clock to ensure the nation knows how high the stakes are in Florida's race. I shared with Good Morning America how gun violence altered the course of my life — like so many other Floridians — and underscored the urgency of real gun safety reform in the face of our GOP state leaders' moral failure. = I joined Kasie Hunt at CNN to call out Rick Scott's bald-faced lies about protecting access to IVF and birth control — despite his refusal to vote in favor of laws that would. = And on MSNBC , I stressed to Lawrence O'Donnell how much worse a Scott-led Senate would be — for the future of Social Security and Medicare, abortion rights, and any hope for Congress passing effective, bipartisan legislation. = In short, I made sure Americans across the country heard loud and clear: Not only can we not afford a GOP Senate led by Rick Scott, we can't afford another term with his self-serving extremist agenda on Capitol Hill. Period. Now that I'm back home with this newfound national momentum, I'm more fired up than ever to retire Rick Scott. But frankly, friend, I can't go toe to toe with his self-funded campaign without your support to reach my vital $1 million end-of-week goal before tomorrow's can't-miss midnight deadline. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = I couldn't have gotten this far without support from people like you. Thank you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: Our nation’s history is unifying
body:
I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=8bbf03e555b94678963c31eed692a7e1&_t=S8rMaxPP_40PHdPeQnRxQJ5ufVg-rOWMHOITldvMhk3T21UuquyyFsWV93FxHSr6TAM-omXIWybmRhuwv4I-K-EVaEr3K4erziHY-X8_ZyjIBcYkt-HSiRk8BfZ-pF6E)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8bbf03e555b94678963c31eed692a7e1&_e=ClMMmWLxIQWYbBYBLimST0lBFYhtbChNUFW9-M97qhcTfvy7u7G1kKkJEm4z5GyZ--S_KPByvdbYp_fmneNfM1-CVqIwqmLzphMkd5ojjifpNvTb3jqMccxkEP77H9x0pKO-1AyvxOwhZ1MwRP1nLpwm4skHwN7QVWQEDCquA8EeI3i1iJjLwLEn2pbGSt66CkVcJpDZ8ManvNf3J8_tLN-5D5uX45TK66N8N6YiNWR69RlhP16dETTUonznr08Wld9EwNwCaU3U3xs4NqNnCZ8lh4W2fmw2A8Bg-WHsoinKSFqNJ_1zCGjQkmfKpI-u5gf22ASVowQrJmEGY9ky0-j3pZH_gXRyZ1UeAGKdBAtobk0Gyd-DSbepWhPnCMRN8px72Y2d6YG3Sld7sHubiPniCuLCInMTbB_6sP9JJcQ%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8bbf03e555b94678963c31eed692a7e1&_e=ClMMmWLxIQWYbBYBLimST0lBFYhtbChNUFW9-M97qhcTfvy7u7G1kKkJEm4z5GyZ--S_KPByvdbYp_fmneNfM1-CVqIwqmLzphMkd5ojjifpNvTb3jqMccxkEP77H9x0pKO-1AyvxOwhZ1MwRP1nLpwm4skHwN7QVWQEDCquA8EeI3i1iJjLwLEn2pbGSt66CkVcJpDZ8ManvNf3J8_tLN-5D5uX45TK66N8N6YiNWR69RlhP16dETTUonznr08Wld9EwNwCaU3U3xs4NqNnCfCCewaWtaQTTn6Qj56QpMHFbVPo3fbBMrXx2TUnvL_b_9RVbvygtT5VtHB3upPY2FJJduB3ajVWdf9xee0xdTIMUL2GSWrMWOXEnmsJAG3iKOAcMLX56kCG7QKmOIMKzE8UUNSqEwT8QlxhIekn7Ps%3D) studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8bbf03e555b94678963c31eed692a7e1&_e=ClMMmWLxIQWYbBYBLimST0lBFYhtbChNUFW9-M97qhcTfvy7u7G1kKkJEm4z5GyZ--S_KPByvdbYp_fmneNfM1-CVqIwqmLzphMkd5ojjifpNvTb3jqMccxkEP77H9x0pKO-1AyvxOwhZ1MwRP1nLpwm4skHwN7QVWQEDCquA8EeI3i1iJjLwLEn2pbGSt66CkVcJpDZ8ManvNf3J8_tLN-5D5uX45TK66N8N6YiNWR69RlhP16dETTUonznr08Wld9EwNwCaU3U3xs4NqNnCeEytdL-oPxaxi3B37EAhXnRIhe0OVOAjxWk2NcNWzPsCHigNCCIdGrKb50vBDnoPbFqQnsi5WL5EmQjCRaea5M4eI4KbG3t9riLLNsViWan1SxR_9Ezfvic7MZjCp19yurD8mldculnbrhsrtx98gU%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8bbf03e555b94678963c31eed692a7e1&_e=ClMMmWLxIQWYbBYBLimST0lBFYhtbChNUFW9-M97qhcTfvy7u7G1kKkJEm4z5GyZ--S_KPByvdbYp_fmneNfM1-CVqIwqmLzphMkd5ojjifpNvTb3jqMccxkEP77H9x0pKO-1AyvxOwhZ1MwRP1nLpwm4skHwN7QVWQEDCquA8EeI3i1iJjLwLEn2pbGSt66CkVcJpDZ8ManvNf3J8_tLN-5D5uX45TK66N8N6YiNWR69RlhP16dETTUonznr08Wld9EwNwCaU3U3xs4NqNnCdka2GZJHvEKDJePO4DPPlmXKODFyNaHK5J-BmhK5Blv8ASNMnOtuLnqLalGJ0pojhQfJXbkD8piZaetWrVM8nANu2klHKCwIsOKxqEizg1Yu5I4WFG23bGBiSlpxNd_7dAeae1BhtkuLQB86JnSmu4%3D) for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8bbf03e555b94678963c31eed692a7e1&_e=ClMMmWLxIQWYbBYBLimST0lBFYhtbChNUFW9-M97qhcTfvy7u7G1kKkJEm4z5GyZ--S_KPByvdbYp_fmneNfM1-CVqIwqmLzphMkd5ojjifpNvTb3jqMccxkEP77H9x0pKO-1AyvxOwhZ1MwRP1nLpwm4skHwN7QVWQEDCquA8EeI3i1iJjLwLEn2pbGSt66CkVcJpDZ8ManvNf3J8_tLN-5D5uX45TK66N8N6YiNWR69RlhP16dETTUonznr08Wld9EwNwCaU3U3xs4NqNnCXaWS67OzuIfgSTqHBsRtXZhAgPm4R-C3EmgrZrUqioXbbgGlz5742Y2BFll1KaNrN2EWR2zGvzgv1Q8vfIKJO9ZwfUGDs5m3nfNzzmb0nLNAnFj41hOZu3UAGnvyqVTXE9huaaNDv4Go24ebZf5b1k%3D) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=8bbf03e555b94678963c31eed692a7e1&_e=ClMMmWLxIQWYbBYBLimST0lBFYhtbChNUFW9-M97qhcTfvy7u7G1kKkJEm4z5GyZ--S_KPByvdbYp_fmneNfM1-CVqIwqmLzphMkd5ojjifpNvTb3jqMccxkEP77H9x0pKO-1AyvxOwhZ1MwRP1nLpwm4skHwN7QVWQEDCquA8EeI3i1iJjLwLEn2pbGSt66CkVcJpDZ8ManvNf3J8_tLN-5D5uX45TK66N8N6YiNWR69RlhP16dETTUonznr08Wld9EwNwCaU3U3xs4NqNnCVSNID2ONXzYu5eD1KQ--QG0EuJDNaw4X9x5cIxay75RTBdY7y9jOLm1_L41982Mv76p-KYKwESBqWxqJlE0l6oluU2tBlJRDsBAcuRTPIiQ7r1TWvpVGimr3JRKdeFnNxbQ9tsKzMJoxRZXet32hE4%3D) Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. |

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Cori needs our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter — Rep. Cori Bush’s primary
in MO-01 is on August 6th. That means we’ve got one month left.

One month to protect Cori from the same right-wing millionaires and
billionaires who unseated Jamaal Bowman.

One month to defeat Cori’s AIPAC-funded opponent, who previously worked
for a GOP anti-abortion extremist.

And one month to out-raise and out-organize the MAGA-backed opposition.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240706-cb.boNBHR&refcode=em20240706-35638&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=35638%2E1203867%2EnaG9tb ]But we need your help to get it done — can you split a donation of
$5 or more between Cori’s campaign and Justice Democrats
right now to fuel our work?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240706-cb.boNBHR&refcode=em20240706-35638&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1020&akid=35638%2E1203867%2EnaG9tb ]Contribute $5

Peter, this is
going to be a close race. If we’ve learned anything from the past few
weeks, it’s that we must take right-wing spending in our Democratic
primaries seriously. We’ve already lost one principled, progressive
champion for working people this summer. We’re not going to lose another.

Today is July 6th. Cori’s race is on August 6th. Between this week’s
disastrous Supreme Court decisions and the threat of another Trump
presidency on the horizon, we need Cori’s voice in Congress now more than
ever.

But with just one month left, it’s going to take an influx of grassroots
support to make sure that Cori has the resources to win this race.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240706-cb.boNBHR&refcode=em20240706-35638&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=35638%2E1203867%2EnaG9tb ]Split a donation of any amount between Cori’s campaign and Justice
Democrats today →

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240706-35638-footer&t=1022&refcode2=35638_1203867_naG9tb&akid=35638%2E1203867%2EnaG9tb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=35638%2E1203867%2EnaG9tb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Craig Brown, Joyce Craig’s Campaign Manager here (I know, I know....there’s a lot of Craigs on this team!).

June was a really exciting month for the campaign! We launched our first TV ad, held events throughout the state, and met thousands of voters.

[But campaigns aren’t cheap and we need your help to keep up the momentum. body:
6 words...

| [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b9a343e21bc94e729e380836e7124111&_e=5OI6ptGsF5MEmwgbMGB6F1Q4CRW3eYvqeK8tULFfbSN6AQa51ul353qwaOuulxoRh_sOB86sCQj9n85rLX-i77fIDe0qdtWhlb0eQiSfaQWMIfzTbDU1-ohJFK8iXMN5fT936xgJkKmpTNfthZo2tWd2lRokwccNXEeRWR3oz-XO9nxS8yufvY9w303lxxCadPwzpkAU8uGlyaTz3P8-RqGuY3xvC-zvm4q-d90en-vAp8dtli6fdfHZsvzBmcTGqKwBKBbqd1sbT1OVUHNVplC3v479ZBPqM6asceILk0FqYqX530QMu0andmaDtQo9rwvD4INHiZRwhbTki9bVbCG_JrBHnzusM6DW4NN0Zk9a7cORselL5-Rj2ukqs9GF0NByx7O-2FJPVjRZu3A5lg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

Let me tell you - I can barely contain my excitement.

_I just received some EXCELLENT news from one of my friends that brought me to tears._

****_I haven 't cried like this since 2019 when LSU beat Alabama. It's time to grab a box of tissues and cry some tears of joy because I'm about to give you some news that just might save our Red Wave._

Moses might have well parted the red sea a second time because this is a MIRACLE.

A Patriotic GODSEND has called and said the 6 words that every campaign wants to hear.

****"I'm offering you a 1300% match."**

body:
Today marks one month since Republicans in Congress voted against protecting access to contraceptives.

Leslie Mehta is a civil rights attorney, a mom, and a proud Democrat running to flip Virginia’s 1st Congressional District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/qilL9Kv-dUyGV2oDr4ABqg2?unsubscribedata=2hto%2Fo8nkkDm3LDiQqX9T6ipYKUIlFRyHYXEx%2B%2BIkNzXvu7NK8bhkVWX6m7%2F5jGwumppYrtgep%2Fb99jRxyKRc3xwLiymAu8YdtJtEqORXVFImq6Cdnmffr8eqPodUgdnrIi1rZu%2Fy%2FJshqskqlJSLM6rmK4%2FxpOlUjNu4Y4eIQaOT0hX89uinl9GvypdSWL5aIpt1hkZ09dIoh3JXojRTBVuFw3cSHVxKAIyMiL9jxQfD%2BWJPIz2xPKdr2stSr4WAnne8YgqgcO%2BhkVcpRuQCFUcWaKHABhlZuN2iY47bswG5GhWiywtsISbYrGWdhRedTMZ4673YtHuXZxlRZMGqwOhIjM6Sr%2BQ48%2BxIc%2FdKPe6y7Z6mzBIhZ5eDbxZApYEsFm9Lexu5ZQ4tb8OjMy6K1pfflLZMLmNXdF6hj9xCJPjPoDLSzOPtCsdc38ORIEH)

**Peter, today marks one month since Republicans in Congress voted against protecting access to contraceptives** — yet another of their shameful efforts to undermine women’s reproductive freedom across the country since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ 2 years ago. Let me be clear: this isn’t a partisan issue. 81% of voters support protecting safe and accessible contraception, but Congressional Republicans see things differently. And that includes **Rob Wittman, who’s voted time and time again to restrict women’s rights and undermine access to contraceptives.** This November will decide the fate of women’s bodily autonomy for years to come. [That’s why I’ve got to ask you:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88372712/483884254/1536798325?source=SBD_LM_EM_SV_070624_1_1_Contraception&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBlMDgwNWUtYTQzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uErhheq3njjpt1-VjSHe52VvYXKVgMv4D49Nw6dismA=&emci=4c699557-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e0e0805e-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=10020268) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88372713/483884255/1536798325?source=SBD_LM_EM_SV_070624_1_1_Contraception&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBlMDgwNWUtYTQzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uErhheq3njjpt1-VjSHe52VvYXKVgMv4D49Nw6dismA=&emci=4c699557-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e0e0805e-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=10020268) Just take a look at Wittman’s voting history:
* ❌ Voted NO for the Right to Contraception Act of 2022
* ❌ Voted NO for the Women's Health Protection Act of 2022
* ❌ Voted NO for the Ensuring Access to Abortion Act of 2022
* ❌ Voted NO for the Women's Health Protection Act of 2021

It’s clear that this is a career politician who’s NOT on the side of the very people he took an oath to represent. I mean, let’s be honest: **this is a man who’s been working in politics for over 37 years and has somehow failed to be on the right side of history for each and every one.** I think it’s about time we send him packing — but first, I’ve got to know: [Do you want your representative to vote in favor of a national abortion ban like Wittman is expected to do?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88372714/483884256/1536798325?source=SBD_LM_EM_SV_070624_1_1_Contraception&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBlMDgwNWUtYTQzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uErhheq3njjpt1-VjSHe52VvYXKVgMv4D49Nw6dismA=&emci=4c699557-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e0e0805e-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=10020268) | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88372715/483884257/1536798325?source=SBD_LM_EM_SV_070624_1_1_Contraception&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBlMDgwNWUtYTQzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uErhheq3njjpt1-VjSHe52VvYXKVgMv4D49Nw6dismA=&emci=4c699557-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e0e0805e-a43b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=10020268)

clean_body: Today marks one month since Republicans in Congress voted against protecting access to contraceptives. Leslie Mehta is a civil rights attorney, a mom, and a proud Democrat running to flip Virginia’s 1st Congressional District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, today marks one month since Republicans in Congress voted against protecting access to contraceptives — yet another of their shameful efforts to undermine women’s reproductive freedom across the country since the overturning of Roe v. Wade 2 years ago. Let me be clear: this isn’t a partisan issue. 81% of voters support protecting safe and accessible contraception, but Congressional Republicans see things differently. And that includes Rob Wittman, who’s voted time and time again to restrict women’s rights and undermine access to contraceptives. This November will decide the fate of women’s bodily autonomy for years to come. Just take a look at Wittman’s voting history: ❌ Voted NO for the Right to Contraception Act of 2022 ❌ Voted NO for the Women's Health Protection Act of 2022 ❌ Voted NO for the Ensuring Access to Abortion Act of 2022 ❌ Voted NO for the Women's Health Protection Act of 2021 It’s clear that this is a career politician who’s NOT on the side of the very people he took an oath to represent. I mean, let’s be honest: this is a man who’s been working in politics for over 37 years and has somehow failed to be on the right side of history for each and every one. I think it’s about time we send him packing — but first, I’ve got to know: | | | — Leslie | | | ---|---|--- = Leslie Mehta is a civil rights attorney, a mom, and a proud Democrat running to flip Virginia’s 1st Congressional District. She believes in the Spider-Man definition of a law degree. With great power comes great responsibility. clean_body: Working together, we can build a conservative Senate that will advance our freedom agenda and be a true firewall against the Left's tyranny. | | | | Fellow Conservative: Mitch McConnell is stepping down as the Republican Leader in November and it's time to build a conservative majority in the Senate that will truly fight for our values without making excuses. The best way to send principled leaders to Washington is to donate to their campaigns through the Senate Conservatives Fund. You can contribute to multiple candidates with a single online transaction and SCF will pay all fundraising expenses and processing fees. This will save these candidates a mountain of money, so they can use your contributions to win votes rather than to pay administrative costs. Here are the Senate candidates who need your immediate support: ✓ Ted Cruz (TX) ✓ Rick Scott (FL) ✓ Josh Hawley (MO) ✓ Bernie Moreno (OH) ✓ Tim Sheehy (MT) ✓ Sam Brown (NV) ✓ Kari Lake (AZ) ✓ Eric Hovde (WI) You can also sponsor these candidates with monthly contributions that will automatically stop on Election Day. Did you know that candidates often have to pay fundraising expenses that are up to 90 percent of amount of your contribution? It's true. When you respond to marketing emails and text messages from candidates, in many cases the candidates will only keep 10 percent of your donation after expenses. That's why the Senate Conservatives Fund was founded – to give freedom-loving Americans an effective way to support the best conservative Senate candidates across the nation. We will bundle up the donations from thousands of other patriots like you and transfer them directly to their campaigns. Working together, we can build a conservative Senate that will advance our freedom agenda and be a true firewall against the Left's tyranny. Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future! Sincerely, Matt Hoskins Senate Conservatives Fund P.S. Please sponsor these Senate candidates with recurring contributions that give them sustaining support! | END OF THE MONTH COUNTDOWN | | Senate Conservatives Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 Text SENATE to (877) 838-9388 to receive exclusive updates and invitations. | Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. | PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: DLCC News Alert
subject: Trump is ahead in 5 key states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
Trump’s momentum carries weight for MAGA candidates up and down the ballot, so we’re counting on your support to help us compete against the GOP’s war chest. | | |
---
| |
---|---
| **New York Times:_Trump Leads in 5 Key States_**
---
**This is bad news, and here’s why:**
Trump’s Super PAC just announced a $100 million investment into key battleground states this summer, committing huge sums to GOP efforts in states like Pennsylvania to take back the White House and build power in the states nationwide.
To make matters worse, our Republican counterparts are spending an additional $38 million to flip tossup chambers in states like Minnesota, and Michigan – some of our key target states for 2024.
Trump’s momentum carries weight for MAGA candidates up and down the ballot, so we’re counting on your support now to help us compete against the GOP’s MAGA war chest.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Thankful for Dawn
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88375161/483891707/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTY2MzljZS1hODNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCpuZAZcHGeI3JbA-ezsVEX6t0qmufzrF45og49hYos=&emci=066639ce-a83b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=0e6639ce-a83b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=24635485)
Friend, 17 years ago I married the love of my life, Dawn. The day she said yes was the day that things changed forever. We eloped in 2007 in Las Vegas while I was on leave from service in Afghanistan.**It was one of the best days of my life.** Since then, Dawn has stood by my side through thick and thin. She is my best friend, and I am eternally grateful for everything she has helped me through. From raising our two young kids to joining me on the campaign trail when I ran for Governor, to championing reproductive justice as First Lady and adding our dog to the mix, she has been my rock for _almost_ two decades. 17 years later, we are still standing strong, fighting for a better future for our family and everyone who is by our side. Together, we are making this Maryland’s decade. Elevate, Wes Moore | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88375162/483891708/-1636993682?refcode=em20240706-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTY2MzljZS1hODNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCpuZAZcHGeI3JbA-ezsVEX6t0qmufzrF45og49hYos=)**

SCOTUS is suggesting that the conviction of Trump's MAGA-extremists who STORMED the Capitol was "overstepping." These are the same people who caused deaths, assaulted me and fellow officers, and continue to send death threats whenever we speak out against that day.

This is an incredibly dangerous precedent. It means that in any future insurrections – something Donald Trump has already threatened – insurrectionists may not be held accountable under the law.

This is trouble for our democracy, Peter, I won't lie.

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | The Supreme Court just ruled in a major case,and sided with Insurrectionists | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Dunn's Democracy Defenders and The Collective PAC. SCOTUS is suggesting that the conviction of Trump's MAGA-extremists who STORMED the Capitol was "overstepping." These are the same people who caused deaths, assaulted me and fellow officers, and continue to send death threats whenever we speak out against that day. This is an incredibly dangerous precedent. It means that in any future insurrections – something Donald Trump has already threatened – insurrectionists may not be held accountable under the law. This is trouble for our democracy, Peter, I won't lie. We're inching closer and closer to Donald Trump demolishing our democracy for good, and this ruling only confirms it. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: My motto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
My motto is: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are. (I picked it up from Teddy Roosevelt. It’s just as relevant today as it was more than a century ago.)
In Texas, we are registering Democratic voters across the state and staying in touch with them through the election to make sure they vote.
[**If you can, please, pitch in now to Powered by People. Let's make sure that we have the resources to reach, register, and to turn out the voters who will be the margin of victory in important elections up and down the ballot in Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240706.Jomv6e&refcode=ema20240706-239688&t=1&akid=239688%2E444211%2E20QvPt)
Thank you,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20240706-239688-footer&t=2&refcode2=239688_444211_20QvPt&akid=239688%2E444211%2E20QvPt)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239688%2E444211%2E20QvPt), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=239688%2E444211%2E20QvPt).

Now, the Court has even ruled that Donald Trump – who was recently convicted on 34 felony counts – is immune from criminal prosecution for official acts committed while he was president!

Please tell us now: | | | | Responses submitted past 11:59 p.m. tonight will not be counted. | Friend: Two years ago, the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade gave GOP politicians the green light to introduce hundreds of anti-choice bills across the country. Now, the Court has even ruled that Donald Trump – who was recently convicted on 34 felony counts – is immune from criminal prosecution for official acts committed while he was president! It’s clear Americans are worried about whether the Supreme Court’s conservative majority – which Trump built – is acting in the best interests of our country. But we need to confirm this data for ourselves. That’s why we're looking for another 72 responses from TN before midnight tonight. Please, tell us right now: Do you approve of the Supreme Court? | | | | | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you complete our July Gun Safety Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

We’re heading into crunch time, team. The start of this month marks the start of the third quarter of the election year. We’re ramping up our work to elect gun safety champions in this year’s elections and to help pass more gun violence prevention legislation—all with the goal to keep our communities safer from gun violence.
We’re always working to understand the gun safety priorities of supporters like you to help shape our electoral and legislative agenda. We usually send out these priorities surveys at the start of each quarter. Since the landscape of our movement changes so frequently, it’s important for us to check in with you.
So today we’re asking: [**Will you please share your top gun safety priorities with us by taking our July Gun Safety Priorities Survey?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/july24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em240706-1-30&refcode2=8442.3935704.NSr34J&akid=8442%2E3935704%2ENSr34J)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/july24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em240706-1-30&refcode2=8442.3935704.NSr34J&akid=8442%2E3935704%2ENSr34J)**
We’re at a turning point in our movement. In the past two years, we’ve helped pass the most significant federal gun safety legislation in three decades, tightened background check loopholes, successfully advocated for the creation of the first ever federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention, and have made landmark progress in states nationwide.
But make no mistake: we’re still in the midst of a gun violence crisis. The United States has more guns, weaker gun laws, and higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world.
So today we’re asking: [**We depend on concerned folks like you sharing their priorities to help us shape our work. Will you please help us out by taking our July Gun Safety Priorities Survey?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/july24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em240706-1-30&refcode2=8442.3935704.NSr34J&akid=8442%2E3935704%2ENSr34J)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/july24-priorities-sv-em/?source=em240706-1-30&refcode2=8442.3935704.NSr34J&akid=8442%2E3935704%2ENSr34J)**
We really value your input, so thank you for taking the time to share your priorities with us today.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=8442%2E3935704%2ENSr34J) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
Your support is crucial to this effort. | | |

Fellow Conservative: Democrats want our borders to be overrun with _**illegal immigrants**_ so they can _**vote in our elections**_. This is no secret. Thankfully, these conservatives in the Senate are fighting to pass the SAVE Act, which would require states to (1) verify citizenship for federal elections and (2) purge non-citizens from their voter rolls. **▶︎ Mike Lee **(R-UT) **▶︎ J.D. Vance** (R-OH) **▶︎ Tommy Tuberville** (R-AL) **▶︎ Eric Schmitt** (R-MO)
**▶︎ Ted Cruz** (R-TX) **▶︎ Rick Scott** (R-FL) **▶︎ Josh Hawley** (R-MO) **▶︎ Ron Johnson** (R-WI) Estimates suggest there are nearly 30 million non-citizens in this country, posing a significant threat to our democracy. The SAVE Act is our last chance to protect our elections. **Your support is crucial to this effort.** You can help provide the resources needed to counter opposition and enact this essential legislation. **[These courageous conservatives need your urgent support, so please rush a split contribution to them right now.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=5fb985b69fe6405b95ad6fb0b79c0d60&_e=kVn6nZwUtLsoylOovci2at2BNGhgWFgfa6QsqYz1_jG22LSqSYEDPVxWWWO54SWFpRjtrb5VkwYaYnx2unqzZ2uSTCweNmAa41qrgz7yR5zZAZCPrWiUSiXrngR7L3fzdGCzTckj0m-DEXJTKHD4_EZU6CL8y7lz54Vbq-8LEBiqc9Qu1Wvc-MCOYQToiVEel79cVXWiUOhmp8XSAK1GBOMNbcBTHmVOtOyIgo9_ikkbDzV4d22JyWltfFKHMWJh8aAJkp-CRrSmjafjR6MGyg%3D%3D)** Senate Conservatives Fund will transfer 100% of your contributions directly to their committees.

subject: five bucks
