body:
|
**[Derek — can you chip in a split donation of just $5 right now to my campaign and to Adam Schiff’s to help me send Ted Cruz packing?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=july2024_abs_em_allred.6vpM6t&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=6921%2E5257348%2E0rrfZb)**

I'm sorry to be blunt – but now that Ted Cruz has raised over $51 MILLION, I can't afford to miss a single goal if we're going to keep up with him and his GOP mega-donors.
**That's why your $5 investment in our campaign is so,_so_ important.**
I know $5 might not sound like a groundbreaking amount, **but if every grassroots supporter reading this chips in just $5, we would raise millions of dollars in a matter of minutes to help us build a campaign that will leave Cruz in the dust.**
So, please, don't wait: **[Will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff of just $5 so that I can keep up with Ted's millions, reach voters in every corner of Texas, pull ahead in the polls, and win? body:
The outcome of this election is not something we can just sit back and witness. It is something we must manifest.

Democrats -
I have said it before and I will say it again: the outcome of this election is not something we can just sit back and witness. It is something we must manifest.
We all have a role to play -- some big, some small -- in shaping the outcome for races as important as the presidency and all the way down the ballot.
Today, I am not asking you to donate.
I am asking you to commit to volunteer with me as we work to elect Democrats everywhere.
Starting next week, our team of volunteers (a large community you should be a part of) will be reaching out and talking to voters in critical states like Arizona, Nevada, Georgia, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Michigan, and more.
I want you to join us. Come see what it's about and if you like it.
[**Use this link to sign-up and say you're interested in joining our texting team. We'll be in touch with more.](https://campaignfordemocracy.com/text/?refcode=em240706-1)**
[JOIN THE TEAM](https://campaignfordemocracy.com/text/?refcode=em240706-1)
Some of you have experience doing this. That's great. For others, it will be your first time. Also great.
But if you look at how many close races there were in the last election, and the tight polls in this one, these critical conversations can mean the difference between winning and losing.
We're talking about the fate and future of our democracy, this country and the world. They all need us right now.
[**So please - take the first, small step: Use this link to sign-up and say you're interested in joining our texting team.](https://campaignfordemocracy.com/text/?refcode=em240706-1)**
[JOIN THE TEAM](https://campaignfordemocracy.com/text/?refcode=em240706-1)
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom
P.S. [**If texting is not your thing, that’s okay. We have many ways to get involved. Let us know how you want to participate.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2109%2E4767699%2Eyx8vn3). PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC 1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

Ted Cruz has proven time and again to be the single most divisive politician in Washington. From leading the charge on the 2013 government shutdown to ushering in an era of extreme hyper-partisanship and pitting Americans against each other with dangerous, extremist rhetoric. _**Ted isn't just Texans' problem – he's ALL AMERICANS’ problem. **_

Ted Cruz's refusal to commit to accepting election results is _exactly_ the kind of rhetoric that led to January 6, and another six years of him in the Senate is a danger our democracy simply can’t afford.

As a former voting rights lawyer, Colin knows firsthand how critical it is that we all remain committed to protecting our democracy and ensuring that something like January 6 never happens again. Texans deserve a leader who respects our democracy – and Colin will unequivocally accept the results of this election.

My name is Patrick Stauffer, and I’m the Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee.
---
Hey Derek, My name is Patrick Stauffer, and I’m the Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee. My job is to make sure we are not only raising enough money to elect Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere but to help make sure the donations we receive are spent in the most cost-effective way. Today, I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. Now I’m sure you didn't wake up this morning jump out of bed and scream “Today is the day I am donating to the DNC!” but I hope you will. $7, that's the ask. $7 to help reelect Joe Biden. $7 to help Democrats take the House and defend the Senate. $7 to elect Democrats everywhere -- from school boards to state houses to the White House. No donation is too small, I know that better than anyone. All that matters is that you are chipping in. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. body:

Peter,
We have exactly ONE month until Cori’s primary election.
That’s ONE month to hit our final fundraising deadline before the primary, and ONE month to make sure St. Louis is prepared to vote for Cori at the polls.
So we’re ramping things up. Will you help us reach our fundraising goal by rushing $10, $20, or $40 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_070624_onemonth]
Over the last couple of months, GOP-funded super PACs have stopped at nothing to flood our race with ads, funding Cori’s supposedly “Democratic” opponent.
But we see through them. They’re trying to distract us from the real issues facing our district, the ones Cori’s fighting for.
In fact, as you read this, Cori is fighting to dismantle white supremacy, making sure everyone has a roof over their heads and food on the table, bringing home much-needed investments, supporting public education, and advancing legislation for racial, health, economic, and environmental justice.
However, throughout all of the ups and downs, we’ve learned this: When we come together, we’re a force of nature. We can take on the establishment, we can bring billions of dollars home to our district, and we can push our pro-peace, pro-humanity movement into the national and international spotlight.
So, Peter, can we count on you to donate to our campaign today? ONE MONTH LEFT! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_070624_onemonth]

clean_body: [] Peter, We have exactly ONE month until Cori’s primary election. That’s ONE month to hit our final fundraising deadline before the primary, and ONE month to make sure St. Louis is prepared to vote for Cori at the polls. So we’re ramping things up. Will you help us reach our fundraising goal by rushing $10, $20, or $40 today? [] Over the last couple of months, GOP-funded super PACs have stopped at nothing to flood our race with ads, funding Cori’s supposedly “Democratic” opponent. But we see through them. They’re trying to distract us from the real issues facing our district, the ones Cori’s fighting for. In fact, as you read this, Cori is fighting to dismantle white supremacy, making sure everyone has a roof over their heads and food on the table, bringing home much-needed investments, supporting public education, and advancing legislation for racial, health, economic, and environmental justice. However, throughout all of the ups and downs, we’ve learned this: When we come together, we’re a force of nature. We can take on the establishment, we can bring billions of dollars home to our district, and we can push our pro-peace, pro-humanity movement into the national and international spotlight. So, Peter, can we count on you to donate to our campaign today? ONE MONTH LEFT! [] If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] Thanks for your help always. Team Cori [] As a frontline Ferguson activist, a formerly unhoused single mother of two, a nurse, a survivor, and a pastor, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. In 2020, on a mission to save lives, she defeated a 52-year political dynasty; in 2022, St. Louis sent her back to Congress with a strong mandate to champion racial, economic, reproductive, gender, health, and environmental justice. Now, Cori is running for re-election to continue doing the most for everyone, starting with those who have the greatest need. body:
Two words: grassroots power.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88379580/483905816/-849459103?refcode=ea.3060b9ce-b03b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.3060b9ce-b03b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYwYjljZS1iMDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hyF3xcvRQ5rlLIW8UbYkvTXudTkbcO_8I0DzuN8w7M8=&emci=9e55915a-bb38-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=3060b9ce-b03b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=46764483)

Let me tell you a little something about Marsha Blackburn. **_👉 Her campaign is bankrolled by Big Oil, gun lobbyists, the pharmaceutical industry, and the ultra-rich._** **_👉 She’s the poster child for far-right extremism — supporting a nationwide abortion ban, voting for tax cuts for the rich, and attacking LGBTQ+ rights at every turn._** **_👉 She’s represented Tennessee for decades in Washington yet has nothing to show for it._** We deserve so much better than this self-serving politician. I know you’re with me. Thanks to your support, we've cut Marsha's lead by _6 points_ in the polls. This is what grassroots momentum looks like. And we’re just getting started. But here’s the thing — we still have a few months to go before we can officially give Marsha the boot, and a lot can happen before then. clean_body: Two words: grassroots power. | Let me tell you a little something about Marsha Blackburn. 👉 Her campaign is bankrolled by Big Oil, gun lobbyists, the pharmaceutical industry, and the ultra-rich. 👉 She’s the poster child for far-right extremism — supporting a nationwide abortion ban, voting for tax cuts for the rich, and attacking LGBTQ+ rights at every turn. 👉 She’s represented Tennessee for decades in Washington yet has nothing to show for it. We deserve so much better than this self-serving politician. I know you’re with me. Thanks to your support, we've cut Marsha's lead by 6 points in the polls. This is what grassroots momentum looks like. And we’re just getting started. But here’s the thing — we still have a few months to go before we can officially give Marsha the boot, and a lot can happen before then. That’s why hitting our fundraising goals and heading into primary day next month with momentum is so important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: Lucas Tyree Kunce
subject: Nearly two years ago, Josh Hawley failed veterans like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I want to tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and what happened when I got home.
#
Peter — nearly two years ago, Josh Hawley and 40 other Republicans blocked a bill to expand healthcare to millions of veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55327?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs)
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[make your first donation of any amount toward my grassroots campaign to replace Hawley in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55327?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs) But first, I want to tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like him failed veterans like me.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55327?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs)**
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55327?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs)
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and poring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?
I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can stay on track with our goals this month, get this message in front of Missouri voters, and defeat Josh Hawley this November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55327?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55328?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55328?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55328?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55328?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55328?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55328?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55327?refcode=em20240706-5942&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=5942%2E614464%2EcITPFs)
---
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.
Thanks for being part of it,
— Lucas Kunce

First, Justice Clarence Thomas was EXPOSED for accepting luxury vacations and bribes from GOP mega-donors. Then, he and fellow far-right Justice Samuel Alito REFUSED to recuse themselves from January 6th cases despite their EXTREME bias. **But now, you’re taking a stand to FINALLY hold the Supreme Court accountable for their blatant misconduct!**

name: Dr. Chad Walding
subject: Your Leaky Bladder - This Army Water Stops Urges
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Hey Friend… it's me-your
bladder!

I'm trying to help you out here.

I've noticed less water coming
through lately… and you might think that will make leaks
and urges better…

But the truth is, too much water
is NOT the cause of your bathroom struggles…

In fact, it's the opposite.

Once you hit 50, a few things got
out of whack.

Kidneys stopped filtering fluid
as well as they once did - causing concentrated urine that
irritates your bladder and causes spontaneous urges.

Thirst signals slow down, causing
you to drink less- making bladder muscles lazy and leaks more
frequent.

Luckily, US Army researchers
decoded a shockingly easy water trick that can improve muscle
strength by 36%, reduce UTIs by 58%, and give you control
back…

All by targeting the true cause
of bladder problems in as little as 2 hours.

PLEASE…

> Try this simple Army water
trick to strengthen me and reduce my constant nagging.

We're going to be feeling GREAT
soon,

Your Bladder

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across

body:
These are Eric’s top priorities in Washington

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88382511/483915672/-112884332?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240706_whq_issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODllNWYyY2QtYjYzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J4AiMmg5hsibvhVS8whW7MXjvHewW7bri-6H21WGYXY=)
---
Peter, For far too long, Western Wisconsin has been overlooked and left behind. That won’t happen under Eric’s watch. **Eric has a bright vision for WI-03.** Here are his top priorities:
* Ensuring everyone has affordable and high-quality healthcare through **Medicare for All.** The United States has the most expensive and least effective healthcare system compared with other developed nations. It’s well past time that we catch up and **establish a single-payer system that won’t leave anyone behind.**
* Building up our alternative energy sources to **combat the climate crisis.** Our environment is being threatened like never before and we need to step up to the plate. If we don’t act soon, we will begin to see irreversible damage to our planet. Not only will this save our planet, but save a sacred way of life in western Wisconsin - _family farming._
* **Building up our education system** to ensure that every child gets the best education possible no matter where they live or how much their family makes. Education is one of the best ways for students to reach their full potential, but high costs are making that more difficult for families. By reigning in the cost of tuition and trade schools, we can make higher education a possibility for millions more.

_**[Eric has grand plans for WI-03 but needs your help to get there. Can you chip in $25 to send him to Washington to get big things done for Western clean_body: These are Eric’s top priorities in Washington | | = Peter, For far too long, Western Wisconsin has been overlooked and left behind. That won’t happen under Eric’s watch. Eric has a bright vision for WI-03. Here are his top priorities: Ensuring everyone has affordable and high-quality healthcare through Medicare for All. The United States has the most expensive and least effective healthcare system compared with other developed nations. It’s well past time that we catch up and establish a single-payer system that won’t leave anyone behind. Building up our alternative energy sources to combat the climate crisis. Our environment is being threatened like never before and we need to step up to the plate. If we don’t act soon, we will begin to see irreversible damage to our planet. Not only will this save our planet, but save a sacred way of life in western Wisconsin - family farming. Building up our education system to ensure that every child gets the best education possible no matter where they live or how much their family makes. Education is one of the best ways for students to reach their full potential, but high costs are making that more difficult for families. By reigning in the cost of tuition and trade schools, we can make higher education a possibility for millions more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you, Peter. — Wilson HQ | Eric Wilson is a Democrat, project manager, and housing professional by trade. He's got real-world experience working in health insurance and real estate - and has seen how our current system has let so many down. He's running for Wisconsin's 3rd to bring a fresh perspective and fight for those who've been left behind. Can you make a contribution today to help flip this seat and give Wisconsin's third the representation it deserves? = = ** Paid for by Wilson for Wisconsin Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Wilson for Wisconsin 923 South Hastings Way #352 Eau Claire, WI 54701 United States

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I know how to win tough races, and Bob needs our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240706-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240706-2&refcode2=3482_552475_eyS4Eg&akid=3482%2E552475%2EeyS4Eg)
Hi Peter, it’s Mikie Sherrill.
This election cycle, we need to make our voices heard in Senate races across the country to ensure we keep the majority. And one of the most important races on the map is happening in our neighboring state of Pennsylvania, where Bob Casey is running against Wall Street mega-millionaire, David McCormick.
[**Bob’s race is a must-win, which is why Republican super PACs are spending tens of millions of dollars to defeat him. Will you chip in any amount to Bob’s campaign to help him fight back?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240706-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240706-2&refcode2=3482_552475_eyS4Eg&akid=3482%2E552475%2EeyS4Eg)
Mitch McConnell knows how close this race is. He also knows the outcome will play a critical role in determining the agenda in the Senate – and everything from women’s rights to protecting Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid is on the line.
I know how to win tough races. I’ve overcome outside spending and negative ads with the support of people like you. So today, I’m asking for you to give Bob that same support.
[**Bob is the leader Pennsylvanians need and deserve. His race is going to determine the Senate majority, so can you help him fight back and win?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240706-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240706-2&refcode2=3482_552475_eyS4Eg&akid=3482%2E552475%2EeyS4Eg)

clean_body: Hi Peter, it’s Mikie Sherrill. This election cycle, we need to make our voices heard in Senate races across the country to ensure we keep the majority. And one of the most important races on the map is happening in our neighboring state of Pennsylvania, where Bob Casey is running against Wall Street mega-millionaire, David McCormick. Mitch McConnell knows how close this race is. He also knows the outcome will play a critical role in determining the agenda in the Senate – and everything from women’s rights to protecting Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid is on the line. I know how to win tough races. I’ve overcome outside spending and negative ads with the support of people like you. So today, I’m asking for you to give Bob that same support. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thanks for all that you do. Mikie

clean_body: Liberals have NEVER BEEN CLOSER to packing the court| | | Peter, Jack Smith’s corrupt prosecution was dealt a MASSIVE BLOW recently when the Supreme Court granted Donald Trump immunity for his official acts as president... ...but now, the far-Left plot to attack the Supreme Court and undermine our Constitution has become MORE DANGEROUS than ever. Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has announced her intention to file ARTICLES OF IMPEACHMENT against the originalist justices — Perhaps the MOST IMPORTANT reason Republicans must take back the Senate Majority is to save the Supreme Court, Peter. If the Left successfully destroys our judicial system, the freedoms we enjoy as Americans could be gone forever. | | STAND WITH SENATE GOP | | PATRIOT: CONTRIBUTION STATUS: DEADLINE: | | Thank you, NRSC HQ | | | | - Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. #
Peter – we hope you’re having a wonderful Fourth of July weekend with your close family and friends!
If he could, Senator Durbin would sit down with every single member of this grassroots team to hear what’s on your mind. But since that's just not possible, this survey is the next best thing.
That’s why we’re asking: **[Will you fill out our July Issues Survey and let Senator Durbin know which issues are a top priority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88383612/483919611/1917469381?source=LOC_EM_SURV_2024.07.06_JulyIssues_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjFiOWQ5Yi1iOTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cw4P-lWmshsfpYEClyPhOPObyJtUiFn-KK6BWfnBi_I=&emci=733a4a21-6335-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d21b9d9b-b93b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2727974)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88383613/483919612/1917469381?source=LOC_EM_SURV_2024.07.06_JulyIssues_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjFiOWQ5Yi1iOTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cw4P-lWmshsfpYEClyPhOPObyJtUiFn-KK6BWfnBi_I=&emci=733a4a21-6335-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d21b9d9b-b93b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2727974)**
Senator Durbin truly believes that listening to people's concerns and responding with real action is what being a good leader is all about, so we want to know more about the issues you’re concerned about this election.
Your input is critical to making sure we can keep the Senate blue, flip the House, and win the future we deserve.

| |
Friend, here are two things you need to know ASAP:
**1. **Experts confirm that our race _will determine_ Senate control – and because of that, shady GOP super PACs are flooding the airwaves with TV ads to attack Sherrod and flip this seat.
**2\. We're launching TV ads of our own to fight back, spread our pro-worker message, and win this race. But unless we raise $250,000 in the next 48 hours, our ads could go dark.**

The Red, White, & Independent Auction 🇺🇸 in support of the Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Campaign is LIVE!
Discover a collection as bold and spirited as the campaign itself, featuring exclusive items that embody the essence of independence and American pride. Each piece tells a story of craftsmanship, dedication, and a commitment to a brighter future.
[Bid now and join us in celebrating freedom, justice, and the spirit of independence with every purchase!](https://www.kennedy24.com/red_white_independent_auction?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_7_6_24_news1&n=2)

* * *
Win a Kennedy Compound Dinner & Hyannis Port Sail with RFK Jr. and Cheryl Hines
Envision your yacht leaving historic Hyannis Port, Massachusetts, cruising the waters where Bobby Kennedy grew up sailing. As you glide across the sparkling Atlantic, you'll pass the iconic Kennedy Compound, glimpsing into a storied past. After your sail, enjoy an **exclusive dinner at the Kennedy Compound with RFK Jr. and Cheryl Hines** , immersing yourself in the legacy of one of America's most influential families.
**The sweepstakes runs through July 19th, 2024._So don't wait_ – **[enter now for your chance to embark on this extraordinary Atlantic voyage!](https://www.kennedy24.com/atlantic-sail-sweepstakes-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_7_6_24_news1&n=4)

* * *
RFK Jr.: The Real Debate
The Kennedy campaign gave Americans the debate they deserved, a debate with the three top presidential candidates — Trump, Biden, and Kennedy.
**The Real Debate** , powered by X and already viewed by more than 11 million people, was broadcast from a studio in Los Angeles with a live audience of more than 200 people. It aired at the same time as the CNN debate but **The Real Debate** included Kennedy answering the questions too, moderated by renowned journalist John Stossel.

name: Joe Biden
subject: The pundits have gotten everything wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I understand you can't turn on the television or get on the internet without seeing some pundit talking about how I need to drop out of the race. | | |
---
Folks, I understand you can't turn on the television or get on the internet without seeing some pundit talking about how I need to drop out of the race. Nonsense. I want you to ask yourself, what have these people been right about lately? Seriously. Think about it. They were wrong when they said I couldn't win the Democratic nomination in 2020. They were wrong when they said we wouldn't beat Trump (and there were many) months later. They were wrong when they predicted massive Democratic losses in 2022. Remember the red wave? They were wrong when they said we couldn't take on the NRA and pass the most significant gun safety legislation in three decades. They were wrong when they said we couldn't take on big Pharma and allow Medicare to lower the cost of prescription drugs. They were wrong when they said we could never take on the oil companies and pass the most significant climate change legislation in the history of the world. And they are wrong again today. Folks, listen. Forget the pundits. As long as we are in this together -- me and you -- not only are we going to beat Trump again this November, but we are going to go on to do what many think impossible in my second term: codify _Roe_ , ban assault weapons, expand Social Security, and more. But I cannot do this alone, and I've never needed you more than I do today. Everyone is looking to see if the grassroots support we need to win is still there. I've seen it since the debate, but we have to keep going. So please: [Can I count on you to contribute $25 or whatever you can afford directly to my re-election campaign today? clean_body: I understand you can't turn on the television or get on the internet without seeing some pundit talking about how I need to drop out of the race. | | | Folks, I understand you can't turn on the television or get on the internet without seeing some pundit talking about how I need to drop out of the race. Nonsense. I want you to ask yourself, what have these people been right about lately? Seriously. Think about it. They were wrong when they said I couldn't win the Democratic nomination in 2020. They were wrong when they said we wouldn't beat Trump (and there were many) months later. They were wrong when they predicted massive Democratic losses in 2022. Remember the red wave? They were wrong when they said we couldn't take on the NRA and pass the most significant gun safety legislation in three decades. They were wrong when they said we couldn't take on big Pharma and allow Medicare to lower the cost of prescription drugs. They were wrong when they said we could never take on the oil companies and pass the most significant climate change legislation in the history of the world. And they are wrong again today. Folks, listen. Forget the pundits. As long as we are in this together -- me and you -- not only are we going to beat Trump again this November, but we are going to go on to do what many think impossible in my second term: codify Roe , ban assault weapons, expand Social Security, and more. But I cannot do this alone, and I've never needed you more than I do today. Everyone is looking to see if the grassroots support we need to win is still there. I've seen it since the debate, but we have to keep going. So please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I will never forget your support, Peter. I mean that. Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

**Reporters turned on president only when the lie became impossible to sustain.**

The former executive editor of The New York Times gave away the game: The media were in on it. They helped cover up President Biden’s dramatic cognitive decline and gaslit Americans regarding his mental and physical condition. “The Biden White House clearly succeeded in a massive cover-up of the degree of the president’s feebleness and his serious physical decline, which may be simply the result of old age,” Ms. Abramson said.

_**“Shame on the White House press corps for not [having] pierced the veil of secrecy surrounding the president.”**_

clean_body: The media is complicit, Gold Star families are pissed, DEI is killing our Armed Forces, and more... | | | | | | Reporters turned on president only when the lie became impossible to sustain. The former executive editor of The New York Times gave away the game: The media were in on it. They helped cover up President Biden’s dramatic cognitive decline and gaslit Americans regarding his mental and physical condition. “The Biden White House clearly succeeded in a massive cover-up of the degree of the president’s feebleness and his serious physical decline, which may be simply the result of old age,” Ms. Abramson said. “Shame on the White House press corps for not [having] pierced the veil of secrecy surrounding the president.” | PLEASE SUPPORT OUR SPONSORS | IMPORTANT DETAILS DATES: June 1, 2024 through August 15, 2024 DRAWING: Winners will be drawn on August 16, 2024 FIRST PRIZE: Solaire Infrared Grill and 1 year of Backyard Butchers SECOND PLACE: Solaire Anywhere Grill with Warming Rack and 6-month supply of Backyard Butchers THIRD PLACE: Solaire Mini Grill and a 3-month supply of Backyard Butchers | NOTABLE QUOTES Becky Noble contributor to RedState.com reports a disturbing trend: A new Gallup poll, taken between June 3-23, shows that just two in five Americans, roughly 41 percent, say they are “extremely proud” of being an American. It is the fifth consecutive year the number of those polled has fallen into the 38-43 percent range. Of those polled, another 26 percent said they were “very proud” to be an American. Among other respondents, 18 percent said they were “moderately proud,” 10 percent said they were “a little proud,” and thankfully, just five percent they were “not at all proud.” J.B. Shurk contributor to American Thinker: Government is the destroyer of liberty. Bureaucracies do not light the flame of freedom; they snuff freedom’s light out. People alone (separate from the organizing strictures of the State) secure their liberty by pushing back against and restraining the otherwise ever-growing oppression of power-hungry governments. Citizens hold the keys to their own prison cells. They must only find the courage to open up their doors and walk outside. This was true in 1776; it is no less true today. But together, I know we can take back our country. **** Thank you, John James | | Paid for by John James for Michigan Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for Michigan Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

body:
Pramila’s primary election is on August 6, and we’re doing everything we can to fortify our campaign resources before the polls close.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240706-4080-footer&t=1&akid=4080%2E420207%2E58IZTq)
Peter,
**Pramila’s primary election is in just one month,****and we’re doing everything we can to fortify our campaign resources before the polls close. So we’re asking you an important question:**[**Will you add your name to personally endorse Pramila today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/endorse-pramila-202407/?refcode=em20240706-4080&akid=4080%2E420207%2E58IZTq)
**[Endorse ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/endorse-pramila-202407/?refcode=em20240706-4080&akid=4080%2E420207%2E58IZTq)**
Pramila launched this campaign in 2016 to stand up for everyday people. But she never imagined our movement would grow to what it is today.
**Pramila knows we are at a pivotal point in our nation’s history.** Pramila was in the House Gallery on January 6 when insurrectionists attacked the Capitol. She knows our democracy is direly threatened.
**Pramila knows that together, we can deliver real progressive change.** As Chair of the Progressive Caucus, she led the charge in delivering for the people – not the wealthy and their special interests. She stood up to MAGA extremists to lead with compassion for our neighbors and reject hatred toward immigrants and people of color.
**You can show these MAGA extremists that our campaign is stronger than ever** – and fully prepared to take on their lies and counter their millions in Super PAC spending.
[**Can we count on your personal endorsement of Pramila and this campaign ahead of the August 6th primary election?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/endorse-pramila-202407/?refcode=em20240706-4080&akid=4080%2E420207%2E58IZTq)

We just released our very first ad for 2024, where Matt reflects on his background working with both sides of the aisle to get things done for northeastern Pennsylvania.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88385707/483927949/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTllM2ZkZi1jMDNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-dqMxqA6KOlPKRgETuNs07n6LGK05o5TcGcrXUhRALo=&emci=07cd05cc-7739-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7e9e3fdf-c03b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23311593) | Have you seen Matt's new ad, Peter?

We just released our very first ad for 2024, where Matt reflects on his background working with both sides of the aisle to get things done for northeastern Pennsylvania. **Matt knows that progress can't be stalled because politicians don't want to work together.**

We deserve leaders who can put their differences aside for the betterment of those they serve. This is exactly how Matt has spent his time in Congress, _and he has no plans on slowing down._

When voters hear this message, we know they'll continue to stand with Matt. So, will you help us keep our ad on the air for everyone in northeastern Pennsylvania to see? body:
The ultra-conservative majority on the Court has shown time after time that they will not act to protect our democracy – but Democrats in our state legislatures will. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Justice Sotomayor’s dissent says it all... [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_StjzIP_JksgF6_3fhf2m-HqPRPYy1juwxsIt_fZReJT1_x3-l-PkA89UvAoGBpBTm_cnOsXkFGwBCp_0YXdiYh58YSVt_7D0Ke4Oqt_L36I5b2Me_cbxy4ALz4WDjEsixOYP7layGiVlIDD_ooFosrFMXiC6u9wMj4CKx0aQK3L_vQEz20u0qV0Xwp2Nf1Hk4rOQH-clokQ6rscANIgD2T88LQFuV5MSG2-wL_fASzY6a7yOi1I3xKxFNgNKkhaOWB_pdkSTdJqisRLVZj-rB5CUPDzBEikfFP6wZ-9wMr_TfJvu27uzhdGgwJRimXbhG4ymJzrv6ZwhTjM_EoNdrwdgmr-PG4H_3YCzE3dUkmqen0j3LRudg0vvMMS6OCCr/47t/PQEFKrKcQuKKr2rNVfkU5w/h0/h001.SqLUGWx5O3wjnGsLX3NUWDvPwIyFVO8YePYwiBQJPF0) _Photo via Gage Skidmore_ Trump’s far-right allies on the Supreme Court just granted him immunity for some official acts and a presumption of immunity for others. He could avoid accountability for his actions on January 6th, his attempts to overturn the 2020 election, and _so much more_. The Supreme Court has shown time after time that _they will not act_ to protect our democracy – **that’s why it’s vital that we defeat MAGA Republicans in our statehouses and elect pro-democracy Democrats to state legislatures nationwide.** [Will you rush $7 to defeat Trump’s allies in the states and turn this decision into a NET-LOSS for the MAGA movement? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_StjzIP_JksgF6_3fhf2m-HqPRPYy1juwxsIt_fZReJT1_x3-l-PkA89UvAoGBpBTm_cnOsXkFGwBCp_0YXdiYh58YSVt_7D0Ke4Oqt_L36I5b2Me_cbxy4ALz4WDjEsixOYP7layGiVlIDD_ooFosu8hnxe1P0ek2zurAkVvgPVxv-QtiW_1dLoA6_gqvkY3k74POHoNZU0jRhtYb6VYRynbnMeUDYQAKKpvn8QWZvgkaODtQh1ApHWkO0aLs_N9Vun6q8zg87OSe_FQpClhCbnWlvvXg2u6Plaln4jmEIUBQS9Mpqwz04dgPhAxeuE7Ej0kltjG7PQcRxDR5rBIjLYYnkx9_IcXGMqpsOfPcvP4GAbkYeN7wiylSLCm7T3n/47t/PQEFKrKcQuKKr2rNVfkU5w/h1/h001.fyjiK8glUfKmRyOqzYJkiOrG-GfOmew7s1iEn6AYC1I) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Sen. Josh Hawley
subject: I’m taking this personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7361efeea17e407b8b70a9f880ff038f&_e=NLyzsrecmS8EV1ZvESq9MsxabOBlyU5FWot4HkUgH13RAmUNvrVhd8Cpq5xWWMoEzVYPymsb6PlSpvngjhAYNUKILbV9TmJzqYK7l3hcYMBfOTVEzh9mSMABSE8L5ZQZSKZ0tGKAYBVC2bbbSf4RbjtqRr91neUHdVugO9vPfbhoRrySWgoiZFvNKfZX-x5EbbgApTZwdL_J707ZnOTmVK-aDYEGNIBFjDckPtbK1wk2L5NIb5dessf3mSXD32s1jc2gqNWe3NNcKodbd2Sow-xe7VvBxpJlpmFQpzJy89YzpMs9qOQka9TipxYHBxshE-c7bQ7W_7Qv8VQ-LWnEfzWhMtKHZyM0I2To-JWmPgtY1XF4PV0qMW5LwMi3j2jg)

Peter, Biden’s woke policies have ruined our country, and I’m taking it personally.

I’ve met families who have lost loved ones because of the drugs pouring across our borders. I’ve met people who can’t put food on the table because of Joe Biden’s failed economic policies.

You see, instead of attending fancy dinners in Washington DC like other swamp insiders, I spend my free time talking to hard-working Americans.

We should all be angry at what the Democrats have done to our values and our country.

I’m running for re-election because I’m focused on saving America for YOU, not the coastal elites.

**[Are you with me?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7361efeea17e407b8b70a9f880ff038f&_e=NLyzsrecmS8EV1ZvESq9MsxabOBlyU5FWot4HkUgH13RAmUNvrVhd8Cpq5xWWMoEzVYPymsb6PlSpvngjhAYNUKILbV9TmJzqYK7l3hcYMBfOTVEzh9mSMABSE8L5ZQZSKZ0tGKAYBVC2bbbSf4RbjtqRr91neUHdVugO9vPfbhoRrySWgoiZFvNKfZX-x5EbbgApTZwdL_J707ZnOTmVK-aDYEGNIBFjDckPtbK1wmpq1Ayg87qujOtaOBqtN8RBOwrMdHAnkYjGcbp0YjJ8ENDR9jZwjaa1HxaWY34pjIM5YEMnV2zj1PP7CdiluZ6Y7yDMW8_zkb-h6zFzYIWSkBBHlcnmHXKovTUlguIWQTjPewjFXgWsX_R1DllLsMe)**

I was born and raised in Akron, the Birthplace of Champions. I am so proud to be a daughter of Northeast Ohio, and my love for this community and the support I receive from you all is the reason that I am in Congress today.
Because of this grassroots team, I have been able to represent and advocate for this hardworking community in Washington, D.C. Together, we’ve delivered on some of the things that matter most to Northeast Ohioans – but our work isn’t close to done.
Every day, I am fighting to put money back in the pockets of folks in Northeast Ohio, expand job opportunities, keep people safe, and ensure that the government is working for our community.
I am dedicated to defending and advocating for every single person in our community, and I am as fired up as ever.
[**This election year there is so much hanging in the balance, and I need your help to defend Northeast Ohio. name: George Whitesides
subject: Asking for a minute of your time, not money.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88386047/483929323/572242427?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhMzNiNS1jMTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lu2NndWZKb3WRFggL-wMuLTMPAuR3QVrypt9p1tqWyM=)
Peter,

I know you received a lot of messages from me and my team last week – I appreciate you sticking with our movement.

**[Today, I’m not asking for a contribution. I’m only asking for a few minutes of your time to complete our July campaign survey – your responses will impact our strategy going forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88386052/483929326/452256781?refcode=em-7.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhMzNiNS1jMTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lu2NndWZKb3WRFggL-wMuLTMPAuR3QVrypt9p1tqWyM=&emci=9c3f3aae-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=58fa33b5-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Begin the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88386061/483929334/452256781?refcode=em-7.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhMzNiNS1jMTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lu2NndWZKb3WRFggL-wMuLTMPAuR3QVrypt9p1tqWyM=&emci=9c3f3aae-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=58fa33b5-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=36198509)****
---

If we unseat MAGA Mike Garcia, we could lock up the House majority for Democrats and protect our democracy from far-right extremism. More importantly, we could rid our CA-27 community of a representative that doesn’t serve us.

Instead of prioritizing what our district needs to thrive, Garcia would rather rub shoulders with Trump and the national GOP. His extreme actions tell us what we need to know – he co-sponsored legislation for a national abortion ban, voted to give himself a pay raise, tried to decertify the 2020 presidential election results, the list goes on.

Unlike him, I’m not beholden to any higher party power. I’ve spent my entire career serving our community – from NASA Chief of Staff under Obama, to creating hundreds of jobs in the Antelope Valley, to co-founding the first organization dedicated to combating wildfires in the West.

I’m not shying away from tough conversations on the campaign trail. I’ve made a point to personally knock on doors and spread the word about our community-centered campaign.

**[If you're running to serve your community in Congress, that should be reflected in the way you campaign and who you’re listening to. That’s why today, I’m asking for a minute of your time for our July campaign survey. Will you take a minute to share your thoughts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88386063/483929341/452256781?refcode=em-7.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhMzNiNS1jMTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lu2NndWZKb3WRFggL-wMuLTMPAuR3QVrypt9p1tqWyM=&emci=9c3f3aae-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=58fa33b5-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=36198509)**
****[Begin the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88386065/483929343/452256781?refcode=em-7.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGZhMzNiNS1jMTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lu2NndWZKb3WRFggL-wMuLTMPAuR3QVrypt9p1tqWyM=&emci=9c3f3aae-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=58fa33b5-c13b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=36198509)****
---

George

clean_body: | = Peter, I know you received a lot of messages from me and my team last week – I appreciate you sticking with our movement. | ** If we unseat MAGA Mike Garcia, we could lock up the House majority for Democrats and protect our democracy from far-right extremism. More importantly, we could rid our CA-27 community of a representative that doesn’t serve us. Instead of prioritizing what our district needs to thrive, Garcia would rather rub shoulders with Trump and the national GOP. His extreme actions tell us what we need to know – he co-sponsored legislation for a national abortion ban, voted to give himself a pay raise, tried to decertify the 2020 presidential election results, the list goes on. Unlike him, I’m not beholden to any higher party power. I’ve spent my entire career serving our community – from NASA Chief of Staff under Obama, to creating hundreds of jobs in the Antelope Valley, to co-founding the first organization dedicated to combating wildfires in the West. I’m not shying away from tough conversations on the campaign trail. I’ve made a point to personally knock on doors and spread the word about our community-centered campaign. Thank you, George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

Peter,

We’re just four months out from Election Day, and things are moving fast. Our team is working tirelessly to build up our field program, gather volunteers to knock on doors and phone bank, and so much more.

But our volunteers need pamphlets, pens, clipboards, and other materials to get our message out effectively. **Campaign expenses add up quickly, but knowing we have money coming in makes these expenses worthwhile.**

That’s why we’re asking you to make a recurring contribution from now until November. Your recurring contributions help us plan for what’s to come and prepare for the tough fight ahead.

name: Replace Biden? via Our Revolution
subject: This is a mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1011?refcode=email-20240706_v&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, the
Democratic Party has created the electoral mess we’re in with Joe Biden.
But if we want to avoid another Trump presidency, it’s up to us.

When Our Revolution formed out of the Bernie 2016 campaign, we knew
organizing to change the Democratic Party would not be easy. Now,
Democrats are scrambling to figure out what to do next. DNC leadership is
ignoring real concerns with Biden while some elected Democrats in Congress
are calling for a serious conversation about who the nominee should be.

Even Nancy Pelosi expressed concerns about Biden’s debate performance! And
some of Biden’s DNC delegates are considering the possibility that he’s
not the right nominee.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18525?t=1060&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ][IMG]

After Biden’s rough debate performance and the Supreme Court’s extreme
right-wing ruling handing “absolute immunity” to the American presidency,
there is a serious threat of Trump becoming a Dictator on Day 1.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Can you chip in to help us organize in battleground states to stop a
second Trump term? We will be calling and texting voters in every swing
state, knocking on doors, and mobilizing our progressive movement to
protect democracy and defeat Trump.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

We cannot let this moment, and the Democratic Party’s scrambling, distract
us from the ultimate goal these next few months — and that’s keeping
Donald Trump out of the White House.

The reality is, whether Joe Biden is the Democratic candidate or not is
primarily up to Joe Biden. But the reality of whether Donald Trump is the
next President is up to our organizing, our strategy, our Get Out The Vote
operation, and our entire progressive movement.

And we’re having a major impact on this conversation. When Politico
reported on our post-debate survey and that 67% of our respondents want to
see Joe Biden step aside, the Democratic Party saw that. The Party knows
their coalition to win in November is shaky and that the Progressive vote
is crucial.

We need to ramp up our organizing right now, and we need our grassroots
donors to pitch in today. The summer months are notoriously difficult for
fundraising, but it’s the time we’ll need your small-dollar contributions
the most as we prepare for November.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/18516?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20240706_v_nd&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Can you chip in to our Swing State Fund right now to help defeat Trump?
For every $1 donated, we can call and text a voter in Wisconsin, Michigan,
Pennsylvania, or another swing state five times.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=6314%2E5885482%2EZRQZW1 ]GIVE MONTHLY

| | If you’re like us and watching the news like a hawk, you couldn’t miss the devastating Supreme Court decisions this past week.

You probably watched in horror as the Supreme Court turned the presidency into a potential dictatorship.

**_The truth is: Donald Trump’s election in 2016 solidified the extreme MAGA majority on the Supreme Court, and they’ve wasted no time dragging us backwards on racial equity, civil rights, reproductive freedom, and more._**

This MAGA extreme Supreme Court is not just a reflection of today’s GOP, nor is it a group of scholars “calling balls and strikes” – it’s representative of the entire extreme MAGA GOP—a party that’s hell-bent on using every avenue possible to roll back our fundamental rights. Today’s GOP has launched an outright onslaught against our democracy. They’ve significantly weakened our democracy, and if we don’t turn things around soon, **_our democracy will cease to exist._**

[**_We need your help. If we can win in Georgia and defeat the GOP at every level, then we can win back our rights and build a future where we ALL can succeed._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88386939/483932272/710125701?refcode=20240706.1_PSD_7H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmFhMzgzZi1jMzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tzLh4kgQmPe6VKbVWtuoUBBuMuXvR4V6D7NfHTpcqVo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | If you’re like us and watching the news like a hawk, you couldn’t miss the devastating Supreme Court decisions this past week. You probably watched in horror as the Supreme Court turned the presidency into a potential dictatorship. The truth is: Donald Trump’s election in 2016 solidified the extreme MAGA majority on the Supreme Court, and they’ve wasted no time dragging us backwards on racial equity, civil rights, reproductive freedom, and more. This MAGA extreme Supreme Court is not just a reflection of today’s GOP, nor is it a group of scholars “calling balls and strikes” – it’s representative of the entire extreme MAGA GOP—a party that’s hell-bent on using every avenue possible to roll back our fundamental rights. Today’s GOP has launched an outright onslaught against our democracy. They’ve significantly weakened our democracy, and if we don’t turn things around soon, our democracy will cease to exist. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Are you with us? name: Jill Stein 2024
subject: We can make history in this state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
No Green has ever been on the ballot here.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=1)
---
Peter – We have a chance to write history this year by making Jill Stein the first Green Party candidate ever to get on the ballot in Oklahoma. But to make it happen, **we need your help to raise the filing fee required to put Jill on the Oklahoma ballot.** [**Will you pitch in whatever you can today to give over 2.3 million voters in Oklahoma a real choice - and help Jill make history?**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=2)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=3 "GET JILL ON THE OK BALLOT") [GET JILL ON THE OK BALLOT](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=3)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=4)
---
Oklahoma has long been one of the most difficult states to petition to get on the ballot, but a law passed in 2017 introduced an option for presidential candidates to gain ballot access by paying a $35,000 filing fee. That’s still a hefty chunk of change for a grassroots campaign like ours. That said, it actually costs less than hiring paid petitioners to collect tens of thousands of signatures - not to mention the likely need to defend those signatures from legal challenges by the anti-Democratic Party’s army of lawyers. Oklahoma is also one of several states that don’t allow write-in votes, meaning Oklahomans have never yet had the opportunity to vote for a Green presidential candidate. We can make history by putting Jill on Oklahoma’s ballot - but because the government has delayed the federal matching funds payments we qualified for and expected to start arriving this week, we urgently need to raise $35,000 for the Oklahoma filing fee by the fast-approaching deadline of July 15th. **If everyone reading this gives just $10 or more right now, we can declare another ballot access victory for Jill today.** [**Please give whatever you can today to make sure that over 2.3 million voters in Oklahoma will have an anti-genocide, pro-worker, climate action choice on their ballot for the first time ever!**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=5)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=6 "GET JILL ON THE OK BALLOT") [GET JILL ON THE OK BALLOT](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=6)
---
Thank you for all you do to build this nationwide uprising for people, planet, and peace! **In gratitude and solidarity,** Team Jill Stein 2024
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=7 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ok?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oklahoma_2_rest_of_list&n=7)
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Exploring the nation's drift from family values
body:
We are witnessing a brutal, unceasing, and deadly assault currently being waged against American families—especially the traditional nuclear family. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=5656c9872b4e4e0986b9bf44c7287382&_t=5vrtInZLfvuSWEIHy2h_ZtEgtJ2msfLAWcrNp--u326GMVzQ23D18b48x1lRKDgZ5C3FGH1qaXUTRS-bfN6b7Vaokqt4KBUPVVTsYIqzDOo5uL9w5pWUzxd79fVs2H_8)_
---
---
| | | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5656c9872b4e4e0986b9bf44c7287382&_e=R5O-A08QLpnajE-x59LsQT_jbhGkdiCCdBs7_cEEoo9AAcl7noVkec1OG6c0a_ULK2hSWyWHCLBNO5ICxAO3aSLUBvKclUcV96_T3Z2gvhWYkKD_YcFKcvBppGp7qkYKcUD-zGtb75uOyjP1krjwICAjJcx-dT_H19PYWN2TQh4ybR90RTEHVEMwkl7LS8wBgTJdRv3zGZZocMANZR4XrNNXtKmqwq0wVeYsIYuo2-dFLH2Tb5rWPD6GiwBMb7Et1emFUqXKkmuFzhwvpnXFM_3GKLZirUTuNtBG9DqppRvkeUVbosQ2XVMLCuNUGE-x_TvKK1mgP_75VrQ7cLtrdZROQ2XRB6G8Qs0YaKBVR5UHQC4K1Ovw0hf8wgiOIWkyTxiJiLs1Ov4CYcecmDK_Rw%3D%3D)
---
| From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Dear Fellow Patriot,

We are witnessing a brutal, unceasing, and deadly assault currently being waged against American families--especially the traditional nuclear family. I'm sure you've felt it.

That's why I launched the American Cornerstone Institute--what I call a "think tank / do tank" -- in order to continue this perilous fight to protect, shore up, and support American families. [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5656c9872b4e4e0986b9bf44c7287382&_e=R5O-A08QLpnajE-x59LsQT_jbhGkdiCCdBs7_cEEoo9AAcl7noVkec1OG6c0a_ULK2hSWyWHCLBNO5ICxAO3aSLUBvKclUcV96_T3Z2gvhWYkKD_YcFKcvBppGp7qkYKcUD-zGtb75uOyjP1krjwICAjJcx-dT_H19PYWN2TQh4ybR90RTEHVEMwkl7LS8wBgTJdRv3zGZZocMANZR4XrNNXtKmqwq0wVeYsIYuo2-dFLH2Tb5rWPD6GiwBMb7EtN5E8jtvKF8JsOMiZuYcQa8fXjBGtR6d-QDwYY1uG8B9p4R_yrfkr2to0t_ZZ2F5IfwhuYdW2pmbHBxP5xdUB-T5HpVG2hmZYSQ-fZ-IWmXdbDdssSXP_ybVYxVDNxxA7UgMo-n1ziSPUK1OIZIUR9A%3D%3D) Your gift of $100 or more to ACI today will help strengthen the bonds of our communities by lifting up the virtues of faith, liberty, community, and life.

Will you give today to support these cornerstone principles? They are essential to the success of our nation--principles that can be bolstered immeasurably and immediately by strengthening our families. To show my appreciation for your gift of $100 or more, you will receive an advanced signed copy of my new book "The Perilous Fight: Overcoming Our Culture's War on the American Family".

And to help pass down these important pillars to the next generation, I'lll also send you a free copy of my children's book "Why America Matters" that celebrates our great country and reminds us what a blessing it is to be an American.

You can make your secure gift here: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/the-perilous-fight](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5656c9872b4e4e0986b9bf44c7287382&_e=R5O-A08QLpnajE-x59LsQT_jbhGkdiCCdBs7_cEEoo9AAcl7noVkec1OG6c0a_ULK2hSWyWHCLBNO5ICxAO3aSLUBvKclUcV96_T3Z2gvhWYkKD_YcFKcvBppGp7qkYKcUD-zGtb75uOyjP1krjwICAjJcx-dT_H19PYWN2TQh4ybR90RTEHVEMwkl7LS8wBgTJdRv3zGZZocMANZR4XrNNXtKmqwq0wVeYsIYuo2-dFLH2Tb5rWPD6GiwBMb7Et3_lJ8D7KMVDXlCJmxmisS6K0vdEEZwRlR_RW1sDzrtbXoN2OShX-6qFTRyPVUY2r-i_Kl9yaqqGP79FM50WmIghpeedFtxyWVHQfNjLfp1JUT48Su_qNvkJXqiuQ-MaXFCDj8cd7EBPX1Kf3PF2CwA%3D%3D)

Thank you for your interest in preserving and strengthening America's families!

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=5656c9872b4e4e0986b9bf44c7287382&_t=5vrtInZLfvuSWEIHy2h_ZtEgtJ2msfLAWcrNp--u326GMVzQ23D18b48x1lRKDgZ5C3FGH1qaXUTRS-bfN6b7Vaokqt4KBUPVVTsYIqzDOo5uL9w5pWUzxd79fVs2H_8).

body:
| | | ****BREAKING:** Justice Sotomayor speaks out against the Supreme Court's _DISASTROUS_ Trump immunity ruling!**
[](http://go.dscc.org/go/18701?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=15762%2E9716520%2EI1rnGr)
**Stand with Justice Sotomayor:**[**Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition by MIDNIGHT to condemn the right-wing Supreme Court majority’s DISASTROUS decision to give Trump partial immunity >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/18701?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=15762%2E9716520%2EI1rnGr)
| | [Add My Name](http://go.dscc.org/go/18701?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=15762%2E9716520%2EI1rnGr)
---

Team -- Overturning _Roe_ wasn't enough for them. Striking down common sense gun laws wasn’t enough, either. No, this Supreme Court had to go even further: **The Trump-appointed majority just gave him partial _immunity_ from prosecution and a MASSIVE delay in his federal criminal trial.**

**But Justice Sotomayor is speaking out, and we MUST follow her example!**

We’ve launched an URGENT petition to stand with Justice Sotomayor and condemn the undemocratic actions of the Supreme Court's conservative majority -- but we need 65 more signatures in Pennsylvania, and we only have until midnight! **We must fight for what's right TODAY:**

[**Sign our URGENT Democratic petition to stand against the Supreme Court's immunity decision at this critical moment in American history >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/18701?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=15762%2E9716520%2EI1rnGr)
**_Goal: 250,000 signatures needed!_**[](http://go.dscc.org/go/18701?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=15762%2E9716520%2EI1rnGr) | [Add My Name](http://go.dscc.org/go/18701?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240706-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteTrumpReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=15762%2E9716520%2EI1rnGr)
---

Thank you for taking action,

Team DSCC

body:

We need to raise $4,500 in the next 24 hours to make sure our message gets through!** [WATCH AND DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387294/483933686/1122370109?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.07.06_FirstAdKick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg4YzU5Zi1jNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UjezXkvoN5558lcgzTIqGsusUBo4ePmn1PhdS39zzI=) “Do More.” Those two words are what drove me to run for office in the first place. In 2016, I was working at Planned Parenthood, raising the funds needed to elect pro-choice candidates and safeguard reproductive health care for millions of Americans. When Trump won the presidency, I knew he would add anti-abortion ideologues to the Supreme Court. I knew they would come after our freedoms. **I knew I had to DO MORE** – and for me, that meant running for the legislature and helping pass laws protecting our freedom at the state level. **Now, I have to DO MORE again.** I’m running to take the work I’ve done in _this_ Washington to the _other_ Washington, so we can protect the freedom of every American in every state. **If we raise $4,500 in the next 24 hours, we can start running our ad and reach voters across the District. Time is running out – please chip in now:** [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_er4c2024_fr_q32024**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387295/483933687/1122370109?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.07.06_FirstAdKick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg4YzU5Zi1jNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UjezXkvoN5558lcgzTIqGsusUBo4ePmn1PhdS39zzI=) Thank you so much 💙 – Emily
* * *
**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Peter, **We’ve got no time to waste. Two of our opponents, including anti-abortion Republican Drew MacEwen, have started running ads._Voting starts in 14 days!_** [_**So today, we’re excited to give you a special sneak peek of our first ad: “Do More.” Please watch the ad and chip in $25 or any amount to get it on the air!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387296/483933688/2063828459?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.07.06_FirstAdKick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg4YzU5Zi1jNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UjezXkvoN5558lcgzTIqGsusUBo4ePmn1PhdS39zzI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387297/483933689/2063828459?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.07.06_FirstAdKick_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg4YzU5Zi1jNTNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UjezXkvoN5558lcgzTIqGsusUBo4ePmn1PhdS39zzI=) **Washington’s 6th District is BIG. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Supreme Court just violated the principle that no one is above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter,

**This week the Supreme Court granted Donald Trump immunity for “official acts” he took as president.**

This decision is dangerous, anti-democratic, and unprecedented.

Trump promised that he would be a dictator on day one of a second term. Now, if he gets the opportunity, that is exactly what he will be.

Trump promised he would go after his political enemies, like those on the January 6th Committee.

With their 6-3 decision in _Trump v. United States_ , the Court’s ultra-conservative justices just rolled out the red carpet.

[**This extremist Supreme Court, with a majority of its justices appointed by Republican presidents who lost the popular vote, has issued a decision that will live in infamy. It is now clear that defeating Trump at the ballot box is our only way forward to save our democracy. subject: the need to improve healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caraveo for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387736/483935170/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGYzZDQwNi1jODNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UgTMmV_5-DOUELoKCLtuX7D5rxDdEaUU1azjspFEmc=&emci=33f3d406-c83b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=34f3d406-c83b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=12666102) Peter, more than 100 million Americans have healthcare-related debt. An estimated 18 million Americans can’t afford necessary medication. This story is personal to me, as a pediatrician, I saw firsthand countless families who could not afford necessary medication and were struggling to make ends meet. Families should never need to choose between putting food on the table and affording life-saving medication like insulin. [_**With a $10 donation, you can help me make healthcare more readily accessible for the millions of Americans who need it.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387737/483935171/-1837108903?refcode=email_070624_healthcare-crisis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGYzZDQwNi1jODNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UgTMmV_5-DOUELoKCLtuX7D5rxDdEaUU1azjspFEmc=) | | [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387738/483935172/-1837108903?refcode=email_070624_healthcare-crisis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGYzZDQwNi1jODNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UgTMmV_5-DOUELoKCLtuX7D5rxDdEaUU1azjspFEmc=)
---
I’m proud that while I was in the Colorado state legislature, I helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin and fought big pharma to lower prescription drug prices. In Congress, I am now working to increase transparency in hospital pricing and give Medicare the ability to negotiate drug prices.
Peter, I need your help to secure my seat and protect hardworking families struggling in our healthcare system. [_**Join me in our fight for affordable and equitable healthcare for all.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88387739/483935173/-1837108903?refcode=email_070624_healthcare-crisis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGYzZDQwNi1jODNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UgTMmV_5-DOUELoKCLtuX7D5rxDdEaUU1azjspFEmc=)

clean_body: Peter, more than 100 million Americans have healthcare-related debt. An estimated 18 million Americans can’t afford necessary medication. This story is personal to me, as a pediatrician, I saw firsthand countless families who could not afford necessary medication and were struggling to make ends meet. Families should never need to choose between putting food on the table and affording life-saving medication like insulin. = | | = I’m proud that while I was in the Colorado state legislature, I helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin and fought big pharma to lower prescription drug prices. In Congress, I am now working to increase transparency in hospital pricing and give Medicare the ability to negotiate drug prices. Peter, I need your help to secure my seat and protect hardworking families struggling in our healthcare system. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Yadira Caraveo | Make sure this email goes to your inbox.
