name: Survey Request (via Team Baccam)
subject: [1 Question Survey] Do you think Roe should be the law of the land?
body:
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Peter:

It’s been one week since our state’s Supreme Court upheld Zach Nunn’s extreme 6-week abortion ban, effectively making 98% of all abortions in the state illegal.

We’re devastated that thousands of Iowa women are actively being targeted and hurt by this law. Now more than ever, it’s critical that we codify Roe and protect women’s reproductive rights here in Iowa and across the country once and for all.

We value your opinion and would love to hear your thoughts on this critical issue. So we wanted you to weigh in, Peter:

Do you think abortion access should be federally enshrined in law?
YES! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/LBIA-03-Email-july2024-eng-iasc?refcode=E9281-20240628-IASupremeCourt-EG-Survey&amount=5]
NO! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/LBIA-03-Email-july2024-eng-iasc?refcode=E9281-20240628-IASupremeCourt-EG-Survey&amount=15]

Your feedback is crucial in understanding the perspectives of our community. Thank you for participating and making your voice heard.

— Team Baccam
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-july2024-fr-july?refcode=E9392-20240706-OneWeekSurvey-footer-Survey&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-july2024-fr-july?refcode=E9392-20240706-OneWeekSurvey-footer-Survey&amount=25]
Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. The 2022 election in Iowa’s Third was decided by less than seven-tenths of a percent - that's why CNN's Anderson Cooper has called this race a toss-up. Right now, we have a real opportunity to flip this district from red to blue — but we need your help to finish this fight and take back the House in 2024.

He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

We need to ensure we have what it takes to fight back and keep our campaign strong. The best way to show your support for Mondaire and help us build momentum is with a recurring donation. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Just $5.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3483%2E552475%2ExZtYMO)
Peter, it really is true.
**_We can make a difference with just $5._**
For just the price of a hoagie from Wawa or a few soft pretzels, you can make an impact in our campaign to keep Bob Casey in the Senate fighting for PA’s working families.
[**Can you please chip in $5 – or any amount you can – so we can stop David McCormick and make sure Bob continues fighting for all of us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240706-3?refcode=em20240706-3&recurring=1&refcode2=3483_552475_xZtYMO&akid=3483%2E552475%2ExZtYMO)
A donation of just $5 means:
* Continued efforts to organize across the Commonwealth.
* Ads on the airwaves to counter McCormick’s attacks.
* Getting out the vote and winning — _despite the millions our opponent and his Wall Street backers are pouring into this race._

For just the price of a hoagie from Wawa or a few soft pretzels, you can make an impact in our campaign to keep Bob Casey in the Senate fighting for PA’s working families. name: Jon Tester
subject: I don’t take my orders from super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
I won't lie, folks— I’m stressed out.
My finance director just told me that, not only have donations slowed down, but we’re still way behind on our mid-month goal. My first thought was what!? My second thought was that I should send you a message.
Before I get into the nitty-gritty of it, will you chip in a split donation with Seth Moulton ahead of our deadline? Your donation will fuel my grassroots campaign and help ensure we have the resources to win in November. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Even if it’s just the spare change from your dresser, donations of any amount go a long way in a campaign like ours.
I don’t take orders from super PACs or special interests, and I’m damn proud of it. I take my cues from the hardworking folks of Montana, and that’ll never change.
But since we rely entirely on your support, fundraising can be a big undertaking.
I need your help to stop Mitch McConnell and his wealthy friends from buying this election wholesale, so please:
Rush a split donation of any amount between our campaign and Seth Moulton so we can meet our goal and compete with the GOP money machine >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks for stepping up,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Get the truth about illegal immigration
body:
I’m sure you agree – our open southern border is a huge problem.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=48f6b963cf4b433ea3f5aeac25c5ec01&_t=KHbvyL8DWuzH94SJNYDlimQFAnWz7eZMbHHQ18sNxqNFFDMPt9GbpfWOpEnEc8RBh6C6cNjdVRCUM08mYg2UU3ah7oLMElOMSAI4zDmA1zr5i1bh0ZucjDI3mYP1XlHw)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=48f6b963cf4b433ea3f5aeac25c5ec01&_e=zWMWjXxQwveko1QXIBF9JCwym8EVBfF3GfznZhiIeurrJNpWVnZsylpkkSkHlentGCgJwJiBOUP-qkhi4Yh0G0c52QqcidcXOLS0KaBOwq5YRYTDFq8z9szyBlULziXa_blRJsbaLh6IxPz38s7aX5Utp56dFNsTiuVVqyxwGC8x5EfFJTstVJPp5SazZzBHYe3wSVn34slII7bLFSMZ58Y4IZwzUlDE_loWbmVFcc90XrxAWUEMxWGUkxbvgWuWh86Du_RaQr9P5WzR_UiCxLeMW08_r2zhzAhYMcPPMlb8AgkvmA9fDucQgVWctUy4L_bv_QYFthCqb6NFNIEzwo97mV1uRGFmwpcdXq84WMcVmx34i1BUmUKGDcsxp5bj)
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm sure you agree - our open southern border is a huge problem.

Patriots like you should be equipped with the facts and figures on just how much damage illegal immigration does to our country.

**That 's why my team put together this free eBook called _The Real Costs of America 's Border Crisis_.**
---
|
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=48f6b963cf4b433ea3f5aeac25c5ec01&_e=zWMWjXxQwveko1QXIBF9JCwym8EVBfF3GfznZhiIeurrJNpWVnZsylpkkSkHlentGCgJwJiBOUP-qkhi4Yh0G0c52QqcidcXOLS0KaBOwq5YRYTDFq8z9szyBlULziXa_blRJsbaLh6IxPz38s7aX5Utp56dFNsTiuVVqyxwGC8x5EfFJTstVJPp5SazZzBHYe3wSVn34slII7bLFSMZ58Y4IZwzUlDE_loWbmVFcc_zaiSAzkk3Ul8m_ALkXSXv8b1a-xj1P7TQJ4A4eqMCkk3evvWgIaFi1FC6QCthcWERdW_xvwUCV8m8gUc2UaiAVjEvwdHEVOS2kgXmVoQuvAmMUV1JrwH-erpHcUkyv11I-k7wQdZyaNUycWCxJX9Z)
---
| | This free resource details the concrete costs to America's economy, education system, and society thanks to mass illegal immigration, not to mention the death of American citizens we've seen in the news lately.

It also provides policy solutions to these issues from Heritage Foundation experts. We promote these solutions everyday thanks to our members.

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/the-real-costs-of-americas-border-crisis/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=48f6b963cf4b433ea3f5aeac25c5ec01&_e=zWMWjXxQwveko1QXIBF9JCwym8EVBfF3GfznZhiIeurrJNpWVnZsylpkkSkHlentGCgJwJiBOUP-qkhi4Yh0G0c52QqcidcXOLS0KaBOwq5YRYTDFq8z9szyBlULziXa_blRJsbaLh6IxPz38s7aX5Utp56dFNsTiuVVqyxwGC8x5EfFJTstVJPp5SazZzBHYe3wSVn34slII7bLFSMZ58Y4IZwzUlDE_loWbmVFcc8h7EmQbQ_bNczrJAVuuA9Vkb3vetziinRI0AmLt_PoAKvQmnbOfz2YeU5C1uQ_oOikw7vJQNqwmqmPxmiQzV3dGwsWpjmw7CEVa-qwmtsphiozcmcs8hVEdmD4Lf-LDKpu7SK9TY5et3El2qap7-Se)

When leftists that you know try to dismiss the costs of illegal immigration, I hope this resource provides the intellectual ammunition needed to prove just how bad illegal immigration is for our country.

**Please download your free copy of _The Real Costs of America 's Border Crisis_ using this secure link right now: [https://secured.heritage.org/the-real-costs-of-americas-border-crisis/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=48f6b963cf4b433ea3f5aeac25c5ec01&_e=zWMWjXxQwveko1QXIBF9JCwym8EVBfF3GfznZhiIeurrJNpWVnZsylpkkSkHlentGCgJwJiBOUP-qkhi4Yh0G0c52QqcidcXOLS0KaBOwq5YRYTDFq8z9szyBlULziXa_blRJsbaLh6IxPz38s7aX5Utp56dFNsTiuVVqyxwGC8x5EfFJTstVJPp5SazZzBHYe3wSVn34slII7bLFSMZ58Y4IZwzUlDE_loWbmVFcc_KLIplFisC2dVJHpxu4xKwONi8KGw2xflhp_EsnyWLfGWo_CXlox_5EYNUSLnO6tKdvY4AZUifrh-lxinW8kEn6X7syiWLrT2SZVBJlxkcmeZ2okoOWF5vF8M9epf0pIm9ikpp6wv-sM9-yVlh3ets)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

Hey Peter. My name is Trisha Calvarese.
I am the official Democratic nominee against Lauren Boebert – and in a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign to help me defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue. But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important.
When Boebert realized she wasn’t going to win re-election in her home district, she moved to mine thinking it would be an easy win. She was wrong.
We have a chance to defeat Lauren Boebert and finally end her ridiculous career in politics. **In 2022, she only won by 546 votes – and the polls show I can finish the job in 2024 and send her packing!**
Plus, if we do defeat Boebert and turn this seat blue, Democrats are _virtually guaranteed_ to take back the House in November!

But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important. = Hey Peter. My name is Trisha Calvarese. I am the official Democratic nominee against Lauren Boebert – and in a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign to help me defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue. But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important. When Boebert realized she wasn’t going to win re-election in her home district, she moved to mine thinking it would be an easy win. She was wrong. We have a chance to defeat Lauren Boebert and finally end her ridiculous career in politics. In 2022, she only won by 546 votes – and the polls show I can finish the job in 2024 and send her packing! Together with locked arms, we brought down street homelessness for the first time in years – bringing thousands more people inside last year than the year before. We cut the timeline to build affordable housing by 75%, implemented a comprehensive approach to make L.A. safer, and ushered in a sea change in how the city works with the county, the state and the federal governments to secure hundreds of millions dollars for climate, public safety and housing initiatives.
I am running for a second term because we cannot stop bringing change to L.A. Working people and our small businesses are counting on us to change the status quo. LA’s seniors are counting on us to protect them. And our children are counting on us to confront climate change.
I know the spirit and the fight of this city. And I know we can accomplish big things when we are united.
**[Team, our work is not done. Continue our movement by becoming a Founding Donor today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88389926/483943217/-1118617100?refcode=AU_KRB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODlmYWM1NS1kMjNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TCCnghUmXG5-h2UVBZayZbCpW6WUZxyACADopyu5AEs=)**
From leading city departments to respond to 100,000 more service calls for things like potholes and graffiti, to weathering a tropical storm, to rebuilding the 10 freeway in 10 days, there is nothing we cannot do if we keep working together.
Let’s keep moving LA forward.
With Gratitude,
Karen Bass

French President Emmanuel Macron’s government may be in for trouble in
the country’s last round of parliamentary elections this coming
Sunday. France is going into its second round of snap elections on

clean_body: Trump Train News ‘Would Come To An End’: France’s Liberal Darling President May Have A Real Problem On His Hands French President Emmanuel Macron’s government may be in for trouble in the country’s last round of parliamentary elections this coming Sunday. France is going into its second round of snap elections on Sunday to determine the makeup of the country’s National Assembly, which wields significant power and legislative authority. **Tim Sheehy has been lying to Montanans, and I’m sick of it. **
He’s been trying to trick Montanans into believing that he grew up rural, when he actually grew up in a multi-million dollar lakehouse. He’s just another wealthy outsider buying up Montana and making things more expensive for the rest of us.
**Mitch McConnell wants to run a wannabe cowboy against a third-generation dirt farmer?_Bring it on._**
Right now, polls are tightening and dark money groups are set to spend record breaking amounts to unseat me. If you don’t step up with a donation to help us fight back, we could lose this election.

I’m proud to run a campaign that is powered by a grassroots team made up of hardworking people like you. I know we wouldn’t have gotten this far if we weren’t in this together.

name: Truth to Power
subject: Here’s why we’re supporting Andy Kim for Senate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38967%2E3422442%2E_xhYMF)
Derek, here’s why we’re supporting Andy Kim for Senate:
Katie Porter launched Truth to Power to elect leaders who will stand up to the corporate special interests, lobbyists, and corrupt politicians who have dominated our government for far too long.
**Andy Kim fits that bill.**
**[If you want to help us send Andy Kim to the United States Senate, will you split a donation between his campaign and Truth to Power today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240706-kim?refcode=em20240706-38967&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38967_3422442__xhYMF&akid=38967%2E3422442%2E_xhYMF)**
Like Katie, Andy was first elected to Congress in 2018. And, like Katie, Andy has refused to accept **any** corporate PAC money from the start.
When it comes to standing up to corrupt politicians, Andy Kim is the real deal. Heck, the entire reason he launched his campaign for Senate was to unseat an incumbent who took bribes (and who wound up getting slapped with _18 indictments_).
Andy Kim’s campaign gives us one of our best opportunities to elect someone who shares our values — someone who will stand up for the people against wealthy interests and corrupt politicians.
**[If you agree, please consider making a donation today — your gift will be split evenly between Andy Kim’s Senate campaign and Truth to Power.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240706-kim?refcode=em20240706-38967&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38967_3422442__xhYMF&akid=38967%2E3422442%2E_xhYMF)**
Thank you so much!
Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20240706-38967&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38967_3422442__xhYMF&akid=38967%2E3422442%2E_xhYMF)**

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38967%2E3422442%2E_xhYMF).

clean_body: Derek, here’s why we’re supporting Andy Kim for Senate: Katie Porter launched Truth to Power to elect leaders who will stand up to the corporate special interests, lobbyists, and corrupt politicians who have dominated our government for far too long. Andy Kim fits that bill. Like Katie, Andy was first elected to Congress in 2018. And, like Katie, Andy has refused to accept any corporate PAC money from the start. When it comes to standing up to corrupt politicians, Andy Kim is the real deal. Heck, the entire reason he launched his campaign for Senate was to unseat an incumbent who took bribes (and who wound up getting slapped with 18 indictments). Andy Kim’s campaign gives us one of our best opportunities to elect someone who shares our values — someone who will stand up for the people against wealthy interests and corrupt politicians. Thank you so much! Truth to Power Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. Paid for by Truth to Power PAC

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: West Philly Affordable Housing Update
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100168197.172579.426&gen=1).

---
| | | | |
#
# **West Philly Affordable Housing Update**
_We 're proud to share an update about a new affordable housing project in Mantua that is being supported by state investments Senator Hughes helped secure! _ Earlier this summer, Habitat for Humanity broke ground on 4 new affordable homes that will be built and sold to first-time homebuyers. The housing units, located at 40th and Reno, will include 3 bedrooms and 1.5 baths, with one unit providing wheelchair accessibility. **" Housing is fundamental. Without a home, a safe and welcoming place to lay your head at night, it's very difficult to maintain a job, get an education, and take care of a family. When we make affordable housing a priority, we set the stage for a domino effect of opportunity and upward progress in our neighborhoods."** **\- Senator Hughes -**
* * *
Every new home built by Habitat Philadelphia means a first-time homebuyer can access the opportunity to own a home and create strength, stability and self-reliance for themselves and their families. Habitat sells new homes with zero-interest mortgages to buyers making between 30-80% of the Area Median Income, creating equity and a foundation for families to thrive. **INCOME ELIGIBILITY** **[Habitat Philadelphia anticipates the new West Philly units will be finished n](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168197.172579.426&gen=1&mailing_linkid=11250)[ext year](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168197.172579.426&gen=1&mailing_linkid=11250).** To learn more about [Habitat's Homeownership Program and how to apply for the new units, visit their website](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168197.172579.426&gen=1&mailing_linkid=11252).
---

Please make sure you take a minute to read this email about this week's Supreme Court ruling. | | |
---
Let’s be clear, Peter: It is one of the foundational principles of our system of justice that _no one_ is above the law. That was the case until the United States Supreme Court granted Donald Trump wide-reaching immunity for his actions as president. As a former prosecutor and district attorney, I know this is a big deal. In Donald Trump, we have a candidate who has openly said he will be a dictator on day one and that he will weaponize the Department of Justice against his political enemies. And it is very likely that he could be _immune_ from those kind of acts. **_Immune, Peter._** We have to take seriously the stakes of this election. The Donald Trump running for office right now is not the same one that we ran against in 2020. He is more unhinged. He is more dangerous. _And he has nothing to lose._ _If Donald Trump wins four more years in the White House, not even the courts will hold him back. It’s what he wanted. It’s why he hand-picked three justices for the Court who helped deliver this decision._ [**How we respond in this moment matters. _He proudly took responsibility for robbing women of their freedom to make decisions about what happens to their own bodies.
He would not disavow what happened on January 6.
He refused to commit to accepting the election results this November._
We cannot let him win four more years in the White House. If he does, there will be nothing holding him back.

clean_body: Please make sure you take a minute to read this email about this week's Supreme Court ruling. | | | Let’s be clear, Peter: It is one of the foundational principles of our system of justice that no one is above the law. That was the case until the United States Supreme Court granted Donald Trump wide-reaching immunity for his actions as president. As a former prosecutor and district attorney, I know this is a big deal. In Donald Trump, we have a candidate who has openly said he will be a dictator on day one and that he will weaponize the Department of Justice against his political enemies. And it is very likely that he could be immune from those kind of acts. Immune, Peter. We have to take seriously the stakes of this election. The Donald Trump running for office right now is not the same one that we ran against in 2020. He is more unhinged. He is more dangerous. And he has nothing to lose. If Donald Trump wins four more years in the White House, not even the courts will hold him back. It’s what he wanted. It’s why he hand-picked three justices for the Court who helped deliver this decision. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Donald Trump has shown us who he is. Look at what happened at the debate. Trump lied over and over and over again as he is wont to do. He proudly took responsibility for robbing women of their freedom to make decisions about what happens to their own bodies. He would not disavow what happened on January 6. He refused to commit to accepting the election results this November. We cannot let him win four more years in the White House. If he does, there will be nothing holding him back. We can hold Donald Trump accountable at the ballot box. We did it once in 2020, and we can do it again now. We must do it again now. Thank you for rising to this moment, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States

name: Justin Amash, Candidate for U.S. Senate
subject: Freedom and opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTIN AMASH FOR SENATE © 2024 Justin Amash for Senate — All Rights Reserved
body:
What an awesome Independence Day. Nothing revives my spirit and hope for this country quite like the Fourth of July. I'm extraordinarily thankful to be an American. I love this country, which opened its doors to my immigrant parents when they were young, allowing them to enjoy the blessings of freedom and opportunity that so many countries lack.

| | | [ ](www.justinamash.com)
---
Friend, What an awesome Independence Day. Nothing revives my spirit and hope for this country quite like the Fourth of July. I'm extraordinarily thankful to be an American. I love this country, which opened its doors to my immigrant parents when they were young, allowing them to enjoy the blessings of freedom and opportunity that so many countries lack. That's why I'm so committed to following the Constitution and defending liberty: I want to preserve this country's promise for future generations. **And there's nothing that brings it all home like the celebration and energy of Independence Day parades.** It was an honor this year to see so many friends, old and new, and to feel such support from the people of Michigan. Thank you so much to all the volunteers who came out to be a part of it—and literally ran from parade to parade with us!—and to all the supporters I met along the routes. **The pictures tell the story. We’re winning. Let’s keep it up through August 6, and then it’s on to November!**
Justin Amash
---

---
**Peter, the housing crisis is _personal_ to me.** Personal enough that I went to the Florida State Capitol myself to demand action – and I’m not stopping there.

Listen, I was priced out of my home while running for Congress, and was houseless for two months. When I made it to Congress and moved to D.C, I was denied from multiple apartment buildings because unfair housing policies tanked my credit. There was no way to win.

And it isn’t just me – this crisis is impacting my entire generation. Americans used to literally buy homes at my age. _Now, we can’t even afford to rent an apartment._

**Our housing system is clearly broken. But we don’t have to accept broken systems, or wait for Republicans who clearly don’t give a damn to change their tune. Housing IS a human right, and I won’t stop fighting until our basic needs are met.**

Trouble is, the same special interests behind this crisis are desperate to keep people like me out of Congress, where we can actually fight back with policy. **I need your help to hold this seat and hold them back, so I have to ask:**

[**_Will you donate $27 right now to help hit my weekly fundraising goal? Every dollar has the power to keep me fighting for all of us in Congress, and I know we can make actual change together. Please, chip in now! >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/pnvpIZ4WU4D30Ibjul_PsA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRobDgdP0TSaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDcwNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9ob3VzaW5nY3Jpc2lzX2VuX3JzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJpaHZxVlUxRGg4blBJMjFPZWEzZjN3RU5QSSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yaWh2cVZVMURoOG5QSTIxT2VhM2Yzd0VOUEkmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmlodnFWVTFEaDhuUEkyMU9lYTNmM3dFTlBJVwNzcGNCCmZ_HbOJZgVYHNxSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Respectfully.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by End Citizens United-Nonfederal
body:
Sorry to be so blunt, but if we’re going to win in Arizona we cannot have bad days. We can’t miss our goals. And we absolutely can’t afford to have a prolonged slowdown like the one we’re in right now.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN)
---
Friends, we’re at a bit of a loss here.

We’ve tried explaining the stakes of this election.

We’ve tried explaining how critical every single one of our fundraising deadlines are.

We’ve tried explaining how Arizona is the lynchpin we need to hold control of the U.S. Senate.

And we’ve tried over and over again to emphasize how dangerous, how damaging Kari Lake would be if she gained any more power and influence than she already has.

But still, our fundraising is down — not by a little bit, either. We’re having one of the worst slowdowns of the entire campaign at the exact moment that Kari Lake and her team are ramping up.

She’s raking in cash and she will use every dollar of it to beat us and impose her radical agenda.

Sorry to be so blunt, but if we’re going to win in Arizona we cannot have bad days. We can’t miss our goals. And we absolutely can’t afford to have a prolonged slowdown like the one we’re in right now.

We know we’ve asked a lot of you, and that these are incredibly trying times — but we can’t stop here. We’re asking you, respectfully, if you can chip in to Ruben Gallego’s campaign. We really need your help. [**Make a split donation between Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats and our campaign before we lose our edge and cede any more ground to Kari Lake and the MAGA-right in Arizona. She’s right on our heels, and we can’t slip any further than we already have.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46055?t=7&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46056?t=8&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46057?t=9&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46058?t=10&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46059?t=11&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/46055?t=12&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN)
If you can chip in today, you have our word that we will use every dollar you give to take back Arizona’s seat in the U.S. Senate, defeat Kari Lake, and keep Trump out of the White House. That’s a promise.

Thank you,

Team Gallego
Ruben Gallego is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Ruben Gallego is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources. fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=21663%2E4449941%2EXiIUdN).**

And we’ve tried over and over again to emphasize how dangerous, how damaging Kari Lake would be if she gained any more power and influence than she already has. But still, our fundraising is down — not by a little bit, either. We’re having one of the worst slowdowns of the entire campaign at the exact moment that Kari Lake and her team are ramping up. She’s raking in cash and she will use every dollar of it to beat us and impose her radical agenda. Sorry to be so blunt, but if we’re going to win in Arizona we cannot have bad days. name: Bob Casey (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: BREAKING: My opponent is blanketing PA with ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
I can’t win this election without you.

|
#
---
_Aloha Peter, this is Mazie. Please read this urgent email from my friend Bob Casey. We must win his seat to protect our Democratic Senate majority, so please take a moment to read this message and split a donation between our campaigns if you can._
* * *
Peter, I wanted you to hear it from me first: **My opponent just launched his first attack ad against me across Pennsylvania in an attempt to flip this battleground and retake the Senate majority. ** **[To fight back, we need all hands on deck. Will you split $10 or more between my campaign and Mazie right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88392276/483951370/1468470916?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDI3OThjZS1kYzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_H-TFQpCYLAd5C_teRcVoUBm0XA7lplWdGcMVt0ICRk=)** It’s clear that national Republicans are trying to buy this Senate seat. Together, GOP super PACs have booked nearly $75 million in ads targeting me, and it’s only July. With the Senate and the White House hinging on Pennsylvania, we can’t afford to be drowned out on the airwaves. But unlike my mega-millionaire opponent, who’s being bankrolled by billionaires, this campaign is powered by folks like you, Peter. **[I need your help if we’re going to win this election and keep Pennsylvania blue, so I’m asking: Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Mazie to help us show my opponent this seat can’t be bought?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88392277/483951371/1468470916?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDI3OThjZS1kYzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_H-TFQpCYLAd5C_teRcVoUBm0XA7lplWdGcMVt0ICRk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mazie Hirono and Bob Casey will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88392278/483951372/1468470916?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDI3OThjZS1kYzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_H-TFQpCYLAd5C_teRcVoUBm0XA7lplWdGcMVt0ICRk=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Supreme Court just violated the principle that no one is above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team,

**This week the Supreme Court granted Donald Trump _immunity_ for “official acts” he took as president.

This decision is dangerous, anti-democratic, and unprecedented.**

Trump promised that he would be a dictator on day one of a second term. Now, if he gets the opportunity, that is exactly what he will be.

Trump promised he would go after his political enemies, like those on the January 6th Committee.

With their 6-3 decision in _Trump v. United States,_ the Court’s ultra-conservative justices just rolled out the red carpet.

[This extremist Supreme Court, with a majority of its justices appointed by Republican presidents who lost the popular vote, has issued a decision that will live in infamy. It is now clear that defeating Trump at the ballot box is our only way forward to save our democracy. Please rush a split $10 donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help me respond to this shocking Supreme Court decision by redoubling our efforts to win this Senate race, defend the majority, win back the House, and defeat Trump.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71349?t=6&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71350?t=7&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71351?t=8&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71352?t=9&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71353?t=10&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71349?t=11&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
This shocking, destructive decision that Donald Trump **will have immunity for official acts** validates the former president’s attempts to undermine our democracy.

It flies in the face of our founding principles that no one, not even the president, is above the law.

If our leaders can be immune from liability for criminal acts like overturning the outcome of an election, it may be the end of our republic.

It’s shameful, it’s dangerous, and the Court knows it.

This partisan Supreme Court just doesn’t care — and worse, the extremist justices are _actively empowering a president to be a king._

Our country is in grave danger if we allow any president to stay in power after losing and being held immune from consequences.

**It is clearer than ever that the _first_ and _last_ line of defense for our democracy is the ballot box, not the courts.

This November, we must put an end to Trump’s dictatorial ambitions once and for all. It’s up to all of us.**

[Please chip in a split donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help me stop Trump and his partisan enablers on the Supreme Court from seizing control over our democracy. There may never be a more important election for the future of American democracy than the one before us right now.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71349?t=12&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71350?t=13&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71351?t=14&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71352?t=15&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71353?t=16&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71349?t=17&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)
Thank you.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=15452%2E878179%2EXpltnG)

clean_body: | Friend — During Jason’s victory speech in 2018, he pledged to put country over party and usher a new generation of leadership to Congress. That work starts in Colorado. Meet Yadira Caraveo: = Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo (D) is running for re-election in CO-08 — and her race could decide the House majority. Donald Trump’s allies spent more than $10 million to try and take her seat in 2022. But thanks to thousands of grassroots supporters like you, she won by 1 percentage point. = This race is expected to be another nailbiter: Colorado Republicans nominated Trump-endorsed extremist Gabe Evans to take on Yadira, and a top MAGA Super PAC has pledged $5.1 million worth of television ads in the district — with even more on the way. The House majority runs straight through Yadira’s seat in CO-08, which is why Jason is working to help her win re-election. We have 4 months to beat back Republican attacks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Yadira Caraveo and Jason Crow and processed immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Crow = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m proud of this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| _Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my colleague Jon Tester. Jon is running for reelection in Montana to defend our Senate majority, so I hope you'll read his message and[chip in, if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=2947%2E35263%2EkGoJOI)_ [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2947%2E35263%2EkGoJOI) Can I explain something, Peter? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. **In fact, I’m very proud to be the U.S. Senate’s only working dirt farmer.** Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy—but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. **And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.** [**That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 between Tammy Baldwin and my campaign today to help us defend Montana’s Senate seat. Anything you can give makes a difference.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=tbe-em-tester.NEM0VG&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2947%2E35263%2EkGoJOI) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-tester.5zk3A_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240706_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2947%2E35263%2EkGoJOI)

— Jon

This isn't how I wanted to start the month, friend. I just met with my finance team, and there’s no easy way to say this: **We’re falling dangerously short of our 48-hour TV ads goal. **
And to make matters worse, we’re also at risk of being outspent by the GOP. Republicans know this race _will determine_ __ Senate control – **and they’re doing everything they can to defeat me, including spending record-breaking amounts on attack ads.**
**_[We need to keep up if we're going to win. That’s why we need to close our $32,684 budget gap before midnight to get back on track. Will you chip in $5 now to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88393700/483955749/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2147-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2JlYmJjYy1lMzNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LdRAYZMb16kLbhQ5T18kdlrAOirtlWmggMd7anOg7Q0=)_**

Friend, I wouldn't ask if it weren't urgent. What we raise now – not in November – will decide whether or not we keep this seat and our Democratic majority. And with everything from the Dignity of Work to reproductive freedom on the line, Democrats can't afford to lose even one seat this fall. Keeping the Senate blue really is our last firewall against the MAGA agenda.

**Unlike my self-funding opponent, I can't write my campaign million-dollar checks. I'm running a true grassroots campaign, which means I'm counting on folks like you chipping in to get us across the finish line.**

Thank you,

**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown:** Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work. Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. name: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
subject: My Promise: Ending the Forever Wars
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
It's time to bring our focus home.

|
---
| | | | [**It's time to bring our focus home.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_6_24_nd1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_6_24_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_6_24_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_6_24_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
_This is our moment to bend the arc of history towards peace._
I stand before you at a pivotal moment, where our choice will not only define America's path but also our legacy in the world. It's time to embrace a profound transformation in how we define strength and leadership on the global stage.
Our nation has reached its limit on what military dominance can achieve. We've spent nearly one trillion dollars annually on defense while our cities, railways, and water systems crumble, and our economy falters.
We have neglected our communities and our infrastructure for too long, and it's time to bring our focus home.
As President, I am committed to revitalizing the true sources of our strength. The commitment to end America's role as the world's policeman is not just a policy—it's a promise.
| | **"America can not be an empire abroad and continue to be democracy at home."**
---
—Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
The crisis in Ukraine exemplifies the urgent need for change.
My goal is clear: to bring peace to the Ukrainian people, not to use them as pawns in a larger game. I will work tirelessly for a diplomatic resolution that respects the independence and freedom of the Ukrainian people, setting a precedent for how America engages with the world.
Inspired by the unfulfilled promise of my uncle, President John F. Kennedy, we will strive to dismantle the old paradigms of Cold War thinking and imperial overreach.
Finally, it is crucial to recognize that corrupt systems within our government have perpetuated war for profit by fostering division among us, maintaining control by keeping us at war with each other. This destructive cycle must end.
We will lead by example, promoting peace and championing the dignity of all nations and peoples. We will bring our troops home and halt the endless cycle of unnecessary conflicts that drain our nation's resources and morale.
Our military will return to its noblest duty: defending our borders and securing our peace.
[This is more than a campaign; it's a movement to redefine American greatness through the power of peace and integrity.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_6_24_nd1&n=5)
[End Forever Wars](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_forever_wars_7_6_24_nd1&n=6)
Your generous gift will help me heal our nation and inspire the world.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
|

Why the next four years matter -- now more than ever before. | | |
---
Peter -- This week, conservative justices on the Supreme Court awarded Donald Trump virtually unlimited immunity for his actions on Jan. 6, when he encouraged a violent mob to storm the Capitol in an attempt to overthrow the results of a free and fair election. Their reasoning? Trump was acting in his “official capacity” as president, which they’ve decided gives him the ability to do essentially whatever he wants even if it means tearing apart our democracy in the process. We all saw -- with our own eyes -- what took place on that dark day. Trump stood by and did nothing, and brave police officers died. As a country, we cannot stand to relive that. **But if Trump is elected for another four years, it is entirely possible that we will.** [That’s why we need you with us today, Peter. If you’ve been looking for the right moment to donate to Joe Biden’s reelection campaign, this is it. Everything is on the line -- our fundamental rights and our democracy as we know it. Pitch in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today to stand with President Biden and Vice President Harris and make sure that Trump never steps foot in the White House again.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jwo48Pzlh6he5y-OY0IheoZ4AGRvoA3kojih8fbzGC_njPS8OWC0MoTAB7_M3Jy0BZc6w2xkIBJI3xgq05g6kguzYFIOGMVHwsOKc8gdC3ZihYg3YzqskNI8lXt_X8_lD-MlVbKnR7pQ94bOijtS9GRxbGgILilvKm_wgwikQG6a6YInNbhFvjT2uGkKPhbNs3jv_6e1242usUkSHHAPwhgklEohR_XxPpF-2Mc_T4wgqARqIEm6MzksqvjBVTU3dHyovdMvE3gTiclrqbRkmmTTmUpEjiw_TKgvXE4jiwPZmSFfxaZ9K7e7awRyumOFht6gn_lfnCNjPRlCgjmnkejAxcdbLyOJ9l_DS8IdlXUNqweQ6LIA54p_vGgA5-_l5vyDTM4i_fYKAy6N6eS-gnJPHm30DTJTgN0tKn3J9PRVfIKjNDFXXWHlhMe0nSCW3ymdJb2yHcTv3RcPJn6zR8wxJZiuD-C3smyf7fiKAqH7Q/47t/uQ-OIIfoRU-txglaC393LQ/h0/h001.pvWqLtJNwmwz-ji5azps9mMy1_jwWErNlqJVJ7ifcO4) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Respectfully.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Sorry to be so blunt, but if we’re going to win in Arizona we cannot have bad days. We can’t miss our goals. And we absolutely can’t afford to have a prolonged slowdown like the one we’re in right now. |
---
Peter, we’re at a bit of a loss here.

We’ve tried explaining the stakes of this election.

We’ve tried explaining how critical every single one of our fundraising deadlines are.

We’ve tried explaining how Arizona is the lynchpin we need to hold control of the U.S. Senate.

And we’ve tried over and over again to emphasize how dangerous, how damaging Kari Lake would be if she gained any more power and influence than she already has.

But still, our fundraising is down — not by a little bit, either. We’re having one of the worst slowdowns of the entire campaign at the exact moment that Kari Lake and her team are ramping up.

She’s raking in cash and she will use every dollar of it to beat us and impose her radical agenda.

Sorry to be so blunt, but if we’re going to win in Arizona we cannot have bad days. We can’t miss our goals. And we absolutely can’t afford to have a prolonged slowdown like the one we’re in right now.

We know we’ve asked a lot of you, and that these are incredibly trying times — but we can’t stop here. We’re asking you, respectfully, if you can chip in to Ruben Gallego’s campaign. We really need your help.

clean_body: Sorry to be so blunt, but if we’re going to win in Arizona we cannot have bad days. We can’t miss our goals. And we absolutely can’t afford to have a prolonged slowdown like the one we’re in right now. | Peter, we’re at a bit of a loss here. We’ve tried explaining the stakes of this election. We’ve tried explaining how critical every single one of our fundraising deadlines are. We’ve tried explaining how Arizona is the lynchpin we need to hold control of the U.S. Senate. And we’ve tried over and over again to emphasize how dangerous, how damaging Kari Lake would be if she gained any more power and influence than she already has. But still, our fundraising is down — not by a little bit, either. We’re having one of the worst slowdowns of the entire campaign at the exact moment that Kari Lake and her team are ramping up. She’s raking in cash and she will use every dollar of it to beat us and impose her radical agenda. Sorry to be so blunt, but if we’re going to win in Arizona we cannot have bad days. We can’t miss our goals. And we absolutely can’t afford to have a prolonged slowdown like the one we’re in right now. We know we’ve asked a lot of you, and that these are incredibly trying times — but we can’t stop here. We’re asking you, respectfully, if you can chip in to Ruben Gallego’s campaign. We really need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = If you can chip in today, you have our word that we will use every dollar you give to take back Arizona’s seat in the U.S. Senate, defeat Kari Lake, and keep Trump out of the White House. That’s a promise. Thank you, Team Gallego ****** **** **** **** **** ****** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Martin Sheen. As a former "acting" president of the United States, I'd like to talk about what your support could mean for the country you and I both love.

**[But if you only have a minute, all I'll ask is that you donate $5 _(matched to become $15)_ to help defend our Senate majority and make a difference for our Democratic agenda.](https://go.dscc.org/go/18719?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240706-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240706-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&akid=15738%2E9716520%2EPgdxSD)**

**I've said before that acting is what I do for a living, but activism is what I do to stay alive. $5 may not sound like a lot, but I've seen time and time again that each of us pitching in a little will make a BIG difference together -- and right now, my friends at the DSCC need that exact kind of help from Democrats like us.**

Here's why: Republicans are just two seats away from retaking the Senate, and they're willing to spend millions to erase our _razor-thin_ Democratic majority. The future of our country could be decided by critical races in battleground states like Nevada, Ohio, or Pennsylvania.

We can't leave anything to chance. Everything from health care to climate change is on the ballot and Democrats simply can't win without your support to **out-raise** , **out-organize** , and **out-campaign** the Republicans.

**This request is so important that for a limited time, a group of donors will _personally_ triple your gift. [So please join me by rushing $5 _(becomes $15)_ to defend our Democratic Senate majority and keep moving America forward >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/18719?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240706-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240706-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&akid=15738%2E9716520%2EPgdxSD)**

name: Team Schiff
subject: “With fear for our democracy, I dissent.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6972%2E5257348%2EiPHUV1 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Supreme
Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor’s dissent encapsulated so much of what we’ve
long feared about the partisan tilt of the Supreme Court — and its
enabling of Trump’s authoritarian impulses:

“Order the Navy’s Seal Team 6 to assassinate a political rival? Immune.

Organize a military coup to hold onto power? Immune.

Take a bribe in exchange for a pardon? Immune.

Immune, immune, immune.

With fear for our democracy, I dissent.”

Trump’s MAGA senators helped him ram through THREE Supreme Court nominees
that they confirmed to the Court — all of whom joined the 6-3 majority in
granting Trump immunity.

It’s clear how important the Senate majority is to defending against the
worst impulses of an authoritarian president — and to providing a final
backstop that could prevent our democracy from being torn into oblivion.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2024_abs_em.oAIbuh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240706_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1004&akid=6972%2E5257348%2EiPHUV1 ]That’s why Adam’s Senate race and defense of the Senate majority is so
important. Please chip in
$5 to
help him defeat Trump and keep the Senate blue.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:
With the Supreme Court’s decisions involving the Jan. 6th defendants, abortion access, gun safety, and Trump’s immunity, we’d like to hear what this grassroots movement thinks. Will you take our poll? | | |
---
| |
---|---
Recent rulings have raised questions about the ultra-conservative Supreme Court. From limiting prosecution against insurrectionists to granting Trump immunity for official acts, there’s a lot to digest. **We value your opinion, and want to hear what this grassroots movement thinks about the Supreme Court’s performance this term.** [ Will you take a moment to share your thoughts in our quick poll? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5Lkp5lOCwikP-XCX5D9XT1Gs1NbmWdVuRjD_cXPBn3BcvBAxACw6qkNG6VEl2LNgFfeEIgBLuxAxXXLwfE9FYhClzN-2CC3TtDaurAi8viLcWDKLU_VO72Z6JzX44J8lLjJaUUEnefNjyse20IqaDQ7tPy0ICKET465ypEdtrrICrx_GHnR6GQkUQDA_6quSNOfG4xn3DD2xffLEMflyYQCP-jTKAmKvicaN1jwmJMlYy_apQ2hBI_kLTg2UAnIEKd_6c5prTAEPiY_2E5PAYv_PRD3YAaux7klcGsJDn_y5NthTdVhEL2h96IqBy1REyRsQBgZPutQrHST8ZjS1fs/47t/GiukCXAuTLK7UBgQDqeOFg/h0/h001.UshLeHpzeKkCsWVVNW51h87NO2-Ep8zgOLvgt-3ffho) | **Do you approve of the Supreme Court?**

Yes

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Fox News' attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88394271/483957796/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDIxZTA3YS1lYjNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_oCDAWhIx8EX03rQ2faaeMjmI6_slGhFGKdPppd7sE=&emci=a83c38a2-5839-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e421e07a-eb3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88394272/483957798/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDIxZTA3YS1lYjNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_oCDAWhIx8EX03rQ2faaeMjmI6_slGhFGKdPppd7sE=&emci=a83c38a2-5839-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e421e07a-eb3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
For decades, Dad was an OB-GYN. He delivered thousands of babies and wrote books on how to get pregnant and to navigate menopause. Dad provided women with full access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions, in the years right after _Roe_ – and he has now had to watch as women’s reproductive rights are gutted in the aftermath of _Dobbs_.
Dad and his clinic faced many threats over the years. It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions.
But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. **It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado.**
If extremists like Lauren Boebert and my new Republican opponents want to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support _freedom_ and _liberty_ – and how they support big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how they support a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how they are so extreme, they even want to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades.
I am willing to talk all day about the fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. **But what I won’t accept is extremists like Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister.**
I am _incredibly_ proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not extremists like Lauren Boebert or my new Republican opponents – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose.
**We already scared off Lauren Boebert. In 2022, I came just 546 votes shy of winning this House seat. I’m ready to finish the job and replace Boebert in Congress in November, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you give $5 or more right now to my campaign to help me win this critical House seat? Our race was the closest in the entire country in 2022. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88394273/483957799/1610638071?refcode=em20240706pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e421e07a-eb3b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDIxZTA3YS1lYjNiLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_oCDAWhIx8EX03rQ2faaeMjmI6_slGhFGKdPppd7sE=)

I knew this campaign was going to get nasty, but I never expected the other side to go after my family.
Thank you for being on this journey with me, through thick and thin.
With gratitude -
Adam
P.S. I love you, Dad and little sis.

I’m ready to finish the job and replace Boebert in Congress in November, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I knew this campaign was going to get nasty, but I never expected the other side to go after my family. Thank you for being on this journey with me, through thick and thin. With gratitude - Adam P.S. I love you, Dad and little sis. ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

With so much at stake in Florida's race, I need all hands on deck to stay competitive from now until November.

Let's face it: Extremists like my opponent aren't in politics to represent the interests of working families or fight for Florida's future.
Republicans like Rick Scott are in this to _rule_ us — and they bet on voters to back them just for having an (R) by their name. **That's why I'm determined to make sure Florida knows that a vote for Rick Scott is a vote for:**
* **Higher taxes** for everyday Americans

* The **END** of Social Security, Medicare, and other vital benefits

* A nationwide **BAN** on abortions

* The enactment of Trump’s **cruel, extremist agenda**

* **A GOP-controlled Senate with Rick Scott at the driver's wheel**

And friend, that's only the tip of the iceberg.
**In fact, he just voted _against_ the bipartisan bill to protect access to contraception — even though eight in ten polled voters, including SEVEN in ten GOP voters, support it.**
**_That's_ why I'm in this race. **And if we succeed at the ballot box, I will not rest until reproductive rights, including access to birth control, are reinstated across the land.
**But I can't make that happen, or stop a future where Rick Scott runs the Senate, without your urgent support tonight.**[**Please, friend — will you sign now to be one of the 50,000 grassroots voters I'm counting on to endorse me by midnight? I really can't flip Florida blue without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88394989/483960249/1928718757?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1484-su-nd&refcode=jtk1484-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzg5NzA1NzctZjIzYi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rz71fMjV8Gee5Ev9mAeZ7-pCD-JtOK_sbIx3OWfPB7g=&emci=618cc68a-be38-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c8970577-f23b-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)

clean_body: Be one of 50,000 Democrats needed for this urgent deadline | | | Friend, do you have a quick moment to spare? With so much at stake in Florida's race, I need all hands on deck to stay competitive from now until November. That's why I've set a flash goal to collect 50,000 grassroots endorsements from Democrats across the country by midnight — and friend, I'm counting on seeing your name on the list. | | Let's face it: Extremists like my opponent aren't in politics to represent the interests of working families or fight for Florida's future. Republicans like Rick Scott are in this to rule us — and they bet on voters to back them just for having an (R) by their name. That's why I'm determined to make sure Florida knows that a vote for Rick Scott is a vote for: Higher taxes for everyday Americans The END of Social Security, Medicare, and other vital benefits A nationwide BAN on abortions The enactment of Trump’s cruel, extremist agenda A GOP-controlled Senate with Rick Scott at the driver's wheel And friend, that's only the tip of the iceberg. In fact, he just voted against the bipartisan bill to protect access to contraception — even though eight in ten polled voters, including SEVEN in ten GOP voters, support it. That's why I'm in this race. And if we succeed at the ballot box, I will not rest until reproductive rights, including access to birth control, are reinstated across the land. But I can't make that happen, or stop a future where Rick Scott runs the Senate, without your urgent support tonight. Thank you so much for your support, Debbie | | | | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley just attacked Jon Hamm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — my friend Jon Hamm is supporting my campaign for U.S. Senate.
And Josh Hawley is not happy about it.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55331?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT)
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55331?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT)**
**Let me be clear: I am proud to have Jon’s support in this race.** Jon is a born-and-raised Missourian. He grew up through real struggle. He’s worked for minimum wage. He’s lived paycheck-to-paycheck. And he’s only fake for the movies. He truly cares about working people in Missouri.
**Josh Hawley can’t say any of those things about himself.** And by attacking Jon for being a "millionaire," Josh is attacking probably the only thing the two of them have in common.
Instead of campaigning on the ways he’s helped our state (he hasn’t) or how he plans to invest in our future (he won’t), Josh is obsessed with using every out-of-touch culture war he can think of to distract us from the fact that he’s enriched himself while failing to deliver for Missourians in the U.S. Senate.
**Here’s why Jon is supporting my campaign to replace Josh Hawley:** He knows I’ll fight to bring home every penny I can for Missouri, to invest in our communities and to secure our future for generations to come.
That’s the message my campaign urgently needs to deliver to Missourians — and I’m counting on your support to help us do it, Peter.
**[So will you please rush a donation of $10 or just whatever works best for you today so we can reach voters with our election-winning message every day between now and November 5th? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so I mean it when I say anything you can give today makes a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55331?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55332?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55332?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55332?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55332?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55332?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55332?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/55331?refcode=em20240706-5943&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5943%2E614464%2Ec4ypmT)
---
I’m proud to have Jon on this team, just like I’m proud to have hundreds of thousands of everyday people like you as part of this movement.
Together, we can defeat Hawely and take back this Senate seat in November.
Thanks for helping me get it done, Peter.
Now let’s get back to work,
Lucas
